# 12) ���� ���� ���� ��� EventBus

## �������:
```csharp
public interface IEventBus
{
    IDisposable Subscribe<T>(Action<T> handler);
    void Publish<T>(T message);
}
```

## Message:
```csharp
public record ProductChangedMessage();
```

## ��� �����:
```csharp

_eventBus.Publish(new ProductChangedMessage());
```

## �� ����� ��������:
```csharp

{
    _ = LoadProductsAsync();
});
```

# 12) ���� ���� ���� ��� EventBus

## �������:
```csharp
public interface IEventBus
{
    IDisposable Subscribe<T>(Action<T> handler);
    void Publish<T>(T message);
}
```

## Message:
```csharp
public record ProductChangedMessage();
```

## ��� �����:
```csharp
await _productApiService.CreateAsync(request);
_eventBus.Publish(new ProductChangedMessage());
```

## �� ����� ��������:
```csharp
_eventBus.Subscribe<ProductChangedMessage>(_ =>
{
    _ = LoadProductsAsync();
});
```

# 11) �������� ��������
��� �� ��� ERD ������� �������:

- `Category 1 -> * Products`
- `Unit 1 -> * Products`
- `Warehouse 1 -> * WarehouseStocks`
- `Product 1 -> * WarehouseStocks`
- `Supplier 1 -> * PurchaseInvoices`
- `Customer 1 -> * SalesInvoices`
- `PurchaseInvoice 1 -> * PurchaseInvoiceItems`
- `SalesInvoice 1 -> * SalesInvoiceItems`
- `PurchaseInvoice 1 -> * PurchaseReturns`  (�������)
- `SalesInvoice 1 -> * SalesReturns` (�������)
- `Warehouse 1 -> * StockTransfers`
- `StockTransfer 1 -> * StockTransferItems`
- `Customer 1 -> * CustomerPayments`
- `Supplier 1 -> * SupplierPayments`

# 1) ����� ����� ��������

```sql
IF DB_ID(N'SalesSystemDb') IS NULL
BEGIN
    CREATE DATABASE SalesSystemDb;
END
GO

USE SalesSystemDb;
GO
```

---

# 2) ����� ������

## 2.1 Users

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.Users
(
    UserId          INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_Users PRIMARY KEY,
    UserName        NVARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
    PasswordHash    NVARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
    FullName        NVARCHAR(150) NOT NULL,
    Role            TINYINT       NOT NULL,
    IsActive        BIT           NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Users_IsActive DEFAULT(1),
    CreatedAt       DATETIME2     NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Users_CreatedAt DEFAULT(SYSDATETIME()),
    UpdatedAt       DATETIME2     NULL,

    CONSTRAINT UQ_Users_UserName UNIQUE (UserName),
    CONSTRAINT CK_Users_Role CHECK (Role IN (1,2,3))
);
GO
```

**Role values**
- `1 = Admin`
- `2 = Cashier`
- `3 = Manager`

---

## 2.2 Units

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.Units
(
    UnitId      INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_Units PRIMARY KEY,
    Name        NVARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
    Symbol      NVARCHAR(20)  NULL,
    IsActive    BIT           NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Units_IsActive DEFAULT(1),
    CreatedAt   DATETIME2     NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Units_CreatedAt DEFAULT(SYSDATETIME())
);
GO
```

---

## 2.3 Categories

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.Categories
(
    CategoryId      INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_Categories PRIMARY KEY,
    Name            NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    Description     NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
    IsActive        BIT           NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Categories_IsActive DEFAULT(1),
    CreatedAt       DATETIME2     NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Categories_CreatedAt DEFAULT(SYSDATETIME()),
    UpdatedAt       DATETIME2     NULL
);
GO
```

---

## 2.4 Warehouses

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.Warehouses
(
    WarehouseId     INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_Warehouses PRIMARY KEY,
    Code            NVARCHAR(30)  NULL,
    Name            NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    Location        NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
    IsDefault       BIT           NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Warehouses_IsDefault DEFAULT(0),
    IsActive        BIT           NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Warehouses_IsActive DEFAULT(1),
    CreatedAt       DATETIME2     NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Warehouses_CreatedAt DEFAULT(SYSDATETIME()),
    UpdatedAt       DATETIME2     NULL,

    CONSTRAINT UQ_Warehouses_Code UNIQUE (Code)
);
GO
```

---

## 2.5 Suppliers

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.Suppliers
(
    SupplierId          INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_Suppliers PRIMARY KEY,
    Code                NVARCHAR(30)  NULL,
    Name                NVARCHAR(150) NOT NULL,
    Phone               NVARCHAR(20)  NULL,
    Email               NVARCHAR(100) NULL,
    Address             NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
    OpeningBalance      DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Suppliers_OpeningBalance DEFAULT(0),
    CurrentBalance      DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Suppliers_CurrentBalance DEFAULT(0),
    IsActive            BIT           NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Suppliers_IsActive DEFAULT(1),
    CreatedAt           DATETIME2     NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Suppliers_CreatedAt DEFAULT(SYSDATETIME()),
    UpdatedAt           DATETIME2     NULL,

    CONSTRAINT UQ_Suppliers_Code UNIQUE (Code)
);
GO
```

---

## 2.6 Customers

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.Customers
(
    CustomerId          INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_Customers PRIMARY KEY,
    Code                NVARCHAR(30)  NULL,
    Name                NVARCHAR(150) NOT NULL,
    Phone               NVARCHAR(20)  NULL,
    Email               NVARCHAR(100) NULL,
    Address             NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
    OpeningBalance      DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Customers_OpeningBalance DEFAULT(0),
    CurrentBalance      DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Customers_CurrentBalance DEFAULT(0),
    IsActive            BIT           NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Customers_IsActive DEFAULT(1),
    CreatedAt           DATETIME2     NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Customers_CreatedAt DEFAULT(SYSDATETIME()),
    UpdatedAt           DATETIME2     NULL,

    CONSTRAINT UQ_Customers_Code UNIQUE (Code)
);
GO
```

---

## 2.7 StoreSettings

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.StoreSettings
(
    StoreSettingsId     INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_StoreSettings PRIMARY KEY,
    StoreName           NVARCHAR(150) NOT NULL,
    Phone               NVARCHAR(20)  NULL,
    Address             NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
    LogoPath            NVARCHAR(255) NULL,
    CurrencyCode        NVARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_StoreSettings_CurrencyCode DEFAULT(N'SAR'),
    DefaultTaxRate      DECIMAL(5,2)  NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_StoreSettings_DefaultTaxRate DEFAULT(0),
    IsTaxEnabled        BIT           NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_StoreSettings_IsTaxEnabled DEFAULT(0),
    UpdatedAt           DATETIME2     NULL
);
GO
```

# 3) �������� ��������

## 3.1 Products

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.Products
(
    ProductId       INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_Products PRIMARY KEY,
    Code            NVARCHAR(30)  NULL,
    Barcode         NVARCHAR(50)  NULL,
    Name            NVARCHAR(150) NOT NULL,
    CategoryId      INT           NULL,
    UnitId          INT           NULL,
    PurchasePrice   DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Products_PurchasePrice DEFAULT(0),
    SalePrice       DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Products_SalePrice DEFAULT(0),
    MinStock        DECIMAL(18,3) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Products_MinStock DEFAULT(0),
    Description     NVARCHAR(500) NULL,
    IsActive        BIT           NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Products_IsActive DEFAULT(1),
    CreatedAt       DATETIME2     NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_Products_CreatedAt DEFAULT(SYSDATETIME()),
    UpdatedAt       DATETIME2     NULL,

    CONSTRAINT UQ_Products_Code UNIQUE (Code),
    CONSTRAINT UQ_Products_Barcode UNIQUE (Barcode),
    CONSTRAINT FK_Products_Categories FOREIGN KEY (CategoryId) REFERENCES dbo.Categories(CategoryId),
    CONSTRAINT FK_Products_Units FOREIGN KEY (UnitId) REFERENCES dbo.Units(UnitId)
);
GO
```

---

## 3.2 WarehouseStocks

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.WarehouseStocks
(
    WarehouseStockId    INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_WarehouseStocks PRIMARY KEY,
    WarehouseId         INT NOT NULL,
    ProductId           INT NOT NULL,
    Quantity            DECIMAL(18,3) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_WarehouseStocks_Quantity DEFAULT(0),
    UpdatedAt           DATETIME2 NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_WarehouseStocks_UpdatedAt DEFAULT(SYSDATETIME()),

    CONSTRAINT UQ_WarehouseStocks_Warehouse_Product UNIQUE (WarehouseId, ProductId),
    CONSTRAINT FK_WarehouseStocks_Warehouses FOREIGN KEY (WarehouseId) REFERENCES dbo.Warehouses(WarehouseId),
    CONSTRAINT FK_WarehouseStocks_Products FOREIGN KEY (ProductId) REFERENCES dbo.Products(ProductId)
);
GO
```

# 4) ���������

## 4.1 PurchaseInvoices

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.PurchaseInvoices
(
    PurchaseInvoiceId   INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_PurchaseInvoices PRIMARY KEY,
    InvoiceNo           NVARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL,
    SupplierId          INT           NOT NULL,
    WarehouseId         INT           NOT NULL,
    InvoiceDate         DATETIME2     NOT NULL,
    DueDate             DATE          NULL,
    PaymentType         TINYINT       NOT NULL,
    SubTotal            DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_PurchaseInvoices_SubTotal DEFAULT(0),
    DiscountAmount      DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_PurchaseInvoices_DiscountAmount DEFAULT(0),
    TaxAmount           DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_PurchaseInvoices_TaxAmount DEFAULT(0),
    TotalAmount         DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_PurchaseInvoices_TotalAmount DEFAULT(0),
    PaidAmount          DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_PurchaseInvoices_PaidAmount DEFAULT(0),
    DueAmount           DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_PurchaseInvoices_DueAmount DEFAULT(0),
    Notes               NVARCHAR(500) NULL,
    Status              TINYINT       NOT NULL,
    CreatedByUserId     INT           NULL,
    CreatedAt           DATETIME2     NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_PurchaseInvoices_CreatedAt DEFAULT(SYSDATETIME()),
    UpdatedAt           DATETIME2     NULL,

    CONSTRAINT UQ_PurchaseInvoices_InvoiceNo UNIQUE (InvoiceNo),
    CONSTRAINT FK_PurchaseInvoices_Suppliers FOREIGN KEY (SupplierId) REFERENCES dbo.Suppliers(SupplierId),
    CONSTRAINT FK_PurchaseInvoices_Warehouses FOREIGN KEY (WarehouseId) REFERENCES dbo.Warehouses(WarehouseId),
    CONSTRAINT FK_PurchaseInvoices_Users FOREIGN KEY (CreatedByUserId) REFERENCES dbo.Users(UserId),
    CONSTRAINT CK_PurchaseInvoices_PaymentType CHECK (PaymentType IN (1,2,3)),
    CONSTRAINT CK_PurchaseInvoices_Status CHECK (Status IN (1,2,3))
);
GO
```

**PaymentType**
- `1 = Cash`
- `2 = Credit`
- `3 = Mixed`

**Status**
- `1 = Draft`
- `2 = Posted`
- `3 = Cancelled`

```sql
);
```

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.PurchaseReturns
(

    PurchaseInvoiceId   INT           NULL,

    WarehouseId         INT           NOT NULL,
    ReturnDate          DATETIME2     NOT NULL,
    Reason              NVARCHAR(250) NULL,
    SubTotal            DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_PurchaseReturns_SubTotal DEFAULT(0),
    TotalAmount         DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_PurchaseReturns_TotalAmount DEFAULT(0),
    Status              TINYINT       NOT NULL,
    CreatedByUserId     INT           NULL,
    CreatedAt           DATETIME2     NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_PurchaseReturns_CreatedAt DEFAULT(SYSDATETIME()),
    UpdatedAt           DATETIME2     NULL,

    CONSTRAINT UQ_PurchaseReturns_ReturnNo UNIQUE (ReturnNo),

);
```

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.CustomerPayments
(
    CustomerPaymentId   INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_CustomerPayments PRIMARY KEY,
    PaymentNo           NVARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL,
    CustomerId          INT           NOT NULL,
    SalesInvoiceId      INT           NULL,
    PaymentDate         DATETIME2     NOT NULL,
    Amount              DECIMAL(18,2) NOT NULL,
    PaymentMethod       TINYINT       NOT NULL,
    ReferenceNo         NVARCHAR(50)  NULL,
    Notes               NVARCHAR(500) NULL,
    CreatedByUserId     INT           NULL,
    CreatedAt           DATETIME2     NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_CustomerPayments_CreatedAt DEFAULT(SYSDATETIME()),

    CONSTRAINT UQ_CustomerPayments_PaymentNo UNIQUE (PaymentNo),
    CONSTRAINT FK_CustomerPayments_Customers FOREIGN KEY (CustomerId) REFERENCES dbo.Customers(CustomerId),

    CONSTRAINT CK_CustomerPayments_PaymentMethod CHECK (PaymentMethod IN (1,2,3,4))
);
GO
```

**PaymentMethod**
- `1 = Cash`
- `2 = Bank Transfer`
- `3 = Card`

# 9) ��� ���� �������

## 9.1 InventoryMovements

```sql
CREATE TABLE dbo.InventoryMovements
(
    InventoryMovementId BIGINT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_InventoryMovements PRIMARY KEY,
    ProductId           INT NOT NULL,
    WarehouseId         INT NOT NULL,
    MovementType        TINYINT NOT NULL,
    ReferenceType       NVARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
    ReferenceId         INT NOT NULL,
    Quantity            DECIMAL(18,3) NOT NULL,
    UnitCost            DECIMAL(18,2) NULL,
    MovementDate        DATETIME2 NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_InventoryMovements_MovementDate DEFAULT(SYSDATETIME()),
    Notes               NVARCHAR(500) NULL,
    CreatedByUserId     INT NULL,

    CONSTRAINT FK_InventoryMovements_Products FOREIGN KEY (ProductId) REFERENCES dbo.Products(ProductId),
    CONSTRAINT FK_InventoryMovements_Warehouses FOREIGN KEY (WarehouseId) REFERENCES dbo.Warehouses(WarehouseId),
    CONSTRAINT FK_InventoryMovements_Users FOREIGN KEY (CreatedByUserId) REFERENCES dbo.Users(UserId),
    CONSTRAINT CK_InventoryMovements_MovementType CHECK (MovementType IN (1,2,3,4,5,6,7))
);
GO
```

**MovementType**
- `1 = PurchaseIn`
- `2 = SaleOut`
- `3 = SaleReturnIn`
- `4 = PurchaseReturnOut`
- `5 = TransferOut`
- `6 = TransferIn`
- `7 = Adjustment`

---

# 1) ��� ��� Enums
��� ��:
`SalesSystem.Domain/Enums`

```csharp
namespace SalesSystem.Domain.Enums
{
    public enum UserRole : byte
    {
        Admin = 1,
        Cashier = 2,
        Manager = 3
    }

    public enum InvoicePaymentType : byte
    {
        Cash = 1,
        Credit = 2,
        Mixed = 3
    }

    public enum InvoiceStatus : byte
    {
        Draft = 1,
        Posted = 2,
        Cancelled = 3
    }

    public enum PaymentMethod : byte
    {
        Cash = 1,
        BankTransfer = 2,
        Card = 3,
        Other = 4
    }

    public enum InventoryMovementType : byte
    {
        PurchaseIn = 1,
        SaleOut = 2,
        SaleReturnIn = 3,
        PurchaseReturnOut = 4,
        TransferOut = 5,
        TransferIn = 6,
        Adjustment = 7
    }
}
```

---

# 2) ��� Base ������� ��������
��� ��:
`SalesSystem.Domain/Common`

```csharp
namespace SalesSystem.Domain.Common
{
    public abstract class AuditableEntity
    {
        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? UpdatedAt { get; set; }
    }
}
```

---

# 3) ��� Entity Classes ��������

## Category
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Domain.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Domain.Entities
{
    public class Category : AuditableEntity
    {
        public int CategoryId { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;

        public ICollection<Product> Products { get; set; } = new List<Product>();
    }
}
```

## Unit
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Domain.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Domain.Entities
{
    public class Unit : AuditableEntity
    {
        public int UnitId { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Symbol { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;

        public ICollection<Product> Products { get; set; } = new List<Product>();
    }
}
```

## Product
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Domain.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Domain.Entities
{
    public class Product : AuditableEntity
    {
        public int ProductId { get; set; }
        public string? Code { get; set; }
        public string? Barcode { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public int? CategoryId { get; set; }
        public Category? Category { get; set; }

        public int? UnitId { get; set; }
        public Unit? Unit { get; set; }

        public decimal PurchasePrice { get; set; }
        public decimal SalePrice { get; set; }
        public decimal MinStock { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;

        public ICollection<WarehouseStock> WarehouseStocks { get; set; } = new List<WarehouseStock>();
        public ICollection<PurchaseInvoiceItem> PurchaseInvoiceItems { get; set; } = new List<PurchaseInvoiceItem>();
        public ICollection<SalesInvoiceItem> SalesInvoiceItems { get; set; } = new List<SalesInvoiceItem>();
    }
}
```

```csharp
        public decimal PaidAmount { get; set; }
        public decimal DueAmount { get; set; }

        public string? Notes { get; set; }
        public InvoiceStatus Status { get; set; }

        public int? CreatedByUserId { get; set; }
        public User? CreatedByUser { get; set; }

        public ICollection<PurchaseInvoiceItem> Items { get; set; } = new List<PurchaseInvoiceItem>();
    }
}
```

# 8) ���� ����� ���� �� EF Core�
��� ��� Entities� ����� �� `Infrastructure`:

- `SalesSystemDbContext`
- `EntityTypeConfiguration<T>` ��� Entity
- �����:
  - `HasKey`
  - `HasIndex`
  - `HasPrecision`
  - `HasMaxLength`
  - `HasOne / WithMany / HasForeignKey`
  - `DeleteBehavior`

---

# 9) ���� ���� ���� ��� Fluent API
���� �� `ProductConfiguration`:

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Configurations
{
    public class ProductConfiguration : IEntityTypeConfiguration<Product>
    {
        public void Configure(EntityTypeBuilder<Product> builder)
        {
            builder.ToTable("Products");

            builder.HasKey(x => x.ProductId);

            builder.Property(x => x.Name)
                .HasMaxLength(150)
                .IsRequired();

            builder.Property(x => x.Code)
                .HasMaxLength(30);

            builder.Property(x => x.Barcode)
                .HasMaxLength(50);

            builder.Property(x => x.PurchasePrice)
                .HasPrecision(18, 2);

            builder.Property(x => x.SalePrice)
                .HasPrecision(18, 2);

            builder.Property(x => x.MinStock)
                .HasPrecision(18, 3);

            builder.HasIndex(x => x.Code).IsUnique();
            builder.HasIndex(x => x.Barcode).IsUnique();
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 3) Seed Data ���� `OnModelCreating`
����� ����� ��� �������� ���� `SalesSystemDbContext` �� `OnModelCreating`.

## ����:

```csharp
protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)
{
    base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);

    modelBuilder.ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly(typeof(SalesSystemDbContext).Assembly);

    // Seed Units
    modelBuilder.Entity<Unit>().HasData(
        new Unit
        {
            UnitId = 1,
            Name = "Piece",
            Symbol = "PCS",
            IsActive = true,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        },
        new Unit
        {
            UnitId = 2,
            Name = "Box",
            Symbol = "BOX",
            IsActive = true,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        }
    );

    // Seed Categories
    modelBuilder.Entity<Category>().HasData(
        new Category
        {
            CategoryId = 1,
            Name = "General",
            Description = "Default category",
            IsActive = true,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        }
    );

    // Seed Warehouses
    modelBuilder.Entity<Warehouse>().HasData(
        new Warehouse
        {
            WarehouseId = 1,
            Code = "WH-001",
            Name = "Main Warehouse",
            Location = "Default",
            IsDefault = true,
            IsActive = true,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        }
    );

    // Seed Store Settings
    modelBuilder.Entity<StoreSettings>().HasData(
        new StoreSettings
        {
            StoreSettingsId = 1,
            StoreName = "My Store",
            Phone = null,
            Address = null,
            LogoPath = null,
            CurrencyCode = "SAR",
            DefaultTaxRate = 0,
            IsTaxEnabled = false,
            UpdatedAt = null
        }
    );
}
```

---

# 6) ��� Seed �����
## `ModelBuilderSeedExtensions.cs`

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Seed
{
    public static class ModelBuilderSeedExtensions
    {
        public static void SeedInitialData(this ModelBuilder modelBuilder)
        {
            modelBuilder.Entity<Unit>().HasData(
                new Unit
                {
                    UnitId = 1,
                    Name = "Piece",
                    Symbol = "PCS",
                    IsActive = true,
                    CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 1, 1)
                },
                new Unit
                {
                    UnitId = 2,
                    Name = "Box",
                    Symbol = "BOX",
                    IsActive = true,
                    CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 1, 1)
                }
            );

            modelBuilder.Entity<Category>().HasData(
                new Category
                {
                    CategoryId = 1,
                    Name = "General",
                    Description = "Default category",
                    IsActive = true,
                    CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 1, 1)
                }
            );

            modelBuilder.Entity<Warehouse>().HasData(
                new Warehouse
                {
                    WarehouseId = 1,
                    Code = "WH-001",
                    Name = "Main Warehouse",
                    Location = "Default",
                    IsDefault = true,
                    IsActive = true,
                    CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 1, 1)
                }
            );

            modelBuilder.Entity<StoreSettings>().HasData(
                new StoreSettings
                {
                    StoreSettingsId = 1,
                    StoreName = "My Store",
                    Phone = null,
                    Address = null,
                    LogoPath = null,
                    CurrencyCode = "SAR",
                    DefaultTaxRate = 0,
                    IsTaxEnabled = false,
                    UpdatedAt = null
                }
            );
        }
    }
}
```

�� ���� `OnModelCreating`:

```csharp
protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)
{
    base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);

    modelBuilder.ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly(typeof(SalesSystemDbContext).Assembly);
    modelBuilder.SeedInitialData();
}
```

# 8) Initializer ������ Admin User
## ���� �����:
��� ����� ��� API ���� ���:
- ���� �� ���� �������� �� ��
- ��� �� ����:
  - ���� Admin
  - ���� ���� ���� �����
  - ����� Hash

---

## ����:
��� �� `Infrastructure` �� `Api` ��� ������.

### `IDatabaseInitializer`
```csharp
public interface IDatabaseInitializer
{
    Task InitializeAsync();
}
```

### `DatabaseInitializer`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Initialization
{
    public class DatabaseInitializer : IDatabaseInitializer
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public DatabaseInitializer(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task InitializeAsync()
        {
            await _context.Database.MigrateAsync();

            if (!await _context.Users.AnyAsync())
            {
                var admin = new User
                {
                    UserName = "admin",
                    PasswordHash = "CHANGE_ME_HASH",
                    FullName = "System Admin",
                    Role = UserRole.Admin,
                    IsActive = true,
                    CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
                };

                _context.Users.Add(admin);
                await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
            }
        }
    }
}
```

> ������ ������ `"CHANGE_ME_HASH"` ������ Hash ����� �� ASP.NET Core Identity PasswordHasher �� BCrypt.

# 9) ���� ���� �� `Program.cs` ��� API�
�� ����� ��� API:

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Initialization;

var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);

// services registration ...

var app = builder.Build();

using (var scope = app.Services.CreateScope())
{
    var initializer = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<IDatabaseInitializer>();
    await initializer.InitializeAsync();
}

app.MapControllers();

app.Run();
```

# 10) ����� ������� �� DI
�� `Infrastructure`:

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Initialization;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure
{
    public static class DependencyInjection
    {
        public static IServiceCollection AddInfrastructure(this IServiceCollection services, IConfiguration configuration)
        {
            services.AddDbContext<SalesSystemDbContext>(options =>
                options.UseSqlServer(configuration.GetConnectionString("DefaultConnection")));

            services.AddScoped<IDatabaseInitializer, DatabaseInitializer>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
```

# 3) Seed Data ���� `OnModelCreating`
����� ����� ��� �������� ���� `SalesSystemDbContext` �� `OnModelCreating`.

## ����:

```csharp
protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)
{
    base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);

    modelBuilder.ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly(typeof(SalesSystemDbContext).Assembly);

    // Seed Units
    modelBuilder.Entity<Unit>().HasData(
        new Unit
        {
            UnitId = 1,
            Name = "Piece",
            Symbol = "PCS",
            IsActive = true,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        },
        new Unit
        {
            UnitId = 2,
            Name = "Box",
            Symbol = "BOX",
            IsActive = true,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        }
    );

    // Seed Categories
    modelBuilder.Entity<Category>().HasData(
        new Category
        {
            CategoryId = 1,
            Name = "General",
            Description = "Default category",
            IsActive = true,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        }
    );

    // Seed Warehouses
    modelBuilder.Entity<Warehouse>().HasData(
        new Warehouse
        {
            WarehouseId = 1,
            Code = "WH-001",
            Name = "Main Warehouse",
            Location = "Default",
            IsDefault = true,
            IsActive = true,
            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
        }
    );

    // Seed Store Settings
    modelBuilder.Entity<StoreSettings>().HasData(
        new StoreSettings
        {
            StoreSettingsId = 1,
            StoreName = "My Store",
            Phone = null,
            Address = null,
            LogoPath = null,
            CurrencyCode = "SAR",
            DefaultTaxRate = 0,
            IsTaxEnabled = false,
            UpdatedAt = null
        }
    );
}
```

---

# 6) ��� Seed �����
## `ModelBuilderSeedExtensions.cs`

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Seed
{
    public static class ModelBuilderSeedExtensions
    {
        public static void SeedInitialData(this ModelBuilder modelBuilder)
        {
            modelBuilder.Entity<Unit>().HasData(
                new Unit
                {
                    UnitId = 1,
                    Name = "Piece",
                    Symbol = "PCS",
                    IsActive = true,
                    CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 1, 1)
                },
                new Unit
                {
                    UnitId = 2,
                    Name = "Box",
                    Symbol = "BOX",
                    IsActive = true,
                    CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 1, 1)
                }
            );

            modelBuilder.Entity<Category>().HasData(
                new Category
                {
                    CategoryId = 1,
                    Name = "General",
                    Description = "Default category",
                    IsActive = true,
                    CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 1, 1)
                }
            );

            modelBuilder.Entity<Warehouse>().HasData(
                new Warehouse
                {
                    WarehouseId = 1,
                    Code = "WH-001",
                    Name = "Main Warehouse",
                    Location = "Default",
                    IsDefault = true,
                    IsActive = true,
                    CreatedAt = new DateTime(2025, 1, 1)
                }
            );

            modelBuilder.Entity<StoreSettings>().HasData(
                new StoreSettings
                {
                    StoreSettingsId = 1,
                    StoreName = "My Store",
                    Phone = null,
                    Address = null,
                    LogoPath = null,
                    CurrencyCode = "SAR",
                    DefaultTaxRate = 0,
                    IsTaxEnabled = false,
                    UpdatedAt = null
                }
            );
        }
    }
}
```

�� ���� `OnModelCreating`:

```csharp
protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)
{
    base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);

    modelBuilder.ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly(typeof(SalesSystemDbContext).Assembly);
    modelBuilder.SeedInitialData();
}
```

# 8) Initializer ������ Admin User
## ���� �����:
��� ����� ��� API ���� ���:
- ���� �� ���� �������� �� ��
- ��� �� ����:
  - ���� Admin
  - ���� ���� ���� �����
  - ����� Hash

---

## ����:
��� �� `Infrastructure` �� `Api` ��� ������.

### `IDatabaseInitializer`
```csharp
public interface IDatabaseInitializer
{
    Task InitializeAsync();
}
```

### `DatabaseInitializer`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Initialization
{
    public class DatabaseInitializer : IDatabaseInitializer
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public DatabaseInitializer(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task InitializeAsync()
        {
            await _context.Database.MigrateAsync();

            if (!await _context.Users.AnyAsync())
            {
                var admin = new User
                {
                    UserName = "admin",
                    PasswordHash = "CHANGE_ME_HASH",
                    FullName = "System Admin",
                    Role = UserRole.Admin,
                    IsActive = true,
                    CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
                };

                _context.Users.Add(admin);
                await _context.SaveChangesAsync();
            }
        }
    }
}
```

> ������ ������ `"CHANGE_ME_HASH"` ������ Hash ����� �� ASP.NET Core Identity PasswordHasher �� BCrypt.

# 2) DTOs ������

## `PagedQueryRequestDto.cs`

```csharp
namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Common
{
    public class PagedQueryRequestDto
    {
        public int PageNumber { get; set; } = 1;
        public int PageSize { get; set; } = 20;
        public string? SearchTerm { get; set; }
    }
}
```

## `PagedResultDto.cs`
```csharp
namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Common
{
    public class PagedResultDto<T>
    {
        public IReadOnlyList<T> Items { get; set; } = [];
        public int TotalCount { get; set; }
        public int PageNumber { get; set; }
        public int PageSize { get; set; }
    }
}
```

## `ApiResponseDto.cs`
```csharp
namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Common
{
    public class ApiResponseDto<T>
    {
        public bool IsSuccess { get; set; }
        public string? Message { get; set; }
        public T? Data { get; set; }

        public static ApiResponseDto<T> Success(T data, string? message = null)
            => new() { IsSuccess = true, Data = data, Message = message };

        public static ApiResponseDto<T> Fail(string message)
            => new() { IsSuccess = false, Message = message };
    }
}
```

```csharp
namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Products
{
    public class ProductDto
    {
        public int ProductId { get; set; }
        public string? Code { get; set; }
        public string? Barcode { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public int? CategoryId { get; set; }
        public string? CategoryName { get; set; }

        public int? UnitId { get; set; }
        public string? UnitName { get; set; }

        public decimal PurchasePrice { get; set; }
        public decimal SalePrice { get; set; }
        public decimal MinStock { get; set; }
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; }

        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? UpdatedAt { get; set; }
    }
}
```

## `CreateProductRequestDto.cs`
```csharp
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Products
{
    public class CreateProductRequestDto
    {
        [MaxLength(30)]
        public string? Code { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(50)]
        public string? Barcode { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [MaxLength(150)]
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public int? CategoryId { get; set; }
        public int? UnitId { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal PurchasePrice { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal SalePrice { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal MinStock { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(500)]
        public string? Description { get; set; }

        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }
}
```

## `UpdateProductRequestDto.cs`
```csharp
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Products
{
    public class UpdateProductRequestDto
    {
        [MaxLength(30)]
        public string? Code { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(50)]
        public string? Barcode { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [MaxLength(150)]
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public int? CategoryId { get; set; }
        public int? UnitId { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal PurchasePrice { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal SalePrice { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal MinStock { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(500)]
        public string? Description { get; set; }

        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }
}
```

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Purchases
{
    public class PurchaseInvoiceDto
    {
        public int PurchaseInvoiceId { get; set; }
        public string InvoiceNo { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public int SupplierId { get; set; }
        public string SupplierName { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public int WarehouseId { get; set; }
        public string WarehouseName { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public DateTime InvoiceDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? DueDate { get; set; }

        public InvoicePaymentTypeDto PaymentType { get; set; }

        public decimal SubTotal { get; set; }
        public decimal DiscountAmount { get; set; }
        public decimal TaxAmount { get; set; }
        public decimal TotalAmount { get; set; }
        public decimal PaidAmount { get; set; }
        public decimal DueAmount { get; set; }

        public string? Notes { get; set; }
        public InvoiceStatusDto Status { get; set; }

        public int? CreatedByUserId { get; set; }
        public string? CreatedByUserName { get; set; }

        public List<PurchaseInvoiceItemDto> Items { get; set; } = [];
    }
}
```

# 2) ����� AutoMapper �� ��� DI

# 3) AutoMapper Profiles

## 3.1 ProductMappingProfile

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class ProductMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public ProductMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<Product, ProductDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CategoryName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Category != null ? s.Category.Name : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.UnitName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Unit != null ? s.Unit.Name : null));

            CreateMap<Product, ProductLookupDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.StockQuantity, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<CreateProductRequestDto, Product>()
                .ForMember(d => d.ProductId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Category, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Unit, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseStocks, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoiceItems, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoiceItems, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<UpdateProductRequestDto, Product>()
                .ForMember(d => d.ProductId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Category, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Unit, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseStocks, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoiceItems, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoiceItems, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());
        }
    }
}
```

---

## 3.2 PurchaseInvoiceMappingProfile

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using DomainEnums = SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;
using ContractEnums = SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Purchases;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class PurchaseInvoiceMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public PurchaseInvoiceMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<PurchaseInvoiceItem, PurchaseInvoiceItemDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.ProductName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Product != null ? s.Product.Name : string.Empty));

            CreateMap<PurchaseInvoice, PurchaseInvoiceDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Supplier != null ? s.Supplier.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Warehouse != null ? s.Warehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUserName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.CreatedByUser != null ? s.CreatedByUser.FullName : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentType,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoicePaymentTypeDto)s.PaymentType))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoiceStatusDto)s.Status))
                .ForMember(d => d.DueDate,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.DueDate.HasValue
                        ? s.DueDate.Value.ToDateTime(TimeOnly.MinValue)
                        : (DateTime?)null))
                .ForMember(d => d.Items, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Items));

            CreateMap<PurchaseInvoice, PurchaseInvoiceListDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Supplier != null ? s.Supplier.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Warehouse != null ? s.Warehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentType,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoicePaymentTypeDto)s.PaymentType))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoiceStatusDto)s.Status));

            CreateMap<CreatePurchaseInvoiceItemRequestDto, PurchaseInvoiceItem>()
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoiceItemId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoice, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Product, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.LineTotal, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto, PurchaseInvoice>()
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoiceId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.InvoiceNo, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Supplier, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Warehouse, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Items, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUser, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentType,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (DomainEnums.InvoicePaymentType)s.PaymentType))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(_ => DomainEnums.InvoiceStatus.Draft))
                .ForMember(d => d.DueDate,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.DueDate.HasValue
                        ? DateOnly.FromDateTime(s.DueDate.Value)
                        : (DateOnly?)null));
        }
    }
}
```

---

## 3.3 SalesInvoiceMappingProfile

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using DomainEnums = SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;
using ContractEnums = SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Sales;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class SalesInvoiceMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public SalesInvoiceMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<SalesInvoiceItem, SalesInvoiceItemDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.ProductName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Product != null ? s.Product.Name : string.Empty));

            CreateMap<SalesInvoice, SalesInvoiceDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Customer != null ? s.Customer.Name : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Warehouse != null ? s.Warehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUserName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.CreatedByUser != null ? s.CreatedByUser.FullName : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentType,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoicePaymentTypeDto)s.PaymentType))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoiceStatusDto)s.Status))
                .ForMember(d => d.DueDate,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.DueDate.HasValue
                        ? s.DueDate.Value.ToDateTime(TimeOnly.MinValue)
                        : (DateTime?)null))
                .ForMember(d => d.Items, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Items));

            CreateMap<SalesInvoice, SalesInvoiceListDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Customer != null ? s.Customer.Name : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Warehouse != null ? s.Warehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentType,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoicePaymentTypeDto)s.PaymentType))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoiceStatusDto)s.Status));

            CreateMap<CreateSalesInvoiceItemRequestDto, SalesInvoiceItem>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoiceItemId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoice, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Product, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.LineTotal, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto, SalesInvoice>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoiceId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.InvoiceNo, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Customer, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Warehouse, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Items, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUser, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentType,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (DomainEnums.InvoicePaymentType)s.PaymentType))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(_ => DomainEnums.InvoiceStatus.Draft))
                .ForMember(d => d.DueDate,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.DueDate.HasValue
                        ? DateOnly.FromDateTime(s.DueDate.Value)
                        : (DateOnly?)null));
        }
    }
}
```

# 4) Contracts for Repository + UnitOfWork

## `IProductRepository.cs`

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence
{
    public interface IProductRepository
    {
        Task<(IReadOnlyList<Product> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<Product>> SearchAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int take = 100,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Product?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task AddAsync(
            Product product,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<bool> ExistsByCodeAsync(
            string code,
            int? excludeProductId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<bool> ExistsByBarcodeAsync(
            string barcode,
            int? excludeProductId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

---

## `IUnitOfWork.cs`

```csharp
namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence
{
    public interface IUnitOfWork
    {
        Task<int> SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

---

# 5) ���� Service ����: ProductService

��� ���� ���� ���� ��� ������ ���� ����� �� ���� �������.

## `ProductService.cs`

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class ProductService : IProductService
    {
        private readonly IProductRepository _productRepository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public ProductService(
            IProductRepository productRepository,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _productRepository = productRepository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _productRepository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var mappedItems = _mapper.Map<List<ProductDto>>(items);

            var result = new PagedResultDto<ProductDto>
            {
                Items = mappedItems,
                TotalCount = totalCount,
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize
            };

            return Result<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>>.Success(result);
        }

        public async Task<Result<ProductDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _productRepository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result<ProductDto?>.Failure("Product not found.");

            var dto = _mapper.Map<ProductDto>(entity);
            return Result<ProductDto?>.Success(dto);
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var code = TrimToNull(request.Code);
            var barcode = TrimToNull(request.Barcode);
            var name = request.Name.Trim();

            if (code is not null &&
                await _productRepository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, null, cancellationToken))
            {
                return Result<int>.Failure("Product code already exists.");
            }

            if (barcode is not null &&
                await _productRepository.ExistsByBarcodeAsync(barcode, null, cancellationToken))
            {
                return Result<int>.Failure("Barcode already exists.");
            }

            var entity = _mapper.Map<Product>(request);
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Barcode = barcode;
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
            entity.UpdatedAt = null;

            await _productRepository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result<int>.Success(entity.ProductId);
        }

        public async Task<Result> UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _productRepository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Product not found.");

            var code = TrimToNull(request.Code);
            var barcode = TrimToNull(request.Barcode);

            if (code is not null &&
                await _productRepository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, id, cancellationToken))
            {
                return Result.Failure("Product code already exists.");
            }

            if (barcode is not null &&
                await _productRepository.ExistsByBarcodeAsync(barcode, id, cancellationToken))
            {
                return Result.Failure("Barcode already exists.");
            }

            _mapper.Map(request, entity);

            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Barcode = barcode;
            entity.Name = request.Name.Trim();
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result> DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _productRepository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Product not found.");

            // Soft delete
            if (!entity.IsActive)
                return Result.Success();

            entity.IsActive = false;
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _productRepository.SearchAsync(searchTerm, 100, cancellationToken);
            var dtos = _mapper.Map<List<ProductLookupDto>>(items);

            // StockQuantity ���� ������ ������ �� InventoryService ��� ������
            foreach (var item in dtos)
                item.StockQuantity = 0m;

            return Result<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>>.Success(dtos);
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
var invoice = _mapper.Map<SalesInvoice>(request);

invoice.InvoiceNo = await _numberGenerator.GenerateSalesInvoiceNoAsync(cancellationToken);
invoice.Items = _mapper.Map<List<SalesInvoiceItem>>(request.Items);

foreach (var item in invoice.Items)
{

}

// �� ���� SubTotal / TotalAmount / DueAmount
```

# 3) SalesService ����

## `SalesService.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Sales;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class SalesService : ISalesService
    {
        private readonly ISalesInvoiceRepository _salesInvoiceRepository;
        private readonly IProductRepository _productRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseRepository _warehouseRepository;
        private readonly ICustomerRepository _customerRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseStockRepository _warehouseStockRepository;
        private readonly IInventoryMovementRepository _inventoryMovementRepository;
        private readonly IInvoiceNumberGenerator _invoiceNumberGenerator;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public SalesService(
            ISalesInvoiceRepository salesInvoiceRepository,
            IProductRepository productRepository,
            IWarehouseRepository warehouseRepository,
            ICustomerRepository customerRepository,
            IWarehouseStockRepository warehouseStockRepository,
            IInventoryMovementRepository inventoryMovementRepository,
            IInvoiceNumberGenerator invoiceNumberGenerator,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _salesInvoiceRepository = salesInvoiceRepository;
            _productRepository = productRepository;
            _warehouseRepository = warehouseRepository;
            _customerRepository = customerRepository;
            _warehouseStockRepository = warehouseStockRepository;
            _inventoryMovementRepository = inventoryMovementRepository;
            _invoiceNumberGenerator = invoiceNumberGenerator;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            if (request is null)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Request is required.");

            if (request.Items is null || request.Items.Count == 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Invoice must contain at least one item.");

            if (request.DiscountAmount < 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Discount amount cannot be negative.");

            if (request.TaxAmount < 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Tax amount cannot be negative.");

            if (request.PaidAmount < 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Paid amount cannot be negative.");

            if (request.PaymentType != InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash && request.CustomerId is null)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Customer is required for credit or mixed sales.");

            if (request.PaymentType != InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash && !request.DueDate.HasValue)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Due date is required for credit or mixed sales.");

            var warehouse = await _warehouseRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.WarehouseId, cancellationToken);
            if (warehouse is null || !warehouse.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse not found or inactive.");

            Customer? customer = null;
            if (request.CustomerId.HasValue)
            {
                customer = await _customerRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.CustomerId.Value, cancellationToken);
                if (customer is null || !customer.IsActive)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Customer not found or inactive.");
            }

            // ����� ������ + ������ �� �������
            var invoiceItems = new List<SalesInvoiceItem>();
            decimal subTotal = 0m;

            foreach (var item in request.Items)
            {
                if (item.ProductId <= 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Invalid product.");

                if (item.Quantity <= 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Item quantity must be greater than zero.");

                if (item.UnitPrice < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Unit price cannot be negative.");

                if (item.DiscountAmount < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Item discount cannot be negative.");

                var product = await _productRepository.GetByIdAsync(item.ProductId, cancellationToken);
                if (product is null || !product.IsActive)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Product not found or inactive. ProductId={item.ProductId}");

                var currentStock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                    request.WarehouseId,
                    product.ProductId,
                    cancellationToken);

                if (currentStock is null || currentStock.Quantity < item.Quantity)
                {
                    var available = currentStock?.Quantity ?? 0m;
                    return Result<int>.Failure(
                        $"Insufficient stock for product '{product.Name}'. Available: {available}, Requested: {item.Quantity}");
                }

                var unitPrice = item.UnitPrice == 0 ? product.SalePrice : item.UnitPrice;
                var lineGross = item.Quantity * unitPrice;

                if (item.DiscountAmount > lineGross)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Item discount exceeds line amount for product '{product.Name}'.");

                var lineTotal = lineGross - item.DiscountAmount;
                if (lineTotal < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Invalid line total for product '{product.Name}'.");

                invoiceItems.Add(new SalesInvoiceItem
                {
                    ProductId = product.ProductId,
                    Quantity = item.Quantity,
                    UnitPrice = unitPrice,
                    DiscountAmount = item.DiscountAmount,
                    LineTotal = lineTotal,
                    Notes = item.Notes
                });

                subTotal += lineTotal;
            }

            var totalAmount = subTotal - request.DiscountAmount + request.TaxAmount;
            if (totalAmount < 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Total amount cannot be negative.");

            decimal paidAmount = request.PaymentType switch
            {
                InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash => totalAmount,
                InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit => 0m,
                InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Mixed => request.PaidAmount,
                _ => request.PaidAmount
            };

            if (request.PaymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash &&
                request.PaidAmount != 0m &&
                request.PaidAmount != totalAmount)
            {
                return Result<int>.Failure("Paid amount for cash sale must be equal to total or left as zero.");
            }

            if (request.PaymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit && request.PaidAmount != 0m)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Paid amount must be zero for credit sales.");

            if (request.PaymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Mixed &&
                (paidAmount < 0m || paidAmount > totalAmount))
            {
                return Result<int>.Failure("Paid amount for mixed sale must be between 0 and total amount.");
            }

            var dueAmount = totalAmount - paidAmount;

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                var invoiceNo = await _invoiceNumberGenerator.GenerateSalesInvoiceNoAsync(cancellationToken);

                var invoice = new SalesInvoice
                {
                    InvoiceNo = invoiceNo,
                    CustomerId = request.CustomerId,
                    WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                    InvoiceDate = request.InvoiceDate,
                    DueDate = request.DueDate.HasValue
                        ? DateOnly.FromDateTime(request.DueDate.Value)
                        : null,
                    PaymentType = (InvoicePaymentType)request.PaymentType,
                    SubTotal = subTotal,
                    DiscountAmount = request.DiscountAmount,
                    TaxAmount = request.TaxAmount,
                    TotalAmount = totalAmount,
                    PaidAmount = paidAmount,
                    DueAmount = dueAmount,
                    Notes = request.Notes,
                    Status = InvoiceStatus.Posted,
                    CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
                    Items = invoiceItems
                };

                await _salesInvoiceRepository.AddAsync(invoice, cancellationToken);
                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

                // ����� ������� + ��� �������
                foreach (var item in invoiceItems)
                {
                    var stock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                        request.WarehouseId,
                        item.ProductId,
                        cancellationToken);

                    if (stock is null)
                    {
                        // �� ������� ��� ��� ��� ���� ������ ������
                        return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse stock row is missing.");
                    }

                    stock.Quantity -= item.Quantity;
                    stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    await _inventoryMovementRepository.AddAsync(
                        new InventoryMovement
                        {
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                            MovementType = InventoryMovementType.SaleOut,
                            ReferenceType = "SalesInvoice",
                            ReferenceId = invoice.SalesInvoiceId,
                            Quantity = item.Quantity,
                            UnitCost = item.UnitPrice,
                            MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow,
                            Notes = "Sale invoice stock out",
                            CreatedByUserId = invoice.CreatedByUserId
                        },
                        cancellationToken);
                }

                // ����� ���� ������ ��� ��� ���� ���
                if (customer is not null && dueAmount > 0m)
                {
                    customer.CurrentBalance += dueAmount;
                    customer.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                }

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result<int>.Success(invoice.SalesInvoiceId);
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<SalesInvoiceDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _salesInvoiceRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null)
                return Result<SalesInvoiceDto?>.Failure("Sales invoice not found.");

            var dto = _mapper.Map<SalesInvoiceDto>(entity);
            return Result<SalesInvoiceDto?>.Success(dto);
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _salesInvoiceRepository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var mappedItems = _mapper.Map<List<SalesInvoiceListDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>.Success(
                new PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>
                {
                    Items = mappedItems,
                    TotalCount = totalCount,
                    PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                    PageSize = request.PageSize
                });
        }

        public async Task<Result> CancelAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var invoice = await _salesInvoiceRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (invoice is null)
                return Result.Failure("Sales invoice not found.");

            if (invoice.Status == InvoiceStatus.Cancelled)
                return Result.Success();

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                // ����� �������
                foreach (var item in invoice.Items)
                {
                    var stock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                        invoice.WarehouseId,
                        item.ProductId,
                        cancellationToken);

                    if (stock is null)
                    {
                        stock = new WarehouseStock
                        {
                            WarehouseId = invoice.WarehouseId,
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            Quantity = 0m,
                            UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
                        };

                        await _warehouseStockRepository.AddAsync(stock, cancellationToken);
                    }

                    stock.Quantity += item.Quantity;
                    stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    await _inventoryMovementRepository.AddAsync(
                        new InventoryMovement
                        {
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            WarehouseId = invoice.WarehouseId,
                            MovementType = InventoryMovementType.SaleReturnIn,
                            ReferenceType = "SalesInvoiceCancel",
                            ReferenceId = invoice.SalesInvoiceId,
                            Quantity = item.Quantity,
                            UnitCost = item.UnitPrice,
                            MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow,
                            Notes = "Cancel sales invoice - stock returned",
                            CreatedByUserId = invoice.CreatedByUserId
                        },
                        cancellationToken);
                }

                // ��� ���� ������ ��� ��� ���� ���
                if (invoice.CustomerId.HasValue && invoice.DueAmount > 0m)
                {
                    var customer = await _customerRepository.GetByIdAsync(invoice.CustomerId.Value, cancellationToken);
                    if (customer is not null)
                    {
                        customer.CurrentBalance -= invoice.DueAmount;
                        if (customer.CurrentBalance < 0m)
                            customer.CurrentBalance = 0m;

                        customer.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                    }
                }

                invoice.Status = InvoiceStatus.Cancelled;
                invoice.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result.Success();
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<SalesSummaryDto>> GetSummaryAsync(
            SalesSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var summary = await _salesInvoiceRepository.GetSummaryAsync(
                request.From,
                request.To,
                request.WarehouseId,
                cancellationToken);

            return Result<SalesSummaryDto>.Success(summary);
        }
    }
}
```

# 1) ����� ����� ��� API

# 2) Base Controller ������� �� Result

��� �� ���� ��� `Ok / BadRequest` �� �� Controller� ����� Base Controller.

## `BaseApiController.cs`

```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [ApiController]
    public abstract class BaseApiController : ControllerBase
    {
        protected ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<T>> FromResult<T>(Result<T> result)
        {
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<T>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Unknown error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<T>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        protected ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>> FromResult(Result result)
        {
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Unknown error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Success"));
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 3) ProductsController

��� �� ��� Controller ������� ����:
- ��� CRUD
- ��� ���� �� �������
- ����� ������ ������ �� API ��� Database

## `ProductsController.cs`

```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/[controller]")]
    public class ProductsController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IProductService _productService;

        public ProductsController(IProductService productService)
        {
            _productService = productService;
        }

        // GET: api/products?pageNumber=1&pageSize=20&searchTerm=milk
        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _productService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        // GET: api/products/5
        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<ProductDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _productService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<ProductDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<ProductDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        // GET: api/products/lookup?searchTerm=milk
        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _productService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        // POST: api/products
        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _productService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Product created successfully"));
        }

        // PUT: api/products/5
        [HttpPut("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Update(
            int id,
            [FromBody] UpdateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _productService.UpdateAsync(id, request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Product updated successfully"));
        }

        // DELETE: api/products/5
        [HttpDelete("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Delete(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _productService.DeleteAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Product deleted successfully"));
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Sales;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/[controller]")]
    public class SalesController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ISalesService _salesService;

        public SalesController(ISalesService salesService)
        {
            _salesService = salesService;
        }

        // GET: api/sales?pageNumber=1&pageSize=20&searchTerm=sal
        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _salesService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        // GET: api/sales/5
        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<SalesInvoiceDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _salesService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<SalesInvoiceDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<SalesInvoiceDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        // POST: api/sales
        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _salesService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Sales invoice created successfully"));
        }

        // POST: api/sales/5/cancel
        [HttpPost("{id:int}/cancel")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Cancel(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _salesService.CancelAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Sales invoice cancelled successfully"));
        }

        // GET: api/sales/summary?from=2025-01-01&to=2025-01-31&warehouseId=1
        [HttpGet("summary")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<SalesSummaryDto>>> Summary(
            [FromQuery] SalesSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _salesService.GetSummaryAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<SalesSummaryDto>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<SalesSummaryDto>.Success(result.Data!));
        }
    }
}
```
