## `SalesSystem.Application/DependencyInjection.cs`

```csharp
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Mapping;
using SalesSystem.Application.Services;

namespace SalesSystem.Application
{
    public static class DependencyInjection
    {
        public static IServiceCollection AddApplication(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddAutoMapper(typeof(ProductMappingProfile).Assembly);

            services.AddScoped<IProductService, ProductService>();
            services.AddScoped<ISalesService, SalesService>();

            // ������:
            // services.AddScoped<ICategoryService, CategoryService>();
            // services.AddScoped<IUnitService, UnitService>();
            // services.AddScoped<IWarehouseService, WarehouseService>();
            // services.AddScoped<ICustomerService, CustomerService>();
            // services.AddScoped<ISupplierService, SupplierService>();
            // services.AddScoped<IPurchaseService, PurchaseService>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
```

# 7) Program.cs �� API

## `SalesSystem.Api/Program.cs`

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Application;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure;

var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);

builder.Services.AddControllers();

builder.Services.AddApplication();
builder.Services.AddInfrastructure(builder.Configuration);

builder.Services.AddEndpointsApiExplorer();
builder.Services.AddSwaggerGen();

var app = builder.Build();

if (app.Environment.IsDevelopment())
{
    app.UseSwagger();
    app.UseSwaggerUI();
}

app.UseAuthorization();

app.MapControllers();

app.Run();
```

# 3) `Program.cs` �� Desktop
��� ���� ��� �������� `Host` �Dependency Injection:

```csharp
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Products;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop
{
    internal static class Program
    {
        [STAThread]
        static void Main()
        {
            ApplicationConfiguration.Initialize();

            var host = Host.CreateDefaultBuilder()
                .ConfigureAppConfiguration((context, config) =>
                {
                    config.AddJsonFile("appsettings.json", optional: false, reloadOnChange: true);
                })
                .ConfigureServices((context, services) =>
                {
                    var baseUrl = context.Configuration["Api:BaseUrl"] ?? "http://localhost:5000/";

                    services.AddHttpClient<IProductApiService, ProductApiService>(client =>
                    {
                        client.BaseAddress = new Uri(baseUrl);
                    });

                    services.AddTransient<ProductsListControl>();
                    services.AddTransient<MainForm>();
                })
                .Build();

            var mainForm = host.Services.GetRequiredService<MainForm>();
            Application.Run(mainForm);
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface IProductApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>> LookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<ProductDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

# 5) ����� ������

## `ProductApiService.cs`
���� ��:
`SalesSystem.Desktop/Services/Api/ProductApiService.cs`

```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class ProductApiService : IProductApiService
    {
        private readonly HttpClient _httpClient;

        public ProductApiService(HttpClient httpClient)
        {
            _httpClient = httpClient;
        }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url =
                $"api/products?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}" +
                $"{BuildSearchQuery(request.SearchTerm)}";

            var response = await _httpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>> LookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/products/lookup{BuildSearchQuery(searchTerm)}";
            var response = await _httpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<ProductDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await _httpClient.GetAsync($"api/products/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<ProductDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await _httpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/products", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await _httpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/products/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
            _ = await ReadAsync<object?>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await _httpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/products/{id}", cancellationToken);
            _ = await ReadAsync<object?>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        private static string BuildSearchQuery(string? searchTerm)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
                return string.Empty;

            return $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";
        }

        private static async Task<T> ReadAsync<T>(HttpResponseMessage response, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var payload = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<T>>(cancellationToken: cancellationToken);

            if (payload is null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("���� �� ������� ����.");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode || !payload.IsSuccess)
                throw new InvalidOperationException(payload.Message ?? $"API Error: {response.StatusCode}");

            if (payload.Data is null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("�� ���� ������ �� ����.");

            return payload.Data;
        }

        private static async Task<T?> ReadNullableAsync<T>(HttpResponseMessage response, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var payload = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<T?>>(cancellationToken: cancellationToken);

            if (payload is null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("���� �� ������� ����.");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode || !payload.IsSuccess)
                throw new InvalidOperationException(payload.Message ?? $"API Error: {response.StatusCode}");

            return payload.Data;
        }
    }
}
```

# 6) UserControl ��������

## `ProductsListControl.cs`
���� ��:
`SalesSystem.Desktop/Controls/Products/ProductsListControl.cs`

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Products
{
    public class ProductsListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly IProductApiService _productApiService;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnEdit = null!;
        private Button btnDelete = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvProducts = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public ProductsListControl(IProductApiService productApiService)
        {
            _productApiService = productApiService;
            InitializeComponent();

            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadProductsAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            var topPanel = new Panel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 50,
                Padding = new Padding(8)
            };

            txtSearch = new TextBox
            {
                Width = 260,
                PlaceholderText = "���� ���� ������ �� �����..."
            };

            btnSearch = new Button
            {
                Text = "���",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadProductsAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 80,
                Left = 8
            };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                txtSearch.Clear();
                await LoadProductsAsync();
            };

            btnAdd = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnAdd.Click += (_, _) =>
            {
                MessageBox.Show("����� ProductEditorForm �� ������ �������.");
            };

            btnEdit = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnEdit.Click += (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedProductId();
                if (id is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                    return;
                }

                MessageBox.Show($"����� ���� ����� ������ ��� {id} �� ������ �������.");
            };

            btnDelete = new Button
            {
                Text = "���",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnDelete.Click += async (_, _) => await DeleteSelectedAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Right,
                Width = 280,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnDelete);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnEdit);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnAdd);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnRefresh);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSearch);

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvProducts = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ReadOnly = true,
                AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
                MultiSelect = false,
                AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvProducts.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvProducts.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedProductId();
                if (id is null) return;

                MessageBox.Show($"����� ���� ����� ������ ��� {id} �� ������ �������.");
            };

            lblStatus = new Label
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Bottom,
                Height = 24,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft,
                Padding = new Padding(8, 0, 0, 0),
                Text = "����"
            };

            Controls.Add(dgvProducts);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadProductsAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);

                var result = await _productApiService.GetPagedAsync(
                    new PagedQueryRequestDto
                    {
                        PageNumber = 1,
                        PageSize = 200,
                        SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text
                    });

                var list = result.Items.ToList();
                _bindingSource.DataSource = list;

                lblStatus.Text = $"��� ��������: {result.TotalCount}";
                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "��� ��� ����� ����� ��������";
            }
            finally
            {
                SetBusy(false);
            }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvProducts.Columns.Count == 0)
                return;

            HideIfExists("Description");
            HideIfExists("CreatedAt");
            HideIfExists("UpdatedAt");

            SetHeader("ProductId", "ID");
            SetHeader("Code", "�����");
            SetHeader("Barcode", "��������");
            SetHeader("Name", "�����");
            SetHeader("CategoryName", "�������");
            SetHeader("UnitName", "������");
            SetHeader("PurchasePrice", "��� ������");
            SetHeader("SalePrice", "��� �����");
            SetHeader("MinStock", "���� ������");
            SetHeader("IsActive", "���");
        }

        private void HideIfExists(string columnName)
        {
            if (dgvProducts.Columns.Contains(columnName))
                dgvProducts.Columns[columnName].Visible = false;
        }

        private void SetHeader(string columnName, string headerText)
        {
            if (dgvProducts.Columns.Contains(columnName))
                dgvProducts.Columns[columnName].HeaderText = headerText;
        }

        private int? GetSelectedProductId()
        {
            if (dgvProducts.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not ProductDto row)
                return null;

            return row.ProductId;
        }

        private async Task DeleteSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedProductId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                return;
            }

            var confirm = MessageBox.Show(
                "�� ���� ��� �����̿",
                "�����",
                MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                MessageBoxIcon.Question);

            if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes)
                return;

            try
            {
                await _productApiService.DeleteAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadProductsAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;

            btnSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnRefresh.Enabled = !busy;
            btnAdd.Enabled = !busy;
            btnEdit.Enabled = !busy;
            btnDelete.Enabled = !busy;
            txtSearch.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}
```

# 7) ������� ��� Control ���� `MainForm`

## `MainForm.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Products;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms
{
    public class MainForm : Form
    {
        private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;
        private Panel contentPanel = null!;

        public MainForm(IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
        {
            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;
            InitializeComponent();
            LoadProductsScreen();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = "Sales System";
            WindowState = FormWindowState.Maximized;

            contentPanel = new Panel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill
            };

            Controls.Add(contentPanel);
        }

        private void LoadProductsScreen()
        {
            contentPanel.Controls.Clear();

            var control = _serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<ProductsListControl>();
            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            contentPanel.Controls.Add(control);
        }
    }
}
```

��� ���ʡ ����� �� ������ �� ������� ������� ��:

# **ProductEditorForm ������**
��� ���� ����:
- �����
- �����
- ���
- ���
- ����� ����� ���� API.

�����.  
����� �� ���� **ProductEditorForm** ���� ���� ��� ��� ��� ���� **����� ��� ����** ���� ����� �� `ProductApiService` ��� �� ����� ��� ��� `Update` �`Delete`.

---

# 1) ����� ��� �� `ProductApiService`
�� ������ ������ɡ `UpdateAsync` �`DeleteAsync` ���� ������� ����� `Data` ��� �� ���� `null`� ���� �� ���� �����.

## ������ `UpdateAsync` �`DeleteAsync` ���� �����:

```csharp
public async Task UpdateAsync(
    int id,
    UpdateProductRequestDto request,
    CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
{
    var response = await _httpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/products/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
    await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
}

public async Task DeleteAsync(
    int id,
    CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
{
    var response = await _httpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/products/{id}", cancellationToken);
    await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
}

private static async Task EnsureSuccessAsync(HttpResponseMessage response, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
{
    if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
        return;

    var payload = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<object?>>(cancellationToken: cancellationToken);

    throw new InvalidOperationException(
        payload?.Message ?? $"API Error: {response.StatusCode}");
}
```

# 2) ProductEditorForm

## `ProductEditorForm.cs`

```csharp
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Products
{
    public class ProductEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly IProductApiService _productApiService;
        private readonly int? _productId;

        private readonly ErrorProvider _errorProvider = new();

        private TextBox txtCode = null!;
        private TextBox txtBarcode = null!;
        private TextBox txtName = null!;
        private TextBox txtDescription = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudPurchasePrice = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudSalePrice = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudMinStock = null!;
        private CheckBox chkIsActive = null!;
        private CheckBox chkUseCategory = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudCategoryId = null!;
        private CheckBox chkUseUnit = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudUnitId = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;
        private Label lblTitle = null!;

        public ProductEditorForm(IProductApiService productApiService, int? productId = null)
        {
            _productApiService = productApiService;
            _productId = productId;

            InitializeComponent();

            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadFormAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = _productId.HasValue ? "����� ����" : "����� ����";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            Size = new Size(800, 650);
            MinimumSize = new Size(750, 600);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;
            MaximizeBox = false;
            MinimizeBox = false;

            _errorProvider.BlinkStyle = ErrorBlinkStyle.NeverBlink;

            lblTitle = new Label
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 50,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleRight,
                Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 14, FontStyle.Bold),
                Padding = new Padding(10),
                Text = _productId.HasValue ? "����� ����" : "����� ���� ����"
            };

            var mainPanel = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Padding = new Padding(12),
                ColumnCount = 2,
                RowCount = 9,
                AutoSize = true
            };

            mainPanel.ColumnStyles.Add(new ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50));
            mainPanel.ColumnStyles.Add(new ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50));

            // Row 1: Code / Barcode
            txtCode = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "�����" };
            txtBarcode = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "��������" };

            // Row 2: Name
            txtName = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "��� ������" };

            // Row 3: Category / Unit
            chkUseCategory = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "����� �������",
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Checked = false
            };
            chkUseCategory.CheckedChanged += (_, _) => nudCategoryId.Enabled = chkUseCategory.Checked;

            nudCategoryId = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Minimum = 1,
                Maximum = 1000000,
                Enabled = false
            };

            chkUseUnit = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "����� ������",
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Checked = false
            };
            chkUseUnit.CheckedChanged += (_, _) => nudUnitId.Enabled = chkUseUnit.Checked;

            nudUnitId = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Minimum = 1,
                Maximum = 1000000,
                Enabled = false
            };

            // Row 4: Prices
            nudPurchasePrice = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                DecimalPlaces = 2,
                Minimum = 0,
                Maximum = 100000000,
                ThousandsSeparator = true
            };

            nudSalePrice = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                DecimalPlaces = 2,
                Minimum = 0,
                Maximum = 100000000,
                ThousandsSeparator = true
            };

            // Row 5: Min stock
            nudMinStock = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                DecimalPlaces = 3,
                Minimum = 0,
                Maximum = 100000000,
                ThousandsSeparator = true
            };

            // Row 6: Description
            txtDescription = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Multiline = true,
                Height = 100,
                ScrollBars = ScrollBars.Vertical,
                PlaceholderText = "�����"
            };

            // Row 7: Active
            chkIsActive = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "���",
                Checked = true,
                Dock = DockStyle.Left
            };

            // Buttons
            btnSave = new Button
            {
                Text = "���",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 36
            };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 36,
                DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel
            };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false,
                AutoSize = true
            };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            // Add labeled rows
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl("�����:", txtCode), 0, 0);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(CreateLabeledControl("�����:", txtCode), 1);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl("��������:", txtBarcode), 1, 0);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl("��� ������:", txtName), 0, 1);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(mainPanel.GetControlFromPosition(0, 1), 2);

            var categoryPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            categoryPanel.Controls.Add(nudCategoryId);
            categoryPanel.Controls.Add(chkUseCategory);
            chkUseCategory.Dock = DockStyle.Top;
            nudCategoryId.Dock = DockStyle.Bottom;

            var unitPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            unitPanel.Controls.Add(nudUnitId);
            unitPanel.Controls.Add(chkUseUnit);
            chkUseUnit.Dock = DockStyle.Top;
            nudUnitId.Dock = DockStyle.Bottom;

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateDualPanel("�������:", categoryPanel, "������:", unitPanel), 0, 2);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(mainPanel.GetControlFromPosition(0, 2), 2);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateDualPanel("��� ������:", nudPurchasePrice, "��� �����:", nudSalePrice), 0, 3);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(mainPanel.GetControlFromPosition(0, 3), 2);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl("���� ������ �������:", nudMinStock), 0, 4);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(mainPanel.GetControlFromPosition(0, 4), 2);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl("�����:", txtDescription), 0, 5);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(mainPanel.GetControlFromPosition(0, 5), 2);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(chkIsActive, 0, 6);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(chkIsActive, 2);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel, 0, 7);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(buttonsPanel, 2);

            Controls.Add(mainPanel);
            Controls.Add(lblTitle);

            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;
        }

        private Panel CreateLabeledControl(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, Height = 60 };

            var label = new Label
            {
                Text = labelText,
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 22,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleRight
            };

            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);

            return panel;
        }

        private Panel CreateDualPanel(
            string labelText1, Control control1,
            string labelText2, Control control2)
        {
            var panel = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ColumnCount = 2,
                RowCount = 1
            };

            panel.ColumnStyles.Add(new ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50));
            panel.ColumnStyles.Add(new ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50));

            panel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl(labelText1, control1), 0, 0);
            panel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl(labelText2, control2), 1, 0);

            return panel;
        }

        private async Task LoadFormAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                if (!_productId.HasValue)
                    return;

                UseWaitCursor = true;

                var product = await _productApiService.GetByIdAsync(_productId.Value);
                if (product is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("������ ��� �����.", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                    Close();
                    return;
                }

                FillForm(product);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                Close();
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
            }
        }

        private void FillForm(ProductDto product)
        {
            txtCode.Text = product.Code ?? string.Empty;
            txtBarcode.Text = product.Barcode ?? string.Empty;
            txtName.Text = product.Name;
            txtDescription.Text = product.Description ?? string.Empty;
            nudPurchasePrice.Value = product.PurchasePrice;
            nudSalePrice.Value = product.SalePrice;
            nudMinStock.Value = product.MinStock;
            chkIsActive.Checked = product.IsActive;

            chkUseCategory.Checked = product.CategoryId.HasValue;
            if (product.CategoryId.HasValue)
                nudCategoryId.Value = product.CategoryId.Value;

            chkUseUnit.Checked = product.UnitId.HasValue;
            if (product.UnitId.HasValue)
                nudUnitId.Value = product.UnitId.Value;
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (!ValidateForm())
                return;

            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                btnSave.Enabled = false;

                if (_productId.HasValue)
                {
                    var request = BuildUpdateRequest();
                    await _productApiService.UpdateAsync(_productId.Value, request);
                    MessageBox.Show("�� ����� ������ �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }
                else
                {
                    var request = BuildCreateRequest();
                    await _productApiService.CreateAsync(request);
                    MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ������ �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }

                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
                btnSave.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        private bool ValidateForm()
        {
            _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, string.Empty);
            _errorProvider.SetError(nudCategoryId, string.Empty);
            _errorProvider.SetError(nudUnitId, string.Empty);

            bool valid = true;

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtName.Text))
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, "��� ������ �����.");
                valid = false;
            }

            if (chkUseCategory.Checked && nudCategoryId.Value <= 0)
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(nudCategoryId, "��� ������� ��� ����.");
                valid = false;
            }

            if (chkUseUnit.Checked && nudUnitId.Value <= 0)
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(nudUnitId, "��� ������ ��� ����.");
                valid = false;
            }

            return valid;
        }

        private CreateProductRequestDto BuildCreateRequest()
        {
            return new CreateProductRequestDto
            {
                Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text),
                Barcode = TrimToNull(txtBarcode.Text),
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                CategoryId = chkUseCategory.Checked ? (int?)nudCategoryId.Value : null,
                UnitId = chkUseUnit.Checked ? (int?)nudUnitId.Value : null,
                PurchasePrice = nudPurchasePrice.Value,
                SalePrice = nudSalePrice.Value,
                MinStock = nudMinStock.Value,
                Description = TrimToNull(txtDescription.Text),
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private UpdateProductRequestDto BuildUpdateRequest()
        {
            return new UpdateProductRequestDto
            {
                Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text),
                Barcode = TrimToNull(txtBarcode.Text),
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                CategoryId = chkUseCategory.Checked ? (int?)nudCategoryId.Value : null,
                UnitId = chkUseUnit.Checked ? (int?)nudUnitId.Value : null,
                PurchasePrice = nudPurchasePrice.Value,
                SalePrice = nudSalePrice.Value,
                MinStock = nudMinStock.Value,
                Description = TrimToNull(txtDescription.Text),
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

## ���� ��� ������ ���� `ProductsListControl`:

```csharp
private async Task OpenEditorAsync(int? productId)
{
    using var form = new ProductEditorForm(_productApiService, productId);

    var owner = FindForm();
    var result = owner is not null
        ? form.ShowDialog(owner)
        : form.ShowDialog();

    if (result == DialogResult.OK)
        await LoadProductsAsync();
}
```

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence
{
    public interface IUnitRepository
    {
        Task<IReadOnlyList<Unit>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

# 4) Application Services

## `CategoryService.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class CategoryService : ICategoryService
    {
        private readonly ICategoryRepository _repository;

        public CategoryService(ICategoryRepository repository)
        {
            _repository = repository;
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            var result = items
                .Select(x => new CategoryLookupDto
                {
                    CategoryId = x.CategoryId,
                    Name = x.Name
                })
                .ToList()
                .AsReadOnly();

            return Result<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>.Success(result);
        }
    }
}
```

## `UnitService.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Units;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class UnitService : IUnitService
    {
        private readonly IUnitRepository _repository;

        public UnitService(IUnitRepository repository)
        {
            _repository = repository;
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            var result = items
                .Select(x => new UnitLookupDto
                {
                    UnitId = x.UnitId,
                    Name = x.Name,
                    Symbol = x.Symbol
                })
                .ToList()
                .AsReadOnly();

            return Result<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>.Success(result);
        }
    }
}
```

# 5) Infrastructure Repositories

## `CategoryRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class CategoryRepository : ICategoryRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public CategoryRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Category>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Categories
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Where(x => x.IsActive)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x => x.Name.Contains(searchTerm));
            }

            return await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `UnitRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class UnitRepository : IUnitRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public UnitRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Unit>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Units
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Where(x => x.IsActive)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x => x.Name.Contains(searchTerm));
            }

            return await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

# 6) API Controllers

## `CategoriesController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/categories")]
    public class CategoriesController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ICategoryService _categoryService;

        public CategoriesController(ICategoryService categoryService)
        {
            _categoryService = categoryService;
        }

        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _categoryService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }
    }
}
```

## `UnitsController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Units;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/units")]
    public class UnitsController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IUnitService _unitService;

        public UnitsController(IUnitService unitService)
        {
            _unitService = unitService;
        }

        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _unitService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }
    }
}
```

# 8) Desktop API Services

���� ��� ��� �� ���� **Service Base** ������ ���������.

## `ApiServiceBase.cs`
```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public abstract class ApiServiceBase
    {
        protected readonly HttpClient HttpClient;

        protected ApiServiceBase(HttpClient httpClient)
        {
            HttpClient = httpClient;
        }

        protected static string BuildSearchQuery(string? searchTerm)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
                return string.Empty;

            return $"?searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";
        }

        protected static async Task<T> ReadAsync<T>(HttpResponseMessage response, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var payload = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<T>>(cancellationToken: cancellationToken);

            if (payload is null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("���� �� ������� ����.");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode || !payload.IsSuccess)
                throw new InvalidOperationException(payload.Message ?? $"API Error: {response.StatusCode}");

            if (payload.Data is null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("�� ���� ������ �� ����.");

            return payload.Data;
        }

        protected static async Task EnsureSuccessAsync(HttpResponseMessage response, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
                return;

            var payload = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<object?>>(cancellationToken: cancellationToken);
            throw new InvalidOperationException(payload?.Message ?? $"API Error: {response.StatusCode}");
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class CategoryApiService : ApiServiceBase, ICategoryApiService
    {
        public CategoryApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient) { }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/categories/lookup{BuildSearchQuery(searchTerm)}";
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
private async Task OpenEditorAsync(int? productId)
{
    using var form = new ProductEditorForm(
        _productApiService,
        _categoryApiService,
        _unitApiService,
        productId);

    var owner = FindForm();
    var result = owner is not null
        ? form.ShowDialog(owner)
        : form.ShowDialog();

    if (result == DialogResult.OK)
        await LoadProductsAsync();
}
```

## ��� ���� ����� ��� lookup
```csharp
private async Task LoadLookupsAsync()
{
    var categoriesTask = _categoryApiService.GetLookupAsync();
    var unitsTask = _unitApiService.GetLookupAsync();

    await Task.WhenAll(categoriesTask, unitsTask);

    _categories = categoriesTask.Result.ToList();
    _units = unitsTask.Result.ToList();

    _categories.Insert(0, new CategoryLookupDto
    {
        CategoryId = 0,
        Name = "-- ���� ����� --"
    });

    _units.Insert(0, new UnitLookupDto
    {
        UnitId = 0,
        Name = "-- ���� ���� --"
    });

    cmbCategory.DataSource = _categories;
    cmbCategory.DisplayMember = nameof(CategoryLookupDto.Name);
    cmbCategory.ValueMember = nameof(CategoryLookupDto.CategoryId);

    cmbUnit.DataSource = _units;
    cmbUnit.DisplayMember = nameof(UnitLookupDto.Name);
    cmbUnit.ValueMember = nameof(UnitLookupDto.UnitId);
}
```

---

## ���� `LoadFormAsync()`
```csharp
private async Task LoadFormAsync()
{
    try
    {
        UseWaitCursor = true;

        await LoadLookupsAsync();

        if (!_productId.HasValue)
            return;

        var product = await _productApiService.GetByIdAsync(_productId.Value);
        if (product is null)
        {
            MessageBox.Show("������ ��� �����.", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
            Close();
            return;
        }

        FillForm(product);
    }
    catch (Exception ex)
    {
        MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
        Close();
    }
    finally
    {
        UseWaitCursor = false;
    }
}
```

---

## ���� `FillForm(...)`
```csharp
private void FillForm(ProductDto product)
{
    txtCode.Text = product.Code ?? string.Empty;
    txtBarcode.Text = product.Barcode ?? string.Empty;
    txtName.Text = product.Name;
    txtDescription.Text = product.Description ?? string.Empty;
    nudPurchasePrice.Value = product.PurchasePrice;
    nudSalePrice.Value = product.SalePrice;
    nudMinStock.Value = product.MinStock;
    chkIsActive.Checked = product.IsActive;

    cmbCategory.SelectedValue = product.CategoryId ?? 0;
    cmbUnit.SelectedValue = product.UnitId ?? 0;
}
```

---

## ���� ���� �����
```csharp
private CreateProductRequestDto BuildCreateRequest()
{
    return new CreateProductRequestDto
    {
        Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text),
        Barcode = TrimToNull(txtBarcode.Text),
        Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
        CategoryId = GetSelectedCategoryId(),
        UnitId = GetSelectedUnitId(),
        PurchasePrice = nudPurchasePrice.Value,
        SalePrice = nudSalePrice.Value,
        MinStock = nudMinStock.Value,
        Description = TrimToNull(txtDescription.Text),
        IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
    };
}

private UpdateProductRequestDto BuildUpdateRequest()
{
    return new UpdateProductRequestDto
    {
        Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text),
        Barcode = TrimToNull(txtBarcode.Text),
        Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
        CategoryId = GetSelectedCategoryId(),
        UnitId = GetSelectedUnitId(),
        PurchasePrice = nudPurchasePrice.Value,
        SalePrice = nudSalePrice.Value,
        MinStock = nudMinStock.Value,
        Description = TrimToNull(txtDescription.Text),
        IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
    };
}
```

## ��� ��� ������ ��������
```csharp
private int? GetSelectedCategoryId()
{
    if (cmbCategory.SelectedValue is int id && id > 0)
        return id;

    return null;
}

private int? GetSelectedUnitId()
{
    if (cmbUnit.SelectedValue is int id && id > 0)
        return id;

    return null;
}
```

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence

    public interface ICategoryRepository
    {
        Task<(IReadOnlyList<Category> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<Category>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Category?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task AddAsync(
            Category entity,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<bool> ExistsByNameAsync(
            string name,
            int? excludeCategoryId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

```csharp
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result<CategoryDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result> UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

            int id,

}
```

## `CategoryMappingProfile.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class CategoryMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public CategoryMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<Category, CategoryDto>();

            CreateMap<Category, CategoryLookupDto>();

            CreateMap<CreateCategoryRequestDto, Category>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CategoryId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Products, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<UpdateCategoryRequestDto, Category>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CategoryId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Products, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());
        }
    }
}
```

---

## `CategoryService.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class CategoryService : ICategoryService
    {
        private readonly ICategoryRepository _repository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public CategoryService(
            ICategoryRepository repository,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _repository = repository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _repository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var dtoItems = _mapper.Map<List<CategoryDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>.Success(
                new PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>
                {
                    Items = dtoItems,
                    TotalCount = totalCount,
                    PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                    PageSize = request.PageSize
                });
        }

        public async Task<Result<CategoryDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result<CategoryDto?>.Failure("Category not found.");

            return Result<CategoryDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<CategoryDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var name = Normalize(request.Name);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Category name is required.");

            if (await _repository.ExistsByNameAsync(name, null, cancellationToken))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Category name already exists.");

            var entity = _mapper.Map<Category>(request);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Description = Normalize(request.Description);
            entity.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
            entity.UpdatedAt = null;

            await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result<int>.Success(entity.CategoryId);
        }

        public async Task<Result> UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Category not found.");

            var name = Normalize(request.Name);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result.Failure("Category name is required.");

            if (await _repository.ExistsByNameAsync(name, id, cancellationToken))
                return Result.Failure("Category name already exists.");

            _mapper.Map(request, entity);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Description = Normalize(request.Description);
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result> DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Category not found.");

            entity.IsActive = false;
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);
            var dto = _mapper.Map<List<CategoryLookupDto>>(items).AsReadOnly();

            return Result<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>.Success(dto);
        }

        private static string? Normalize(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

# 3) Infrastructure

���� ��:

```text

```

---

## `CategoryRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class CategoryRepository : ICategoryRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public CategoryRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<Category> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Categories
                .AsNoTracking()
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();

                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Description != null && x.Description.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);

            var items = await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Category>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Categories
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Where(x => x.IsActive)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();

                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm));
            }

            return await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<Category?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.Categories
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.CategoryId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(
            Category entity,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.Categories.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        }

        public Task<bool> ExistsByNameAsync(
            string name,
            int? excludeCategoryId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Categories
                .AsQueryable()
                .Where(x => x.Name == name);

            if (excludeCategoryId.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.CategoryId != excludeCategoryId.Value);

            return query.AnyAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `CategoriesController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/categories")]
    public class CategoriesController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ICategoryService _categoryService;

        public CategoriesController(ICategoryService categoryService)
        {
            _categoryService = categoryService;
        }

        // GET: api/categories?pageNumber=1&pageSize=20&searchTerm=food
        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _categoryService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        // GET: api/categories/5
        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<CategoryDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _categoryService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<CategoryDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<CategoryDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        // GET: api/categories/lookup?searchTerm=food
        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _categoryService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        // POST: api/categories
        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _categoryService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Category created successfully"));
        }

        // PUT: api/categories/5
        [HttpPut("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Update(
            int id,
            [FromBody] UpdateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _categoryService.UpdateAsync(id, request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Category updated successfully"));
        }

        // DELETE: api/categories/5
        [HttpDelete("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Delete(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _categoryService.DeleteAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Category deleted successfully"));
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface ICategoryApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<CategoryDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

---

## `CategoryApiService.cs`
```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class CategoryApiService : ApiServiceBase, ICategoryApiService
    {
        public CategoryApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient)
        {
        }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url =
                $"api/categories?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}" +
                BuildSearchQuerySuffix(request.SearchTerm);

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/categories/lookup{BuildSearchQuery(searchTerm)}";
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<CategoryDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/categories/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<CategoryDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/categories", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/categories/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/categories/{id}", cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        private static string BuildSearchQuerySuffix(string? searchTerm)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
                return string.Empty;

            return $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Categories
{
    public class CategoriesListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly ICategoryApiService _categoryApiService;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnEdit = null!;
        private Button btnDelete = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvCategories = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public CategoriesListControl(ICategoryApiService categoryApiService)
        {
            _categoryApiService = categoryApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadCategoriesAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            var topPanel = new Panel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 50,
                Padding = new Padding(8)
            };

            txtSearch = new TextBox
            {
                Width = 260,
                PlaceholderText = "���� ���� �������..."
            };

            btnSearch = new Button
            {
                Text = "���",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadCategoriesAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                txtSearch.Clear();
                await LoadCategoriesAsync();
            };

            btnAdd = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync(null);

            btnEdit = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnEdit.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedCategoryId();
                if (id is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("���� ������� �����.");
                    return;
                }

                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            btnDelete = new Button
            {
                Text = "���",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnDelete.Click += async (_, _) => await DeleteSelectedAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Right,
                Width = 360,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                WrapContents = false
            };

            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnDelete);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnEdit);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnAdd);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnRefresh);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSearch);

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvCategories = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ReadOnly = true,
                AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
                MultiSelect = false,
                AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvCategories.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvCategories.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedCategoryId();
                if (id is null) return;

                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            lblStatus = new Label
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Bottom,
                Height = 24,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft,
                Padding = new Padding(8, 0, 0, 0),
                Text = "����"
            };

            Controls.Add(dgvCategories);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadCategoriesAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);

                var result = await _categoryApiService.GetPagedAsync(
                    new PagedQueryRequestDto
                    {
                        PageNumber = 1,
                        PageSize = 200,
                        SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text
                    });

                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"��� ���������: {result.TotalCount}";

                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "��� ��� ����� ����� ���������";
            }
            finally
            {
                SetBusy(false);
            }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Count == 0)
                return;

            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Contains("Description"))
                dgvCategories.Columns["Description"].Visible = false;

            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Contains("CreatedAt"))
                dgvCategories.Columns["CreatedAt"].Visible = false;

            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Contains("UpdatedAt"))
                dgvCategories.Columns["UpdatedAt"].Visible = false;

            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Contains("CategoryId"))
                dgvCategories.Columns["CategoryId"].HeaderText = "ID";

            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Contains("Name"))
                dgvCategories.Columns["Name"].HeaderText = "�����";

            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Contains("IsActive"))
                dgvCategories.Columns["IsActive"].HeaderText = "���";
        }

        private int? GetSelectedCategoryId()
        {
            if (dgvCategories.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not CategoryDto row)
                return null;

            return row.CategoryId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync(int? categoryId)
        {
            using var form = new CategoryEditorForm(_categoryApiService, categoryId);

            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();

            if (result == DialogResult.OK)
                await LoadCategoriesAsync();
        }

        private async Task DeleteSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedCategoryId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������� �����.");
                return;
            }

            var confirm = MessageBox.Show(
                "�� ���� ��� ������ݿ",
                "�����",
                MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                MessageBoxIcon.Question);

            if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes)
                return;

            try
            {
                await _categoryApiService.DeleteAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadCategoriesAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;

            txtSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnRefresh.Enabled = !busy;
            btnAdd.Enabled = !busy;
            btnEdit.Enabled = !busy;
            btnDelete.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}
```
