## `CategoryEditorForm.cs`
```csharp
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Categories
{
    public class CategoryEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly ICategoryApiService _categoryApiService;
        private readonly int? _categoryId;

        private readonly ErrorProvider _errorProvider = new();

        private TextBox txtName = null!;
        private TextBox txtDescription = null!;
        private CheckBox chkIsActive = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;

        public CategoryEditorForm(
            ICategoryApiService categoryApiService,
            int? categoryId = null)
        {
            _categoryApiService = categoryApiService;
            _categoryId = categoryId;

            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadFormAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = _categoryId.HasValue ? "����� �����" : "����� �����";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            Size = new Size(600, 350);
            MinimumSize = new Size(550, 320);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;
            MaximizeBox = false;
            MinimizeBox = false;

            _errorProvider.BlinkStyle = ErrorBlinkStyle.NeverBlink;

            var mainPanel = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Padding = new Padding(12),
                ColumnCount = 1,
                RowCount = 4
            };

            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 75));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 40));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 50));

            txtName = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                PlaceholderText = "��� �������"
            };

            txtDescription = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Multiline = true,
                ScrollBars = ScrollBars.Vertical,
                PlaceholderText = "�����"
            };

            chkIsActive = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "���",
                Checked = true,
                Dock = DockStyle.Left
            };

            btnSave = new Button
            {
                Text = "���",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 35
            };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 35,
                DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel
            };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("��� �������:", txtName), 0, 0);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("�����:", txtDescription), 0, 1);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(chkIsActive, 0, 2);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel, 0, 3);

            Controls.Add(mainPanel);

            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;
        }

        private Panel CreateLabeledPanel(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };

            var label = new Label
            {
                Text = labelText,
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 22,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleRight
            };

            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);

            return panel;
        }

        private async Task LoadFormAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                if (!_categoryId.HasValue)
                    return;

                UseWaitCursor = true;

                var category = await _categoryApiService.GetByIdAsync(_categoryId.Value);

                if (category is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("������� ��� �����.", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                    Close();
                    return;
                }

                txtName.Text = category.Name;
                txtDescription.Text = category.Description ?? string.Empty;
                chkIsActive.Checked = category.IsActive;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                Close();
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
            }
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (!ValidateForm())
                return;

            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                btnSave.Enabled = false;

                if (_categoryId.HasValue)
                {
                    var request = BuildUpdateRequest();
                    await _categoryApiService.UpdateAsync(_categoryId.Value, request);
                    MessageBox.Show("�� ����� ������� �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }
                else
                {
                    var request = BuildCreateRequest();
                    await _categoryApiService.CreateAsync(request);
                    MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ������� �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }

                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
                btnSave.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        private bool ValidateForm()
        {
            _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, string.Empty);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtName.Text))
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, "��� ������� �����.");
                return false;
            }

            return true;
        }

        private CreateCategoryRequestDto BuildCreateRequest()
        {
            return new CreateCategoryRequestDto
            {
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                Description = TrimToNull(txtDescription.Text),
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private UpdateCategoryRequestDto BuildUpdateRequest()
        {
            return new UpdateCategoryRequestDto
            {
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                Description = TrimToNull(txtDescription.Text),
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
    {
        public int CategoryId { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Description { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; }
        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? UpdatedAt { get; set; }
    }
}
```

```csharp
        [MaxLength(100)]
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [MaxLength(250)]
        public string? Description { get; set; }

        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;

}
```

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence
{
    public interface ICategoryRepository
    {
        Task<(IReadOnlyList<Category> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<Category>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Category?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task AddAsync(
            Category entity,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<bool> ExistsByNameAsync(
            string name,
            int? excludeCategoryId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

## `ICategoryService.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services
{
    public interface ICategoryService
    {
        Task<Result<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result<CategoryDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result> UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result> DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

## `CategoryMappingProfile.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class CategoryMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public CategoryMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<Category, CategoryDto>();
            CreateMap<Category, CategoryLookupDto>();

            CreateMap<CreateCategoryRequestDto, Category>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CategoryId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Products, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<UpdateCategoryRequestDto, Category>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CategoryId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Products, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());
        }
    }
}
```

## `CategoryService.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class CategoryService : ICategoryService
    {
        private readonly ICategoryRepository _repository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public CategoryService(
            ICategoryRepository repository,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _repository = repository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _repository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var dtoItems = _mapper.Map<List<CategoryDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>.Success(
                new PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>
                {
                    Items = dtoItems,
                    TotalCount = totalCount,
                    PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                    PageSize = request.PageSize
                });
        }

        public async Task<Result<CategoryDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result<CategoryDto?>.Failure("Category not found.");

            return Result<CategoryDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<CategoryDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var name = Normalize(request.Name);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Category name is required.");

            if (await _repository.ExistsByNameAsync(name, null, cancellationToken))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Category name already exists.");

            var entity = _mapper.Map<Category>(request);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Description = Normalize(request.Description);
            entity.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
            entity.UpdatedAt = null;

            await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result<int>.Success(entity.CategoryId);
        }

        public async Task<Result> UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Category not found.");

            var name = Normalize(request.Name);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result.Failure("Category name is required.");

            if (await _repository.ExistsByNameAsync(name, id, cancellationToken))
                return Result.Failure("Category name already exists.");

            _mapper.Map(request, entity);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Description = Normalize(request.Description);
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result> DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Category not found.");

            entity.IsActive = false;
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);
            var dto = _mapper.Map<List<CategoryLookupDto>>(items).AsReadOnly();

            return Result<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>.Success(dto);
        }

        private static string? Normalize(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 4) Infrastructure Layer

## `CategoryRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class CategoryRepository : ICategoryRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public CategoryRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<Category> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Categories
                .AsNoTracking()
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();

                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Description != null && x.Description.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);

            var items = await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Category>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Categories
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Where(x => x.IsActive)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x => x.Name.Contains(searchTerm));
            }

            return await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<Category?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.Categories
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.CategoryId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(
            Category entity,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.Categories.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        }

        public Task<bool> ExistsByNameAsync(
            string name,
            int? excludeCategoryId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Categories
                .AsQueryable()
                .Where(x => x.Name == name);

            if (excludeCategoryId.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.CategoryId != excludeCategoryId.Value);

            return query.AnyAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

> ��� �� ��� `CategoryConfiguration` ������ ���� �� ������ ��� ����ǡ ������ ������� ���� Fluent API �������� ������ ���.

---

# 5) API Layer

## `CategoriesController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/categories")]
    public class CategoriesController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ICategoryService _categoryService;

        public CategoriesController(ICategoryService categoryService)
        {
            _categoryService = categoryService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _categoryService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<CategoryDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _categoryService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<CategoryDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<CategoryDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _categoryService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _categoryService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Category created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPut("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Update(
            int id,
            [FromBody] UpdateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _categoryService.UpdateAsync(id, request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Category updated successfully"));
        }

        [HttpDelete("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Delete(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _categoryService.DeleteAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Category deleted successfully"));
        }
    }
}
```

# 6) Desktop Layer

## `ICategoryApiService.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface ICategoryApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<CategoryDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

## `CategoryApiService.cs`
```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class CategoryApiService : ApiServiceBase, ICategoryApiService
    {
        public CategoryApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient)
        {
        }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/categories?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm))
                url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<CategoryDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = "api/categories/lookup";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
                url += $"?searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<CategoryDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/categories/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<CategoryDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/categories", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCategoryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/categories/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/categories/{id}", cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `CategoriesListControl.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Categories
{
    public class CategoriesListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly ICategoryApiService _categoryApiService;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnEdit = null!;
        private Button btnDelete = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvCategories = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public CategoriesListControl(ICategoryApiService categoryApiService)
        {
            _categoryApiService = categoryApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadCategoriesAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            var topPanel = new Panel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 50,
                Padding = new Padding(8)
            };

            txtSearch = new TextBox
            {
                Width = 260,
                PlaceholderText = "���� ���� �������..."
            };

            btnSearch = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadCategoriesAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                txtSearch.Clear();
                await LoadCategoriesAsync();
            };

            btnAdd = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync(null);

            btnEdit = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnEdit.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedCategoryId();
                if (id is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("���� ������� �����.");
                    return;
                }

                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            btnDelete = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnDelete.Click += async (_, _) => await DeleteSelectedAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Right,
                Width = 360,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                WrapContents = false
            };

            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnDelete);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnEdit);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnAdd);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnRefresh);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSearch);

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };

            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvCategories = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ReadOnly = true,
                AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
                MultiSelect = false,
                AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvCategories.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvCategories.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedCategoryId();
                if (id is null) return;

                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            lblStatus = new Label
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Bottom,
                Height = 24,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft,
                Padding = new Padding(8, 0, 0, 0),
                Text = "����"
            };

            Controls.Add(dgvCategories);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadCategoriesAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);

                var result = await _categoryApiService.GetPagedAsync(
                    new PagedQueryRequestDto
                    {
                        PageNumber = 1,
                        PageSize = 200,
                        SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text
                    });

                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"��� ���������: {result.TotalCount}";

                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "��� ��� ����� ����� ���������";
            }
            finally
            {
                SetBusy(false);
            }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Count == 0)
                return;

            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Contains("Description"))
                dgvCategories.Columns["Description"].Visible = false;

            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Contains("CreatedAt"))
                dgvCategories.Columns["CreatedAt"].Visible = false;

            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Contains("UpdatedAt"))
                dgvCategories.Columns["UpdatedAt"].Visible = false;

            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Contains("CategoryId"))
                dgvCategories.Columns["CategoryId"].HeaderText = "ID";

            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Contains("Name"))
                dgvCategories.Columns["Name"].HeaderText = "�����";

            if (dgvCategories.Columns.Contains("IsActive"))
                dgvCategories.Columns["IsActive"].HeaderText = "���";
        }

        private int? GetSelectedCategoryId()
        {
            if (dgvCategories.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not CategoryDto row)
                return null;

            return row.CategoryId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync(int? categoryId)
        {
            using var form = new CategoryEditorForm(_categoryApiService, categoryId);

            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();

            if (result == DialogResult.OK)
                await LoadCategoriesAsync();
        }

        private async Task DeleteSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedCategoryId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������� �����.");
                return;
            }

            var confirm = MessageBox.Show(
                "�� ���� ��� ������ݿ",
                "�����",
                MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                MessageBoxIcon.Question);

            if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes)
                return;

            try
            {
                await _categoryApiService.DeleteAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadCategoriesAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;

            txtSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnRefresh.Enabled = !busy;
            btnAdd.Enabled = !busy;
            btnEdit.Enabled = !busy;
            btnDelete.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}
```

## `CategoryEditorForm.cs`
```csharp
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Categories
{
    public class CategoryEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly ICategoryApiService _categoryApiService;
        private readonly int? _categoryId;

        private readonly ErrorProvider _errorProvider = new();

        private TextBox txtName = null!;
        private TextBox txtDescription = null!;
        private CheckBox chkIsActive = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;

        public CategoryEditorForm(
            ICategoryApiService categoryApiService,
            int? categoryId = null)
        {
            _categoryApiService = categoryApiService;
            _categoryId = categoryId;

            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadFormAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = _categoryId.HasValue ? "����� �����" : "����� �����";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            Size = new Size(600, 350);
            MinimumSize = new Size(550, 320);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;
            MaximizeBox = false;
            MinimizeBox = false;

            _errorProvider.BlinkStyle = ErrorBlinkStyle.NeverBlink;

            var mainPanel = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Padding = new Padding(12),
                ColumnCount = 1,
                RowCount = 4
            };

            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 75));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 40));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 50));

            txtName = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                PlaceholderText = "��� �������"
            };

            txtDescription = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Multiline = true,
                ScrollBars = ScrollBars.Vertical,
                PlaceholderText = "�����"
            };

            chkIsActive = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "���",
                Checked = true,
                Dock = DockStyle.Left
            };

            btnSave = new Button
            {
                Text = "���",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 35
            };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 35,
                DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel
            };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("��� �������:", txtName), 0, 0);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("�����:", txtDescription), 0, 1);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(chkIsActive, 0, 2);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel, 0, 3);

            Controls.Add(mainPanel);

            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;
        }

        private Panel CreateLabeledPanel(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };

            var label = new Label
            {
                Text = labelText,
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 22,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleRight
            };

            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);

            return panel;
        }

        private async Task LoadFormAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                if (!_categoryId.HasValue)
                    return;

                UseWaitCursor = true;

                var category = await _categoryApiService.GetByIdAsync(_categoryId.Value);

                if (category is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("������� ��� �����.", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                    Close();
                    return;
                }

                txtName.Text = category.Name;
                txtDescription.Text = category.Description ?? string.Empty;
                chkIsActive.Checked = category.IsActive;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                Close();
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
            }
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (!ValidateForm())
                return;

            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                btnSave.Enabled = false;

                if (_categoryId.HasValue)
                {
                    var request = BuildUpdateRequest();
                    await _categoryApiService.UpdateAsync(_categoryId.Value, request);
                    MessageBox.Show("�� ����� ������� �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }
                else
                {
                    var request = BuildCreateRequest();
                    await _categoryApiService.CreateAsync(request);
                    MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ������� �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }

                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
                btnSave.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        private bool ValidateForm()
        {
            _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, string.Empty);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtName.Text))
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, "��� ������� �����.");
                return false;
            }

            return true;
        }

        private CreateCategoryRequestDto BuildCreateRequest()
        {
            return new CreateCategoryRequestDto
            {
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                Description = TrimToNull(txtDescription.Text),
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private UpdateCategoryRequestDto BuildUpdateRequest()
        {
            return new UpdateCategoryRequestDto
            {
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                Description = TrimToNull(txtDescription.Text),
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence

    public interface IUnitRepository
    {
        Task<(IReadOnlyList<Unit> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<Unit>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Unit?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task AddAsync(
            Unit entity,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<bool> ExistsByNameAsync(
            string name,
            int? excludeUnitId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

## `UnitMappingProfile.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Units;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class UnitMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public UnitMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<Unit, UnitDto>();
            CreateMap<Unit, UnitLookupDto>();

            CreateMap<CreateUnitRequestDto, Unit>()
                .ForMember(d => d.UnitId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Products, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<UpdateUnitRequestDto, Unit>()
                .ForMember(d => d.UnitId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Products, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());
        }
    }
}
```

## `UnitService.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Units;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class UnitService : IUnitService
    {
        private readonly IUnitRepository _repository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public UnitService(
            IUnitRepository repository,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _repository = repository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<UnitDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _repository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var dtoItems = _mapper.Map<List<UnitDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<UnitDto>>.Success(
                new PagedResultDto<UnitDto>
                {
                    Items = dtoItems,
                    TotalCount = totalCount,
                    PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                    PageSize = request.PageSize
                });
        }

        public async Task<Result<UnitDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result<UnitDto?>.Failure("Unit not found.");

            return Result<UnitDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<UnitDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateUnitRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var symbol = Normalize(request.Symbol);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Unit name is required.");

            if (await _repository.ExistsByNameAsync(name, null, cancellationToken))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Unit name already exists.");

            var entity = _mapper.Map<Unit>(request);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Symbol = symbol;
            entity.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result<int>.Success(entity.UnitId);
        }

        public async Task<Result> UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateUnitRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Unit not found.");

            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var symbol = Normalize(request.Symbol);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result.Failure("Unit name is required.");

            if (await _repository.ExistsByNameAsync(name, id, cancellationToken))
                return Result.Failure("Unit name already exists.");

            _mapper.Map(request, entity);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Symbol = symbol;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result> DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Unit not found.");

            entity.IsActive = false;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);
            var dto = _mapper.Map<List<UnitLookupDto>>(items).AsReadOnly();

            return Result<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>.Success(dto);
        }

        private static string? Normalize(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

# 3) Infrastructure

���� ���:

```text
SalesSystem.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories
```

## `UnitRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class UnitRepository : IUnitRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public UnitRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<Unit> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Units
                .AsNoTracking()
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();

                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Symbol != null && x.Symbol.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);

            var items = await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Unit>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Units
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Where(x => x.IsActive)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Symbol != null && x.Symbol.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            return await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<Unit?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.Units
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.UnitId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(
            Unit entity,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.Units.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        }

        public Task<bool> ExistsByNameAsync(
            string name,
            int? excludeUnitId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Units
                .AsQueryable()
                .Where(x => x.Name == name);

            if (excludeUnitId.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.UnitId != excludeUnitId.Value);

            return query.AnyAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `UnitsController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Units;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/units")]
    public class UnitsController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IUnitService _unitService;

        public UnitsController(IUnitService unitService)
        {
            _unitService = unitService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<UnitDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _unitService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<UnitDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<UnitDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<UnitDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _unitService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<UnitDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<UnitDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _unitService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateUnitRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _unitService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Unit created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPut("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Update(
            int id,
            [FromBody] UpdateUnitRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _unitService.UpdateAsync(id, request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Unit updated successfully"));
        }

        [HttpDelete("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Delete(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _unitService.DeleteAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Unit deleted successfully"));
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Units;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface IUnitApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<UnitDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<UnitDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateUnitRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateUnitRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

## `UnitApiService.cs`
```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Units;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class UnitApiService : ApiServiceBase, IUnitApiService
    {
        public UnitApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient)
        {
        }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<UnitDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/units?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm))
                url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<UnitDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = "api/units/lookup";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
                url += $"?searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<UnitDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/units/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<UnitDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateUnitRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/units", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateUnitRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/units/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/units/{id}", cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `UnitsListControl.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Units;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Units;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Units
{
    public class UnitsListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly IUnitApiService _unitApiService;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnEdit = null!;
        private Button btnDelete = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvUnits = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public UnitsListControl(IUnitApiService unitApiService)
        {
            _unitApiService = unitApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadUnitsAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            var topPanel = new Panel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 50,
                Padding = new Padding(8)
            };

            txtSearch = new TextBox
            {
                Width = 260,
                PlaceholderText = "���� ���� ������ �� �����..."
            };

            btnSearch = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadUnitsAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                txtSearch.Clear();
                await LoadUnitsAsync();
            };

            btnAdd = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync(null);

            btnEdit = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnEdit.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedUnitId();
                if (id is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("���� ���� �����.");
                    return;
                }

                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            btnDelete = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnDelete.Click += async (_, _) => await DeleteSelectedAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Right,
                Width = 360,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                WrapContents = false
            };

            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnDelete);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnEdit);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnAdd);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnRefresh);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSearch);

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvUnits = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ReadOnly = true,
                AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
                MultiSelect = false,
                AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvUnits.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvUnits.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedUnitId();
                if (id is null) return;

                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            lblStatus = new Label
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Bottom,
                Height = 24,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft,
                Padding = new Padding(8, 0, 0, 0),
                Text = "����"
            };

            Controls.Add(dgvUnits);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadUnitsAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);

                var result = await _unitApiService.GetPagedAsync(
                    new PagedQueryRequestDto
                    {
                        PageNumber = 1,
                        PageSize = 200,
                        SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text
                    });

                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"��� �������: {result.TotalCount}";

                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "��� ��� ����� ����� �������";
            }
            finally
            {
                SetBusy(false);
            }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvUnits.Columns.Count == 0)
                return;

            if (dgvUnits.Columns.Contains("CreatedAt"))
                dgvUnits.Columns["CreatedAt"].Visible = false;

            if (dgvUnits.Columns.Contains("UnitId"))
                dgvUnits.Columns["UnitId"].HeaderText = "ID";

            if (dgvUnits.Columns.Contains("Name"))
                dgvUnits.Columns["Name"].HeaderText = "�����";

            if (dgvUnits.Columns.Contains("Symbol"))
                dgvUnits.Columns["Symbol"].HeaderText = "�����";

            if (dgvUnits.Columns.Contains("IsActive"))
                dgvUnits.Columns["IsActive"].HeaderText = "���";
        }

        private int? GetSelectedUnitId()
        {
            if (dgvUnits.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not UnitDto row)
                return null;

            return row.UnitId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync(int? unitId)
        {
            using var form = new UnitEditorForm(_unitApiService, unitId);

            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();

            if (result == DialogResult.OK)
                await LoadUnitsAsync();
        }

        private async Task DeleteSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedUnitId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ���� �����.");
                return;
            }

            var confirm = MessageBox.Show(
                "�� ���� ��� �����ɿ",
                "�����",
                MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                MessageBoxIcon.Question);

            if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes)
                return;

            try
            {
                await _unitApiService.DeleteAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadUnitsAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;

            txtSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnRefresh.Enabled = !busy;
            btnAdd.Enabled = !busy;
            btnEdit.Enabled = !busy;
            btnDelete.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}
```

## `UnitEditorForm.cs`
```csharp
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Units;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Units
{
    public class UnitEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly IUnitApiService _unitApiService;
        private readonly int? _unitId;

        private readonly ErrorProvider _errorProvider = new();

        private TextBox txtName = null!;
        private TextBox txtSymbol = null!;
        private CheckBox chkIsActive = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;

        public UnitEditorForm(
            IUnitApiService unitApiService,
            int? unitId = null)
        {
            _unitApiService = unitApiService;
            _unitId = unitId;

            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadFormAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = _unitId.HasValue ? "����� ����" : "����� ����";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            Size = new Size(600, 300);
            MinimumSize = new Size(550, 280);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;
            MaximizeBox = false;
            MinimizeBox = false;

            _errorProvider.BlinkStyle = ErrorBlinkStyle.NeverBlink;

            var mainPanel = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Padding = new Padding(12),
                ColumnCount = 1,
                RowCount = 4
            };

            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 75));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 75));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 40));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 50));

            txtName = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                PlaceholderText = "��� ������"
            };

            txtSymbol = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                PlaceholderText = "�����"
            };

            chkIsActive = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "���",
                Checked = true,
                Dock = DockStyle.Left
            };

            btnSave = new Button
            {
                Text = "���",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 35
            };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 35,
                DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel
            };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("��� ������:", txtName), 0, 0);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("�����:", txtSymbol), 0, 1);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(chkIsActive, 0, 2);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel, 0, 3);

            Controls.Add(mainPanel);

            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;
        }

        private Panel CreateLabeledPanel(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };

            var label = new Label
            {
                Text = labelText,
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 22,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleRight
            };

            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);

            return panel;
        }

        private async Task LoadFormAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                if (!_unitId.HasValue)
                    return;

                UseWaitCursor = true;

                var unit = await _unitApiService.GetByIdAsync(_unitId.Value);

                if (unit is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("������ ��� ������.", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                    Close();
                    return;
                }

                txtName.Text = unit.Name;
                txtSymbol.Text = unit.Symbol ?? string.Empty;
                chkIsActive.Checked = unit.IsActive;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                Close();
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
            }
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (!ValidateForm())
                return;

            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                btnSave.Enabled = false;

                if (_unitId.HasValue)
                {
                    var request = BuildUpdateRequest();
                    await _unitApiService.UpdateAsync(_unitId.Value, request);
                    MessageBox.Show("�� ����� ������ �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }
                else
                {
                    var request = BuildCreateRequest();
                    await _unitApiService.CreateAsync(request);
                    MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ������ �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }

                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
                btnSave.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        private bool ValidateForm()
        {
            _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, string.Empty);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtName.Text))
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, "��� ������ �����.");
                return false;
            }

            return true;
        }

        private CreateUnitRequestDto BuildCreateRequest()
        {
            return new CreateUnitRequestDto
            {
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                Symbol = TrimToNull(txtSymbol.Text),
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private UpdateUnitRequestDto BuildUpdateRequest()
        {
            return new UpdateUnitRequestDto
            {
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                Symbol = TrimToNull(txtSymbol.Text),
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

## `WarehouseMappingProfile.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Warehouses;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class WarehouseMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public WarehouseMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<Warehouse, WarehouseDto>();
            CreateMap<Warehouse, WarehouseLookupDto>();

            CreateMap<CreateWarehouseRequestDto, Warehouse>()
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseStocks, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<UpdateWarehouseRequestDto, Warehouse>()
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseStocks, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());
        }
    }
}
```
