## `WarehouseService.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Warehouses;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class WarehouseService : IWarehouseService
    {
        private readonly IWarehouseRepository _repository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public WarehouseService(
            IWarehouseRepository repository,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _repository = repository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<WarehouseDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _repository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var dtoItems = _mapper.Map<List<WarehouseDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<WarehouseDto>>.Success(
                new PagedResultDto<WarehouseDto>
                {
                    Items = dtoItems,
                    TotalCount = totalCount,
                    PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                    PageSize = request.PageSize
                });
        }

        public async Task<Result<WarehouseDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result<WarehouseDto?>.Failure("Warehouse not found.");

            return Result<WarehouseDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<WarehouseDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateWarehouseRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var code = Normalize(request.Code);
            var location = Normalize(request.Location);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse name is required.");

            if (code is not null &&
                await _repository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, null, cancellationToken))
            {
                return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse code already exists.");
            }

            if (await _repository.ExistsByNameAsync(name, null, cancellationToken))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse name already exists.");

            var entity = _mapper.Map<Warehouse>(request);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Location = location;
            entity.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
            entity.UpdatedAt = null;

            await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            // ��� �� ���� ���� ������� �� ��� �� �������� ��� ��� ������ ��������
            if (request.IsDefault)
            {
                await SetDefaultAfterSaveAsync(entity.WarehouseId, cancellationToken);
            }
            else
            {
                var existingDefault = await _repository.GetDefaultAsync(cancellationToken);
                if (existingDefault is null && entity.IsActive)
                {
                    await SetDefaultAfterSaveAsync(entity.WarehouseId, cancellationToken);
                }
            }

            return Result<int>.Success(entity.WarehouseId);
        }

        public async Task<Result> UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateWarehouseRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Warehouse not found.");

            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var code = Normalize(request.Code);
            var location = Normalize(request.Location);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result.Failure("Warehouse name is required.");

            if (code is not null &&
                await _repository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, id, cancellationToken))
            {
                return Result.Failure("Warehouse code already exists.");
            }

            if (await _repository.ExistsByNameAsync(name, id, cancellationToken))
                return Result.Failure("Warehouse name already exists.");

            _mapper.Map(request, entity);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Location = location;
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            if (request.IsDefault)
            {
                await SetDefaultAfterSaveAsync(entity.WarehouseId, cancellationToken);
            }

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result> DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Warehouse not found.");

            entity.IsActive = false;
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            // ��� ��� ��� ������ �� ��������� ���� ����� ����
            if (entity.IsDefault)
            {
                entity.IsDefault = false;
                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

                var alternative = (await _repository.GetLookupAsync(null, cancellationToken))
                    .FirstOrDefault(x => x.WarehouseId != id);

                if (alternative is not null)
                {
                    await SetDefaultAfterSaveAsync(alternative.WarehouseId, cancellationToken);
                }
            }

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<WarehouseLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);
            var dto = _mapper.Map<List<WarehouseLookupDto>>(items).AsReadOnly();

            return Result<IReadOnlyList<WarehouseLookupDto>>.Success(dto);
        }

        public async Task<Result<WarehouseDto?>> GetDefaultAsync(
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetDefaultAsync(cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result<WarehouseDto?>.Success(null);

            return Result<WarehouseDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<WarehouseDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result> SetDefaultAsync(
            int warehouseId,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var warehouse = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(warehouseId, cancellationToken);

            if (warehouse is null)
                return Result.Failure("Warehouse not found.");

            if (!warehouse.IsActive)
                return Result.Failure("Cannot set an inactive warehouse as default.");

            await SetDefaultAfterSaveAsync(warehouseId, cancellationToken);
            return Result.Success();
        }

        private async Task SetDefaultAfterSaveAsync(
            int warehouseId,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var currentDefault = await _repository.GetDefaultAsync(cancellationToken);
            var selected = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(warehouseId, cancellationToken);

            if (selected is null)
                return;

            if (currentDefault is not null && currentDefault.WarehouseId == selected.WarehouseId)
                return;

            if (currentDefault is not null)
            {
                currentDefault.IsDefault = false;
                currentDefault.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
            }

            selected.IsDefault = true;
            selected.IsActive = true;
            selected.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        private static string? Normalize(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

# 3) Infrastructure

���� ���:

```text
SalesSystem.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories
```

---

## `WarehouseRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class WarehouseRepository : IWarehouseRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public WarehouseRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<Warehouse> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Warehouses
                .AsNoTracking()
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();

                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Code != null && x.Code.Contains(searchTerm)) ||
                    (x.Location != null && x.Location.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);

            var items = await query
                .OrderByDescending(x => x.IsDefault)
                .ThenBy(x => x.Name)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Warehouse>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Warehouses
                .AsQueryable()
                .Where(x => x.IsActive);

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Code != null && x.Code.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            return await query
                .OrderByDescending(x => x.IsDefault)
                .ThenBy(x => x.Name)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<Warehouse?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.Warehouses
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.WarehouseId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<Warehouse?> GetDefaultAsync(
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.Warehouses
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.IsDefault && x.IsActive, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(
            Warehouse entity,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.Warehouses.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        }

        public Task<bool> ExistsByNameAsync(
            string name,
            int? excludeWarehouseId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Warehouses
                .AsQueryable()
                .Where(x => x.Name == name);

            if (excludeWarehouseId.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.WarehouseId != excludeWarehouseId.Value);

            return query.AnyAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public Task<bool> ExistsByCodeAsync(
            string code,
            int? excludeWarehouseId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Warehouses
                .AsQueryable()
                .Where(x => x.Code == code);

            if (excludeWarehouseId.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.WarehouseId != excludeWarehouseId.Value);

            return query.AnyAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `WarehousesController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Warehouses;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/warehouses")]
    public class WarehousesController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IWarehouseService _warehouseService;

        public WarehousesController(IWarehouseService warehouseService)
        {
            _warehouseService = warehouseService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<WarehouseDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _warehouseService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<WarehouseDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<WarehouseDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<WarehouseDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _warehouseService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<WarehouseDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<WarehouseDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<WarehouseLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _warehouseService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<WarehouseLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<WarehouseLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("default")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<WarehouseDto?>>> GetDefault(
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _warehouseService.GetDefaultAsync(cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<WarehouseDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<WarehouseDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateWarehouseRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _warehouseService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Warehouse created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPut("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Update(
            int id,
            [FromBody] UpdateWarehouseRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _warehouseService.UpdateAsync(id, request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Warehouse updated successfully"));
        }

        [HttpDelete("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Delete(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _warehouseService.DeleteAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Warehouse deleted successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPost("{id:int}/set-default")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> SetDefault(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _warehouseService.SetDefaultAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Default warehouse updated successfully"));
        }
    }
}
```

## `IWarehouseApiService.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Warehouses;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface IWarehouseApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<WarehouseDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<WarehouseLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<WarehouseDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<WarehouseDto?> GetDefaultAsync(
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateWarehouseRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateWarehouseRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task SetDefaultAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

---

## `WarehouseApiService.cs`
```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Warehouses;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class WarehouseApiService : ApiServiceBase, IWarehouseApiService
    {
        public WarehouseApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient)
        {
        }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<WarehouseDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/warehouses?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm))
                url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<WarehouseDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<WarehouseLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = "api/warehouses/lookup";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
                url += $"?searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<WarehouseLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<WarehouseDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/warehouses/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<WarehouseDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<WarehouseDto?> GetDefaultAsync(
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync("api/warehouses/default", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<WarehouseDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateWarehouseRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/warehouses", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateWarehouseRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/warehouses/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/warehouses/{id}", cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task SetDefaultAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsync($"api/warehouses/{id}/set-default", null, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `WarehousesListControl.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Warehouses;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Warehouses;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Warehouses
{
    public class WarehousesListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly IWarehouseApiService _warehouseApiService;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnEdit = null!;
        private Button btnDelete = null!;
        private Button btnSetDefault = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvWarehouses = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public WarehousesListControl(IWarehouseApiService warehouseApiService)
        {
            _warehouseApiService = warehouseApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadWarehousesAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            var topPanel = new Panel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 50,
                Padding = new Padding(8)
            };

            txtSearch = new TextBox
            {
                Width = 260,
                PlaceholderText = "���� ���� ������ �� �����..."
            };

            btnSearch = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadWarehousesAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                txtSearch.Clear();
                await LoadWarehousesAsync();
            };

            btnAdd = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync(null);

            btnEdit = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnEdit.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedWarehouseId();
                if (id is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                    return;
                }

                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            btnDelete = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnDelete.Click += async (_, _) => await DeleteSelectedAsync();

            btnSetDefault = new Button { Text = "�������", Width = 80 };
            btnSetDefault.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedWarehouseId();
                if (id is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                    return;
                }

                await SetDefaultAsync(id.Value);
            };

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Right,
                Width = 460,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                WrapContents = false
            };

            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSetDefault);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnDelete);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnEdit);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnAdd);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnRefresh);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSearch);

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvWarehouses = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ReadOnly = true,
                AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
                MultiSelect = false,
                AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvWarehouses.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvWarehouses.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedWarehouseId();
                if (id is null) return;

                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            lblStatus = new Label
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Bottom,
                Height = 24,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft,
                Padding = new Padding(8, 0, 0, 0),
                Text = "����"
            };

            Controls.Add(dgvWarehouses);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadWarehousesAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);

                var result = await _warehouseApiService.GetPagedAsync(
                    new PagedQueryRequestDto
                    {
                        PageNumber = 1,
                        PageSize = 200,
                        SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text
                    });

                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"��� �������: {result.TotalCount}";

                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "��� ��� ����� ����� �������";
            }
            finally
            {
                SetBusy(false);
            }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvWarehouses.Columns.Count == 0)
                return;

            if (dgvWarehouses.Columns.Contains("Location"))
                dgvWarehouses.Columns["Location"].HeaderText = "������";

            if (dgvWarehouses.Columns.Contains("WarehouseId"))
                dgvWarehouses.Columns["WarehouseId"].HeaderText = "ID";

            if (dgvWarehouses.Columns.Contains("Code"))
                dgvWarehouses.Columns["Code"].HeaderText = "�����";

            if (dgvWarehouses.Columns.Contains("Name"))
                dgvWarehouses.Columns["Name"].HeaderText = "�����";

            if (dgvWarehouses.Columns.Contains("IsDefault"))
                dgvWarehouses.Columns["IsDefault"].HeaderText = "�������";

            if (dgvWarehouses.Columns.Contains("IsActive"))
                dgvWarehouses.Columns["IsActive"].HeaderText = "���";

            if (dgvWarehouses.Columns.Contains("CreatedAt"))
                dgvWarehouses.Columns["CreatedAt"].Visible = false;

            if (dgvWarehouses.Columns.Contains("UpdatedAt"))
                dgvWarehouses.Columns["UpdatedAt"].Visible = false;
        }

        private int? GetSelectedWarehouseId()
        {
            if (dgvWarehouses.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not WarehouseDto row)
                return null;

            return row.WarehouseId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync(int? warehouseId)
        {
            using var form = new WarehouseEditorForm(_warehouseApiService, warehouseId);

            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();

            if (result == DialogResult.OK)
                await LoadWarehousesAsync();
        }

        private async Task DeleteSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedWarehouseId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                return;
            }

            var confirm = MessageBox.Show(
                "�� ���� ��� ������",
                "�����",
                MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                MessageBoxIcon.Question);

            if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes)
                return;

            try
            {
                await _warehouseApiService.DeleteAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadWarehousesAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private async Task SetDefaultAsync(int id)
        {
            try
            {
                await _warehouseApiService.SetDefaultAsync(id);
                await LoadWarehousesAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;

            txtSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnRefresh.Enabled = !busy;
            btnAdd.Enabled = !busy;
            btnEdit.Enabled = !busy;
            btnDelete.Enabled = !busy;
            btnSetDefault.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}
```

## `WarehouseEditorForm.cs`
```csharp
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Warehouses;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Warehouses
{
    public class WarehouseEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly IWarehouseApiService _warehouseApiService;
        private readonly int? _warehouseId;

        private readonly ErrorProvider _errorProvider = new();

        private TextBox txtCode = null!;
        private TextBox txtName = null!;
        private TextBox txtLocation = null!;
        private CheckBox chkIsDefault = null!;
        private CheckBox chkIsActive = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;

        public WarehouseEditorForm(
            IWarehouseApiService warehouseApiService,
            int? warehouseId = null)
        {
            _warehouseApiService = warehouseApiService;
            _warehouseId = warehouseId;

            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadFormAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = _warehouseId.HasValue ? "����� ����" : "����� ����";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            Size = new Size(650, 380);
            MinimumSize = new Size(600, 340);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;
            MaximizeBox = false;
            MinimizeBox = false;

            _errorProvider.BlinkStyle = ErrorBlinkStyle.NeverBlink;

            var mainPanel = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Padding = new Padding(12),
                ColumnCount = 1,
                RowCount = 5
            };

            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 70));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 70));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 70));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 40));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 50));

            txtCode = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                PlaceholderText = "�����"
            };

            txtName = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                PlaceholderText = "��� ������"
            };

            txtLocation = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                PlaceholderText = "������"
            };

            chkIsDefault = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "�������",
                Dock = DockStyle.Left
            };

            chkIsActive = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "���",
                Checked = true,
                Dock = DockStyle.Left
            };

            btnSave = new Button
            {
                Text = "���",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 35
            };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 35,
                DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel
            };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("�����:", txtCode), 0, 0);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("��� ������:", txtName), 0, 1);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������:", txtLocation), 0, 2);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateOptionsPanel(), 0, 3);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel, 0, 4);

            Controls.Add(mainPanel);

            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;
        }

        private Panel CreateLabeledPanel(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };

            var label = new Label
            {
                Text = labelText,
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 22,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleRight
            };

            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);

            return panel;
        }

        private Panel CreateOptionsPanel()
        {
            var panel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                WrapContents = false
            };

            panel.Controls.Add(chkIsActive);
            panel.Controls.Add(chkIsDefault);

            return panel;
        }

        private async Task LoadFormAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                if (!_warehouseId.HasValue)
                    return;

                UseWaitCursor = true;

                var warehouse = await _warehouseApiService.GetByIdAsync(_warehouseId.Value);

                if (warehouse is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("������ ��� �����.", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                    Close();
                    return;
                }

                txtCode.Text = warehouse.Code ?? string.Empty;
                txtName.Text = warehouse.Name;
                txtLocation.Text = warehouse.Location ?? string.Empty;
                chkIsDefault.Checked = warehouse.IsDefault;
                chkIsActive.Checked = warehouse.IsActive;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                Close();
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
            }
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (!ValidateForm())
                return;

            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                btnSave.Enabled = false;

                if (_warehouseId.HasValue)
                {
                    var request = BuildUpdateRequest();
                    await _warehouseApiService.UpdateAsync(_warehouseId.Value, request);
                    MessageBox.Show("�� ����� ������ �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }
                else
                {
                    var request = BuildCreateRequest();
                    await _warehouseApiService.CreateAsync(request);
                    MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ������ �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }

                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
                btnSave.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        private bool ValidateForm()
        {
            _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, string.Empty);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtName.Text))
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, "��� ������ �����.");
                return false;
            }

            return true;
        }

        private CreateWarehouseRequestDto BuildCreateRequest()
        {
            return new CreateWarehouseRequestDto
            {
                Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text),
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                Location = TrimToNull(txtLocation.Text),
                IsDefault = chkIsDefault.Checked,
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private UpdateWarehouseRequestDto BuildUpdateRequest()
        {
            return new UpdateWarehouseRequestDto
            {
                Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text),
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                Location = TrimToNull(txtLocation.Text),
                IsDefault = chkIsDefault.Checked,
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

## `CustomerDto.cs`

```csharp
namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers
{
    public class CustomerDto
    {
        public int CustomerId { get; set; }
        public string? Code { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Phone { get; set; }
        public string? Email { get; set; }
        public string? Address { get; set; }
        public decimal OpeningBalance { get; set; }
        public decimal CurrentBalance { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; }
        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? UpdatedAt { get; set; }
    }
}
```

## `CreateCustomerRequestDto.cs`
```csharp
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers
{
    public class CreateCustomerRequestDto
    {
        [MaxLength(30)]
        public string? Code { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [MaxLength(150)]
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [MaxLength(20)]
        public string? Phone { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(100)]
        public string? Email { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(250)]
        public string? Address { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal OpeningBalance { get; set; }

        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }
}
```

## `ICustomerRepository.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence
{
    public interface ICustomerRepository
    {
        Task<(IReadOnlyList<Customer> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<Customer>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Customer?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task AddAsync(
            Customer entity,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<bool> ExistsByCodeAsync(
            string code,
            int? excludeCustomerId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services
{
    public interface ICustomerService
    {
        Task<Result<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result<CustomerDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result> UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result> DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<Result<decimal>> GetBalanceAsync(
            int customerId,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class CustomerMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public CustomerMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<Customer, CustomerDto>();
            CreateMap<Customer, CustomerLookupDto>();

            CreateMap<CreateCustomerRequestDto, Customer>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CurrentBalance, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoices, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerPayments, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<UpdateCustomerRequestDto, Customer>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.OpeningBalance, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CurrentBalance, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoices, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerPayments, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());
        }
    }
}
```

## `CustomerService.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class CustomerService : ICustomerService
    {
        private readonly ICustomerRepository _repository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public CustomerService(
            ICustomerRepository repository,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _repository = repository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _repository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var dtoItems = _mapper.Map<List<CustomerDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>.Success(
                new PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>
                {
                    Items = dtoItems,
                    TotalCount = totalCount,
                    PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                    PageSize = request.PageSize
                });
        }

        public async Task<Result<CustomerDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result<CustomerDto?>.Failure("Customer not found.");

            return Result<CustomerDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<CustomerDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var code = Normalize(request.Code);
            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var phone = Normalize(request.Phone);
            var email = Normalize(request.Email);
            var address = Normalize(request.Address);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Customer name is required.");

            if (code is not null &&
                await _repository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, null, cancellationToken))
            {
                return Result<int>.Failure("Customer code already exists.");
            }

            var entity = _mapper.Map<Customer>(request);
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Phone = phone;
            entity.Email = email;
            entity.Address = address;
            entity.OpeningBalance = request.OpeningBalance;
            entity.CurrentBalance = request.OpeningBalance;
            entity.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
            entity.UpdatedAt = null;

            await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result<int>.Success(entity.CustomerId);
        }

        public async Task<Result> UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Customer not found.");

            var code = Normalize(request.Code);
            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var phone = Normalize(request.Phone);
            var email = Normalize(request.Email);
            var address = Normalize(request.Address);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result.Failure("Customer name is required.");

            if (code is not null &&
                await _repository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, id, cancellationToken))
            {
                return Result.Failure("Customer code already exists.");
            }

            _mapper.Map(request, entity);
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Phone = phone;
            entity.Email = email;
            entity.Address = address;
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result> DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Customer not found.");

            entity.IsActive = false;
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);
            var dto = _mapper.Map<List<CustomerLookupDto>>(items).AsReadOnly();

            return Result<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>.Success(dto);
        }

        public async Task<Result<decimal>> GetBalanceAsync(
            int customerId,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(customerId, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result<decimal>.Failure("Customer not found.");

            return Result<decimal>.Success(entity.CurrentBalance);
        }

        private static string? Normalize(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

# 3) Infrastructure

���� ���:

```text
SalesSystem.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories
```

---

## `CustomerRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class CustomerRepository : ICustomerRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public CustomerRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<Customer> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Customers
                .AsNoTracking()
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();

                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Code != null && x.Code.Contains(searchTerm)) ||
                    (x.Phone != null && x.Phone.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);

            var items = await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Customer>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Customers
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Where(x => x.IsActive)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();

                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Code != null && x.Code.Contains(searchTerm)) ||
                    (x.Phone != null && x.Phone.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            return await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<Customer?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.Customers
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.CustomerId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(
            Customer entity,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.Customers.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        }

        public Task<bool> ExistsByCodeAsync(
            string code,
            int? excludeCustomerId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Customers
                .AsQueryable()
                .Where(x => x.Code == code);

            if (excludeCustomerId.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.CustomerId != excludeCustomerId.Value);

            return query.AnyAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `CustomersController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/customers")]
    public class CustomersController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ICustomerService _customerService;

        public CustomersController(ICustomerService customerService)
        {
            _customerService = customerService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _customerService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<CustomerDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _customerService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<CustomerDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<CustomerDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _customerService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}/balance")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<decimal>>> GetBalance(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _customerService.GetBalanceAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<decimal>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<decimal>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _customerService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Customer created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPut("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Update(
            int id,
            [FromBody] UpdateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _customerService.UpdateAsync(id, request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Customer updated successfully"));
        }

        [HttpDelete("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Delete(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _customerService.DeleteAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Customer deleted successfully"));
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface ICustomerApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<CustomerDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<decimal> GetBalanceAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

## `CustomerApiService.cs`
```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class CustomerApiService : ApiServiceBase, ICustomerApiService
    {
        public CustomerApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient)
        {
        }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/customers?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm))
                url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = "api/customers/lookup";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
                url += $"?searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<CustomerDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/customers/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<CustomerDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<decimal> GetBalanceAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/customers/{id}/balance", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<decimal>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/customers", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/customers/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/customers/{id}", cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `CustomersListControl.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Customers
{
    public class CustomersListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly ICustomerApiService _customerApiService;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnEdit = null!;
        private Button btnDelete = null!;
        private Button btnBalance = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvCustomers = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public CustomersListControl(ICustomerApiService customerApiService)
        {
            _customerApiService = customerApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadCustomersAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            var topPanel = new Panel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 50,
                Padding = new Padding(8)
            };

            txtSearch = new TextBox
            {
                Width = 260,
                PlaceholderText = "���� ���� ������ �� ����� �� ������..."
            };

            btnSearch = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadCustomersAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                txtSearch.Clear();
                await LoadCustomersAsync();
            };

            btnAdd = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync(null);

            btnEdit = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnEdit.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedCustomerId();
                if (id is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                    return;
                }

                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            btnDelete = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnDelete.Click += async (_, _) => await DeleteSelectedAsync();

            btnBalance = new Button { Text = "������", Width = 80 };
            btnBalance.Click += async (_, _) => await ShowBalanceAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Right,
                Width = 540,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                WrapContents = false
            };

            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnBalance);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnDelete);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnEdit);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnAdd);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnRefresh);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSearch);

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };

            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvCustomers = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ReadOnly = true,
                AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
                MultiSelect = false,
                AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };

            dgvCustomers.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvCustomers.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedCustomerId();
                if (id is null) return;

                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            lblStatus = new Label
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Bottom,
                Height = 24,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft,
                Padding = new Padding(8, 0, 0, 0),
                Text = "����"
            };

            Controls.Add(dgvCustomers);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadCustomersAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);

                var result = await _customerApiService.GetPagedAsync(
                    new PagedQueryRequestDto
                    {
                        PageNumber = 1,
                        PageSize = 200,
                        SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text
                    });

                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"��� �������: {result.TotalCount}";

                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "��� ��� ����� ����� �������";
            }
            finally
            {
                SetBusy(false);
            }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Count == 0)
                return;

            HideIfExists("Address");
            HideIfExists("OpeningBalance");
            HideIfExists("CreatedAt");
            HideIfExists("UpdatedAt");

            SetHeader("CustomerId", "ID");
            SetHeader("Code", "�����");
            SetHeader("Name", "�����");
            SetHeader("Phone", "������");
            SetHeader("Email", "������");
            SetHeader("CurrentBalance", "������");
            SetHeader("IsActive", "���");
        }

        private void HideIfExists(string columnName)
        {
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains(columnName))
                dgvCustomers.Columns[columnName].Visible = false;
        }

        private void SetHeader(string columnName, string text)
        {
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains(columnName))
                dgvCustomers.Columns[columnName].HeaderText = text;
        }

        private int? GetSelectedCustomerId()
        {
            if (dgvCustomers.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not CustomerDto row)
                return null;

            return row.CustomerId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync(int? customerId)
        {
            using var form = new CustomerEditorForm(_customerApiService, customerId);

            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();

            if (result == DialogResult.OK)
                await LoadCustomersAsync();
        }

        private async Task DeleteSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedCustomerId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                return;
            }

            var confirm = MessageBox.Show(
                "�� ���� ��� ������",
                "�����",
                MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                MessageBoxIcon.Question);

            if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes)
                return;

            try
            {
                await _customerApiService.DeleteAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadCustomersAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private async Task ShowBalanceAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedCustomerId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                return;
            }

            try
            {
                var balance = await _customerApiService.GetBalanceAsync(id.Value);
                MessageBox.Show($"������ ������: {balance:N2}", "���� ������", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;

            txtSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnRefresh.Enabled = !busy;
            btnAdd.Enabled = !busy;
            btnEdit.Enabled = !busy;
            btnDelete.Enabled = !busy;
            btnBalance.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}
```
