## `CustomerEditorForm.cs`
```csharp
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Customers
{
    public class CustomerEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly ICustomerApiService _customerApiService;
        private readonly int? _customerId;

        private readonly ErrorProvider _errorProvider = new();

        private TextBox txtCode = null!;
        private TextBox txtName = null!;
        private TextBox txtPhone = null!;
        private TextBox txtEmail = null!;
        private TextBox txtAddress = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudOpeningBalance = null!;
        private TextBox txtCurrentBalance = null!;
        private CheckBox chkIsActive = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;

        public CustomerEditorForm(
            ICustomerApiService customerApiService,
            int? customerId = null)
        {
            _customerApiService = customerApiService;
            _customerId = customerId;

            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadFormAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = _customerId.HasValue ? "����� ����" : "����� ����";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            Size = new Size(700, 520);
            MinimumSize = new Size(650, 480);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;
            MaximizeBox = false;
            MinimizeBox = false;

            _errorProvider.BlinkStyle = ErrorBlinkStyle.NeverBlink;

            var mainPanel = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Padding = new Padding(12),
                ColumnCount = 1,
                RowCount = 8
            };

            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 65));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 65));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 65));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 65));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 65));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 65));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 40));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 50));

            txtCode = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "�����" };
            txtName = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "��� ������" };
            txtPhone = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "������" };
            txtEmail = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "������ ����������" };
            txtAddress = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Multiline = true,
                ScrollBars = ScrollBars.Vertical,
                PlaceholderText = "�������"
            };

            nudOpeningBalance = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                DecimalPlaces = 2,
                Minimum = 0,
                Maximum = 100000000,
                ThousandsSeparator = true
            };

            txtCurrentBalance = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ReadOnly = true
            };

            chkIsActive = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "���",
                Checked = true,
                Dock = DockStyle.Left
            };

            btnSave = new Button
            {
                Text = "���",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 35
            };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 35,
                DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel
            };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("�����:", txtCode), 0, 0);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("��� ������:", txtName), 0, 1);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������:", txtPhone), 0, 2);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������ ����������:", txtEmail), 0, 3);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("�������:", txtAddress), 0, 4);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������ ���������:", nudOpeningBalance), 0, 5);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������ ������:", txtCurrentBalance), 0, 6);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(chkIsActive, 0, 7);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel, 0, 8);

            Controls.Add(mainPanel);

            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;

            // �� ��� ������ǡ �� ���� ������ ������ ���������
            nudOpeningBalance.Enabled = !_customerId.HasValue;
        }

        private Panel CreateLabeledPanel(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };

            var label = new Label
            {
                Text = labelText,
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 22,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleRight
            };

            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);

            return panel;
        }

        private async Task LoadFormAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                if (!_customerId.HasValue)
                {
                    txtCurrentBalance.Text = "0.00";
                    return;
                }

                UseWaitCursor = true;

                var customer = await _customerApiService.GetByIdAsync(_customerId.Value);

                if (customer is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("������ ��� �����.", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                    Close();
                    return;
                }

                txtCode.Text = customer.Code ?? string.Empty;
                txtName.Text = customer.Name;
                txtPhone.Text = customer.Phone ?? string.Empty;
                txtEmail.Text = customer.Email ?? string.Empty;
                txtAddress.Text = customer.Address ?? string.Empty;
                chkIsActive.Checked = customer.IsActive;
                nudOpeningBalance.Value = customer.OpeningBalance;
                txtCurrentBalance.Text = customer.CurrentBalance.ToString("N2");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                Close();
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
            }
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (!ValidateForm())
                return;

            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                btnSave.Enabled = false;

                if (_customerId.HasValue)
                {
                    var request = BuildUpdateRequest();
                    await _customerApiService.UpdateAsync(_customerId.Value, request);
                    MessageBox.Show("�� ����� ������ �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }
                else
                {
                    var request = BuildCreateRequest();
                    await _customerApiService.CreateAsync(request);
                    MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ������ �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }

                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
                btnSave.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        private bool ValidateForm()
        {
            _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, string.Empty);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtName.Text))
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, "��� ������ �����.");
                return false;
            }

            return true;
        }

        private CreateCustomerRequestDto BuildCreateRequest()
        {
            return new CreateCustomerRequestDto
            {
                Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text),
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                Phone = TrimToNull(txtPhone.Text),
                Email = TrimToNull(txtEmail.Text),
                Address = TrimToNull(txtAddress.Text),
                OpeningBalance = nudOpeningBalance.Value,
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private UpdateCustomerRequestDto BuildUpdateRequest()
        {
            return new UpdateCustomerRequestDto
            {
                Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text),
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                Phone = TrimToNull(txtPhone.Text),
                Email = TrimToNull(txtEmail.Text),
                Address = TrimToNull(txtAddress.Text),
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers
{
    public class CreateSupplierRequestDto
    {
        [MaxLength(30)]
        public string? Code { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [MaxLength(150)]
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [MaxLength(20)]
        public string? Phone { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(100)]
        public string? Email { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(250)]
        public string? Address { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal OpeningBalance { get; set; }

        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }
}

## `SupplierMappingProfile.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class SupplierMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public SupplierMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<Supplier, SupplierDto>();
            CreateMap<Supplier, SupplierLookupDto>();

            CreateMap<CreateSupplierRequestDto, Supplier>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CurrentBalance, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoices, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierPayments, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<UpdateSupplierRequestDto, Supplier>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.OpeningBalance, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CurrentBalance, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoices, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierPayments, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());
        }
    }
}
```

## `SupplierService.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class SupplierService : ISupplierService
    {
        private readonly ISupplierRepository _repository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public SupplierService(
            ISupplierRepository repository,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _repository = repository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _repository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var dtoItems = _mapper.Map<List<SupplierDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>.Success(
                new PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>
                {
                    Items = dtoItems,
                    TotalCount = totalCount,
                    PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                    PageSize = request.PageSize
                });
        }

        public async Task<Result<SupplierDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result<SupplierDto?>.Failure("Supplier not found.");

            return Result<SupplierDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<SupplierDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateSupplierRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var code = Normalize(request.Code);
            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var phone = Normalize(request.Phone);
            var email = Normalize(request.Email);
            var address = Normalize(request.Address);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier name is required.");

            if (code is not null &&
                await _repository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, null, cancellationToken))
            {
                return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier code already exists.");
            }

            var entity = _mapper.Map<Supplier>(request);
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Phone = phone;
            entity.Email = email;
            entity.Address = address;
            entity.OpeningBalance = request.OpeningBalance;
            entity.CurrentBalance = request.OpeningBalance;
            entity.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
            entity.UpdatedAt = null;

            await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result<int>.Success(entity.SupplierId);
        }

        public async Task<Result> UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateSupplierRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Supplier not found.");

            var code = Normalize(request.Code);
            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var phone = Normalize(request.Phone);
            var email = Normalize(request.Email);
            var address = Normalize(request.Address);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result.Failure("Supplier name is required.");

            if (code is not null &&
                await _repository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, id, cancellationToken))
            {
                return Result.Failure("Supplier code already exists.");
            }

            _mapper.Map(request, entity);
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Phone = phone;
            entity.Email = email;
            entity.Address = address;
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result> DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Supplier not found.");

            entity.IsActive = false;
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);
            var dto = _mapper.Map<List<SupplierLookupDto>>(items).AsReadOnly();

            return Result<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>.Success(dto);
        }

        public async Task<Result<decimal>> GetBalanceAsync(
            int supplierId,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(supplierId, cancellationToken);

            if (entity is null)
                return Result<decimal>.Failure("Supplier not found.");

            return Result<decimal>.Success(entity.CurrentBalance);
        }

        private static string? Normalize(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

# 3) Infrastructure

�� ������� ���:

```text
SalesSystem.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories
```

---

## `SupplierRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class SupplierRepository : ISupplierRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public SupplierRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<Supplier> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Suppliers
                .AsNoTracking()
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();

                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Code != null && x.Code.Contains(searchTerm)) ||
                    (x.Phone != null && x.Phone.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);

            var items = await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Supplier>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Suppliers
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Where(x => x.IsActive)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();

                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Code != null && x.Code.Contains(searchTerm)) ||
                    (x.Phone != null && x.Phone.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            return await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<Supplier?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.Suppliers
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.SupplierId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(
            Supplier entity,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.Suppliers.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        }

        public Task<bool> ExistsByCodeAsync(
            string code,
            int? excludeSupplierId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Suppliers
                .AsQueryable()
                .Where(x => x.Code == code);

            if (excludeSupplierId.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.SupplierId != excludeSupplierId.Value);

            return query.AnyAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `SuppliersController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/suppliers")]
    public class SuppliersController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ISupplierService _supplierService;

        public SuppliersController(ISupplierService supplierService)
        {
            _supplierService = supplierService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _supplierService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<SupplierDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<SupplierDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<SupplierDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}/balance")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<decimal>>> GetBalance(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.GetBalanceAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<decimal>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<decimal>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateSupplierRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Supplier created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPut("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Update(
            int id,
            [FromBody] UpdateSupplierRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.UpdateAsync(id, request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Supplier updated successfully"));
        }

        [HttpDelete("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Delete(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.DeleteAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Supplier deleted successfully"));
        }
    }
}
```

## `ISupplierApiService.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface ISupplierApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<SupplierDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<decimal> GetBalanceAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateSupplierRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateSupplierRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

## `SupplierApiService.cs`
```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class SupplierApiService : ApiServiceBase, ISupplierApiService
    {
        public SupplierApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient)
        {
        }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/suppliers?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm))
                url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = "api/suppliers/lookup";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
                url += $"?searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<SupplierDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/suppliers/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<SupplierDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<decimal> GetBalanceAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/suppliers/{id}/balance", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<decimal>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateSupplierRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/suppliers", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateSupplierRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/suppliers/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/suppliers/{id}", cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `SuppliersListControl.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Suppliers
{
    public class SuppliersListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly ISupplierApiService _supplierApiService;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnEdit = null!;
        private Button btnDelete = null!;
        private Button btnBalance = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvSuppliers = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public SuppliersListControl(ISupplierApiService supplierApiService)
        {
            _supplierApiService = supplierApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadSuppliersAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            var topPanel = new Panel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 50,
                Padding = new Padding(8)
            };

            txtSearch = new TextBox
            {
                Width = 260,
                PlaceholderText = "���� ���� ������ �� ����� �� ������..."
            };

            btnSearch = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadSuppliersAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                txtSearch.Clear();
                await LoadSuppliersAsync();
            };

            btnAdd = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync(null);

            btnEdit = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnEdit.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedSupplierId();
                if (id is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                    return;
                }

                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            btnDelete = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnDelete.Click += async (_, _) => await DeleteSelectedAsync();

            btnBalance = new Button { Text = "������", Width = 80 };
            btnBalance.Click += async (_, _) => await ShowBalanceAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Right,
                Width = 540,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                WrapContents = false
            };

            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnBalance);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnDelete);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnEdit);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnAdd);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnRefresh);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSearch);

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };

            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvSuppliers = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ReadOnly = true,
                AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
                MultiSelect = false,
                AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };

            dgvSuppliers.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvSuppliers.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedSupplierId();
                if (id is null) return;

                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            lblStatus = new Label
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Bottom,
                Height = 24,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft,
                Padding = new Padding(8, 0, 0, 0),
                Text = "����"
            };

            Controls.Add(dgvSuppliers);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadSuppliersAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);

                var result = await _supplierApiService.GetPagedAsync(
                    new PagedQueryRequestDto
                    {
                        PageNumber = 1,
                        PageSize = 200,
                        SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text
                    });

                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"��� ��������: {result.TotalCount}";

                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "��� ��� ����� ����� ��������";
            }
            finally
            {
                SetBusy(false);
            }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Count == 0)
                return;

            HideIfExists("Address");
            HideIfExists("OpeningBalance");
            HideIfExists("CreatedAt");
            HideIfExists("UpdatedAt");

            SetHeader("SupplierId", "ID");
            SetHeader("Code", "�����");
            SetHeader("Name", "�����");
            SetHeader("Phone", "������");
            SetHeader("Email", "������");
            SetHeader("CurrentBalance", "������");
            SetHeader("IsActive", "���");
        }

        private void HideIfExists(string columnName)
        {
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains(columnName))
                dgvSuppliers.Columns[columnName].Visible = false;
        }

        private void SetHeader(string columnName, string text)
        {
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains(columnName))
                dgvSuppliers.Columns[columnName].HeaderText = text;
        }

        private int? GetSelectedSupplierId()
        {
            if (dgvSuppliers.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not SupplierDto row)
                return null;

            return row.SupplierId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync(int? supplierId)
        {
            using var form = new SupplierEditorForm(_supplierApiService, supplierId);

            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();

            if (result == DialogResult.OK)
                await LoadSuppliersAsync();
        }

        private async Task DeleteSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedSupplierId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                return;
            }

            var confirm = MessageBox.Show(
                "�� ���� ��� �����Ͽ",
                "�����",
                MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                MessageBoxIcon.Question);

            if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes)
                return;

            try
            {
                await _supplierApiService.DeleteAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadSuppliersAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private async Task ShowBalanceAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedSupplierId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                return;
            }

            try
            {
                var balance = await _supplierApiService.GetBalanceAsync(id.Value);
                MessageBox.Show($"������ ������: {balance:N2}", "���� ������", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;

            txtSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnRefresh.Enabled = !busy;
            btnAdd.Enabled = !busy;
            btnEdit.Enabled = !busy;
            btnDelete.Enabled = !busy;
            btnBalance.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}
```

## `SupplierEditorForm.cs`
```csharp
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Suppliers
{
    public class SupplierEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly ISupplierApiService _supplierApiService;
        private readonly int? _supplierId;

        private readonly ErrorProvider _errorProvider = new();

        private TextBox txtCode = null!;
        private TextBox txtName = null!;
        private TextBox txtPhone = null!;
        private TextBox txtEmail = null!;
        private TextBox txtAddress = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudOpeningBalance = null!;
        private TextBox txtCurrentBalance = null!;
        private CheckBox chkIsActive = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;

        public SupplierEditorForm(
            ISupplierApiService supplierApiService,
            int? supplierId = null)
        {
            _supplierApiService = supplierApiService;
            _supplierId = supplierId;

            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadFormAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = _supplierId.HasValue ? "����� ����" : "����� ����";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            Size = new Size(700, 520);
            MinimumSize = new Size(650, 480);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;
            MaximizeBox = false;
            MinimizeBox = false;

            _errorProvider.BlinkStyle = ErrorBlinkStyle.NeverBlink;

            var mainPanel = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Padding = new Padding(12),
                ColumnCount = 1,
                RowCount = 8
            };

            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 65));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 65));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 65));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 65));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 65));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 65));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 40));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 50));

            txtCode = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "�����" };
            txtName = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "��� ������" };
            txtPhone = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "������" };
            txtEmail = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "������ ����������" };
            txtAddress = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Multiline = true,
                ScrollBars = ScrollBars.Vertical,
                PlaceholderText = "�������"
            };

            nudOpeningBalance = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                DecimalPlaces = 2,
                Minimum = 0,
                Maximum = 100000000,
                ThousandsSeparator = true
            };

            txtCurrentBalance = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ReadOnly = true
            };

            chkIsActive = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "���",
                Checked = true,
                Dock = DockStyle.Left
            };

            btnSave = new Button
            {
                Text = "���",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 35
            };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button
            {
                Text = "�����",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 35,
                DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel
            };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("�����:", txtCode), 0, 0);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("��� ������:", txtName), 0, 1);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������:", txtPhone), 0, 2);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������ ����������:", txtEmail), 0, 3);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("�������:", txtAddress), 0, 4);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������ ���������:", nudOpeningBalance), 0, 5);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������ ������:", txtCurrentBalance), 0, 6);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(chkIsActive, 0, 7);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel, 0, 8);

            Controls.Add(mainPanel);

            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;

            nudOpeningBalance.Enabled = !_supplierId.HasValue;
        }

        private Panel CreateLabeledPanel(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };

            var label = new Label
            {
                Text = labelText,
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 22,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleRight
            };

            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);

            return panel;
        }

        private async Task LoadFormAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                if (!_supplierId.HasValue)
                {
                    txtCurrentBalance.Text = "0.00";
                    return;
                }

                UseWaitCursor = true;

                var supplier = await _supplierApiService.GetByIdAsync(_supplierId.Value);

                if (supplier is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("������ ��� �����.", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                    Close();
                    return;
                }

                txtCode.Text = supplier.Code ?? string.Empty;
                txtName.Text = supplier.Name;
                txtPhone.Text = supplier.Phone ?? string.Empty;
                txtEmail.Text = supplier.Email ?? string.Empty;
                txtAddress.Text = supplier.Address ?? string.Empty;
                chkIsActive.Checked = supplier.IsActive;
                nudOpeningBalance.Value = supplier.OpeningBalance;
                txtCurrentBalance.Text = supplier.CurrentBalance.ToString("N2");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                Close();
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
            }
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (!ValidateForm())
                return;

            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                btnSave.Enabled = false;

                if (_supplierId.HasValue)
                {
                    var request = BuildUpdateRequest();
                    await _supplierApiService.UpdateAsync(_supplierId.Value, request);
                    MessageBox.Show("�� ����� ������ �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }
                else
                {
                    var request = BuildCreateRequest();
                    await _supplierApiService.CreateAsync(request);
                    MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ������ �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }

                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
                btnSave.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        private bool ValidateForm()
        {
            _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, string.Empty);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtName.Text))
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, "��� ������ �����.");
                return false;
            }

            return true;
        }

        private CreateSupplierRequestDto BuildCreateRequest()
        {
            return new CreateSupplierRequestDto
            {
                Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text),
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                Phone = TrimToNull(txtPhone.Text),
                Email = TrimToNull(txtEmail.Text),
                Address = TrimToNull(txtAddress.Text),
                OpeningBalance = nudOpeningBalance.Value,
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private UpdateSupplierRequestDto BuildUpdateRequest()
        {
            return new UpdateSupplierRequestDto
            {
                Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text),
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                Phone = TrimToNull(txtPhone.Text),
                Email = TrimToNull(txtEmail.Text),
                Address = TrimToNull(txtAddress.Text),
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

# **Purchases Module ����**

{
    public class PurchaseInvoiceItemDto
    {
        public int PurchaseInvoiceItemId { get; set; }
        public int ProductId { get; set; }
        public string ProductName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public decimal Quantity { get; set; }
        public decimal UnitCost { get; set; }
        public decimal DiscountAmount { get; set; }

## `PurchaseInvoiceDto.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Purchases
{
    public class PurchaseInvoiceDto
    {
        public int PurchaseInvoiceId { get; set; }
        public string InvoiceNo { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public int SupplierId { get; set; }
        public string SupplierName { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public int WarehouseId { get; set; }
        public string WarehouseName { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        public DateTime InvoiceDate { get; set; }
        public DateTime? DueDate { get; set; }

        public InvoicePaymentTypeDto PaymentType { get; set; }

        public decimal SubTotal { get; set; }
        public decimal DiscountAmount { get; set; }
        public decimal TaxAmount { get; set; }
        public decimal TotalAmount { get; set; }
        public decimal PaidAmount { get; set; }
        public decimal DueAmount { get; set; }

        public string? Notes { get; set; }
        public InvoiceStatusDto Status { get; set; }

        public int? CreatedByUserId { get; set; }
        public string? CreatedByUserName { get; set; }

        public List<PurchaseInvoiceItemDto> Items { get; set; } = [];
    }
}
```

        [Range(0.001, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal Quantity { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal UnitCost { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Purchases
{
    public class CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto
    {
        [Required]
        public int SupplierId { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public int WarehouseId { get; set; }

        public DateTime InvoiceDate { get; set; } = DateTime.Now;
        public DateTime? DueDate { get; set; }

        public InvoicePaymentTypeDto PaymentType { get; set; } = InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash;

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal DiscountAmount { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal TaxAmount { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal PaidAmount { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(500)]
        public string? Notes { get; set; }

        [Required]
        public List<CreatePurchaseInvoiceItemRequestDto> Items { get; set; } = [];
    }
}

## `PurchaseMappingProfile.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using ContractEnums = SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Purchases;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using DomainEnums = SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class PurchaseMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public PurchaseMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<PurchaseInvoiceItem, PurchaseInvoiceItemDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.ProductName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Product != null ? s.Product.Name : string.Empty));

            CreateMap<PurchaseInvoice, PurchaseInvoiceDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Supplier != null ? s.Supplier.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Warehouse != null ? s.Warehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUserName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.CreatedByUser != null ? s.CreatedByUser.FullName : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentType,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoicePaymentTypeDto)s.PaymentType))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoiceStatusDto)s.Status))
                .ForMember(d => d.DueDate,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.DueDate.HasValue
                        ? s.DueDate.Value.ToDateTime(TimeOnly.MinValue)
                        : (DateTime?)null))
                .ForMember(d => d.Items, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Items));

            CreateMap<PurchaseInvoice, PurchaseInvoiceListDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Supplier != null ? s.Supplier.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Warehouse != null ? s.Warehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentType,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoicePaymentTypeDto)s.PaymentType))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoiceStatusDto)s.Status));

            CreateMap<CreatePurchaseInvoiceItemRequestDto, PurchaseInvoiceItem>()
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoiceItemId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoice, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Product, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.LineTotal, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto, PurchaseInvoice>()
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoiceId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.InvoiceNo, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Supplier, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Warehouse, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Items, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUser, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentType,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (DomainEnums.InvoicePaymentType)s.PaymentType))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(_ => DomainEnums.InvoiceStatus.Posted))
                .ForMember(d => d.DueDate,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.DueDate.HasValue
                        ? DateOnly.FromDateTime(s.DueDate.Value)
                        : (DateOnly?)null));
        }
    }
}
```

## `PurchaseService.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Purchases;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class PurchaseService : IPurchaseService
    {
        private readonly IPurchaseInvoiceRepository _purchaseInvoiceRepository;
        private readonly IProductRepository _productRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseRepository _warehouseRepository;
        private readonly ISupplierRepository _supplierRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseStockRepository _warehouseStockRepository;
        private readonly IInventoryMovementRepository _inventoryMovementRepository;
        private readonly IInvoiceNumberGenerator _invoiceNumberGenerator;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public PurchaseService(
            IPurchaseInvoiceRepository purchaseInvoiceRepository,
            IProductRepository productRepository,
            IWarehouseRepository warehouseRepository,
            ISupplierRepository supplierRepository,
            IWarehouseStockRepository warehouseStockRepository,
            IInventoryMovementRepository inventoryMovementRepository,
            IInvoiceNumberGenerator invoiceNumberGenerator,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _purchaseInvoiceRepository = purchaseInvoiceRepository;
            _productRepository = productRepository;
            _warehouseRepository = warehouseRepository;
            _supplierRepository = supplierRepository;
            _warehouseStockRepository = warehouseStockRepository;
            _inventoryMovementRepository = inventoryMovementRepository;
            _invoiceNumberGenerator = invoiceNumberGenerator;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            if (request is null)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Request is required.");

            if (request.Items is null || request.Items.Count == 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Purchase invoice must contain at least one item.");

            if (request.SupplierId <= 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier is required.");

            if (request.WarehouseId <= 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse is required.");

            var supplier = await _supplierRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.SupplierId, cancellationToken);
            if (supplier is null || !supplier.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier not found or inactive.");

            var warehouse = await _warehouseRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.WarehouseId, cancellationToken);
            if (warehouse is null || !warehouse.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse not found or inactive.");

            if (request.PaymentType != InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash && !request.DueDate.HasValue)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Due date is required for credit or mixed purchases.");

            var invoiceItems = new List<PurchaseInvoiceItem>();
            decimal subTotal = 0m;

            foreach (var item in request.Items)
            {
                if (item.ProductId <= 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Invalid product.");

                if (item.Quantity <= 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Item quantity must be greater than zero.");

                if (item.UnitCost < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Unit cost cannot be negative.");

                if (item.DiscountAmount < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Item discount cannot be negative.");

                var product = await _productRepository.GetByIdAsync(item.ProductId, cancellationToken);
                if (product is null || !product.IsActive)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Product not found or inactive. ProductId={item.ProductId}");

                var unitCost = item.UnitCost == 0 ? product.PurchasePrice : item.UnitCost;
                var lineGross = item.Quantity * unitCost;

                if (item.DiscountAmount > lineGross)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Item discount exceeds line amount for product '{product.Name}'.");

                var lineTotal = lineGross - item.DiscountAmount;
                if (lineTotal < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Invalid line total for product '{product.Name}'.");

                invoiceItems.Add(new PurchaseInvoiceItem
                {
                    ProductId = product.ProductId,
                    Quantity = item.Quantity,
                    UnitCost = unitCost,
                    DiscountAmount = item.DiscountAmount,
                    LineTotal = lineTotal,
                    Notes = item.Notes
                });

                subTotal += lineTotal;
            }

            var totalAmount = subTotal - request.DiscountAmount + request.TaxAmount;
            if (totalAmount < 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Total amount cannot be negative.");

            decimal paidAmount = request.PaymentType switch
            {
                InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash => totalAmount,
                InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit => 0m,
                InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Mixed => request.PaidAmount,
                _ => request.PaidAmount
            };

            if (request.PaymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash &&
                request.PaidAmount != 0m &&
                request.PaidAmount != totalAmount)
            {
                return Result<int>.Failure("Paid amount for cash purchase must equal total or be zero.");
            }

            if (request.PaymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit && request.PaidAmount != 0m)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Paid amount must be zero for credit purchases.");

            if (request.PaymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Mixed &&
                (paidAmount < 0m || paidAmount > totalAmount))
            {
                return Result<int>.Failure("Paid amount for mixed purchase must be between 0 and total amount.");
            }

            var dueAmount = totalAmount - paidAmount;

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                var invoiceNo = await _invoiceNumberGenerator.GeneratePurchaseInvoiceNoAsync(cancellationToken);

                var invoice = new PurchaseInvoice
                {
                    InvoiceNo = invoiceNo,
                    SupplierId = request.SupplierId,
                    WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                    InvoiceDate = request.InvoiceDate,
                    DueDate = request.DueDate.HasValue
                        ? DateOnly.FromDateTime(request.DueDate.Value)
                        : null,
                    PaymentType = (InvoicePaymentType)request.PaymentType,
                    SubTotal = subTotal,
                    DiscountAmount = request.DiscountAmount,
                    TaxAmount = request.TaxAmount,
                    TotalAmount = totalAmount,
                    PaidAmount = paidAmount,
                    DueAmount = dueAmount,
                    Notes = request.Notes,
                    Status = InvoiceStatus.Posted,
                    CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
                    Items = invoiceItems
                };

                await _purchaseInvoiceRepository.AddAsync(invoice, cancellationToken);
                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

                foreach (var item in invoiceItems)
                {
                    var stock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                        request.WarehouseId,
                        item.ProductId,
                        cancellationToken);

                    if (stock is null)
                    {
                        stock = new WarehouseStock
                        {
                            WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            Quantity = 0m,
                            UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
                        };

                        await _warehouseStockRepository.AddAsync(stock, cancellationToken);
                    }

                    stock.Quantity += item.Quantity;
                    stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    await _inventoryMovementRepository.AddAsync(
                        new InventoryMovement
                        {
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                            MovementType = InventoryMovementType.PurchaseIn,
                            ReferenceType = "PurchaseInvoice",
                            ReferenceId = invoice.PurchaseInvoiceId,
                            Quantity = item.Quantity,
                            UnitCost = item.UnitCost,
                            MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow,
                            Notes = "Purchase invoice stock in",
                            CreatedByUserId = invoice.CreatedByUserId
                        },
                        cancellationToken);
                }

                if (dueAmount > 0m)
                {
                    supplier.CurrentBalance += dueAmount;
                    supplier.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                }

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result<int>.Success(invoice.PurchaseInvoiceId);
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _purchaseInvoiceRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null)
                return Result<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>.Failure("Purchase invoice not found.");

            var dto = _mapper.Map<PurchaseInvoiceDto>(entity);
            return Result<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>.Success(dto);
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _purchaseInvoiceRepository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var mapped = _mapper.Map<List<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>.Success(
                new PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>
                {
                    Items = mapped,
                    TotalCount = totalCount,
                    PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                    PageSize = request.PageSize
                });
        }

        public async Task<Result> CancelAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var invoice = await _purchaseInvoiceRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (invoice is null)
                return Result.Failure("Purchase invoice not found.");

            if (invoice.Status == InvoiceStatus.Cancelled)
                return Result.Success();

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                foreach (var item in invoice.Items)
                {
                    var stock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                        invoice.WarehouseId,
                        item.ProductId,
                        cancellationToken);

                    if (stock is null)
                        return Result.Failure($"Warehouse stock missing for productId={item.ProductId}");

                    if (stock.Quantity < item.Quantity)
                        return Result.Failure("Cannot cancel purchase invoice because current stock is less than purchased quantity.");

                    stock.Quantity -= item.Quantity;
                    stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    await _inventoryMovementRepository.AddAsync(
                        new InventoryMovement
                        {
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            WarehouseId = invoice.WarehouseId,
                            MovementType = InventoryMovementType.PurchaseReturnOut,
                            ReferenceType = "PurchaseInvoiceCancel",
                            ReferenceId = invoice.PurchaseInvoiceId,
                            Quantity = item.Quantity,
                            UnitCost = item.UnitCost,
                            MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow,
                            Notes = "Cancel purchase invoice - stock out",
                            CreatedByUserId = invoice.CreatedByUserId
                        },
                        cancellationToken);
                }

                if (invoice.SupplierId > 0 && invoice.DueAmount > 0m)
                {
                    var supplier = await _supplierRepository.GetByIdAsync(invoice.SupplierId, cancellationToken);
                    if (supplier is not null)
                    {
                        supplier.CurrentBalance -= invoice.DueAmount;
                        if (supplier.CurrentBalance < 0m)
                            supplier.CurrentBalance = 0m;

                        supplier.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                    }
                }

                invoice.Status = InvoiceStatus.Cancelled;
                invoice.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result.Success();
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<PurchaseSummaryDto>> GetSummaryAsync(
            PurchaseSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var summary = await _purchaseInvoiceRepository.GetSummaryAsync(
                request.From,
                request.To,
                request.WarehouseId,
                cancellationToken);

            return Result<PurchaseSummaryDto>.Success(summary);
        }
    }
}
```

# 3) Infrastructure

## ����� `IInvoiceNumberGenerator`
��� ��� ������ ��� �������:

```csharp
Task<string> GeneratePurchaseInvoiceNoAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
```

---

## ����� `InvoiceNumberGenerator.cs`
��� ��� �������:

```csharp
public async Task<string> GeneratePurchaseInvoiceNoAsync(
    CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
{
    var prefix = $"PUR-{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd}-";

    var lastInvoiceNo = await _context.PurchaseInvoices
        .AsNoTracking()
        .Where(x => x.InvoiceNo.StartsWith(prefix))
        .OrderByDescending(x => x.InvoiceNo)
        .Select(x => x.InvoiceNo)
        .FirstOrDefaultAsync(cancellationToken);

    int nextNumber = 1;

    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(lastInvoiceNo))
    {
        var suffix = lastInvoiceNo.Replace(prefix, "");
        if (int.TryParse(suffix, out var currentNumber))
            nextNumber = currentNumber + 1;
    }

    return $"{prefix}{nextNumber:D4}";
}
```

---

## `PurchaseInvoiceRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Purchases;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class PurchaseInvoiceRepository : IPurchaseInvoiceRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public PurchaseInvoiceRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(
            PurchaseInvoice invoice,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.PurchaseInvoices.AddAsync(invoice, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<PurchaseInvoice?> GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.PurchaseInvoices
                .Include(x => x.Supplier)
                .Include(x => x.Warehouse)
                .Include(x => x.CreatedByUser)
                .Include(x => x.Items)
                    .ThenInclude(x => x.Product)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.PurchaseInvoiceId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<PurchaseInvoice> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.PurchaseInvoices
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Include(x => x.Supplier)
                .Include(x => x.Warehouse)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.InvoiceNo.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Supplier != null && x.Supplier.Name.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);

            var items = await query
                .OrderByDescending(x => x.InvoiceDate)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<PurchaseSummaryDto> GetSummaryAsync(
            DateTime? from,
            DateTime? to,
            int? warehouseId,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.PurchaseInvoices.AsNoTracking().AsQueryable();

            if (from.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.InvoiceDate >= from.Value);

            if (to.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.InvoiceDate <= to.Value);

            if (warehouseId.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.WarehouseId == warehouseId.Value);

            return new PurchaseSummaryDto
            {
                TotalInvoices = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken),
                TotalPurchases = await query.SumAsync(x => (decimal?)x.TotalAmount, cancellationToken) ?? 0m,
                TotalPaid = await query.SumAsync(x => (decimal?)x.PaidAmount, cancellationToken) ?? 0m,
                TotalDue = await query.SumAsync(x => (decimal?)x.DueAmount, cancellationToken) ?? 0m
            };
        }
    }
}
```

# 4) API
