---

## `PurchasesController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Purchases;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/purchases")]
    public class PurchasesController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IPurchaseService _purchaseService;

        public PurchasesController(IPurchaseService purchaseService)
        {
            _purchaseService = purchaseService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _purchaseService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _purchaseService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _purchaseService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Purchase invoice created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPost("{id:int}/cancel")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Cancel(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _purchaseService.CancelAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Purchase invoice cancelled successfully"));
        }

        [HttpGet("summary")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PurchaseSummaryDto>>> Summary(
            [FromQuery] PurchaseSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _purchaseService.GetSummaryAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PurchaseSummaryDto>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PurchaseSummaryDto>.Success(result.Data!));
        }
    }
}
```

## `IPurchaseApiService.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Purchases;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface IPurchaseApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<PurchaseInvoiceDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task CancelAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<PurchaseSummaryDto> GetSummaryAsync(
            PurchaseSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

---

## `PurchaseApiService.cs`
```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Purchases;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class PurchaseApiService : ApiServiceBase, IPurchaseApiService
    {
        public PurchaseApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient)
        {
        }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/purchases?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm))
                url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<PurchaseInvoiceDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/purchases/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<PurchaseInvoiceDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/purchases", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task CancelAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsync($"api/purchases/{id}/cancel", null, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<PurchaseSummaryDto> GetSummaryAsync(
            PurchaseSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/purchases/summary?";

            if (request.From.HasValue)
                url += $"from={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.From.Value.ToString("O"))}&";

            if (request.To.HasValue)
                url += $"to={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.To.Value.ToString("O"))}&";

            if (request.WarehouseId.HasValue)
                url += $"warehouseId={request.WarehouseId.Value}&";

            url = url.TrimEnd('&', '?');

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PurchaseSummaryDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `PurchasesListControl.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Purchases;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Purchases;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Purchases
{
    public class PurchasesListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly IPurchaseApiService _purchaseApiService;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;
        private Button btnSummary = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvPurchases = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public PurchasesListControl(IPurchaseApiService purchaseApiService)
        {
            _purchaseApiService = purchaseApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadPurchasesAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            var topPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 50, Padding = new Padding(8) };

            txtSearch = new TextBox
            {
                Width = 260,
                PlaceholderText = "���� ���� �������� �� ��� ������..."
            };

            btnSearch = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadPurchasesAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                txtSearch.Clear();
                await LoadPurchasesAsync();
            };

            btnAdd = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button { Text = "����� ������", Width = 100 };
            btnCancel.Click += async (_, _) => await CancelSelectedAsync();

            btnSummary = new Button { Text = "����", Width = 80 };
            btnSummary.Click += async (_, _) => await ShowSummaryAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Right,
                Width = 470,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                WrapContents = false
            };

            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSummary);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnAdd);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnRefresh);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSearch);

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvPurchases = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ReadOnly = true,
                AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
                MultiSelect = false,
                AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvPurchases.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvPurchases.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
            {
                // ������ ���� ��� ���� ��������
                await Task.CompletedTask;
            };

            lblStatus = new Label
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Bottom,
                Height = 24,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft,
                Padding = new Padding(8, 0, 0, 0),
                Text = "����"
            };

            Controls.Add(dgvPurchases);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadPurchasesAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);

                var result = await _purchaseApiService.GetPagedAsync(
                    new PagedQueryRequestDto
                    {
                        PageNumber = 1,
                        PageSize = 200,
                        SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text
                    });

                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"��� ��������: {result.TotalCount}";

                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "��� ��� ����� ����� ������ ������";
            }
            finally
            {
                SetBusy(false);
            }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvPurchases.Columns.Count == 0)
                return;

            HideIfExists("PurchaseInvoiceId");
            HideIfExists("CreatedByUserId");

            SetHeader("InvoiceNo", "��� ��������");
            SetHeader("SupplierName", "������");
            SetHeader("WarehouseName", "������");
            SetHeader("InvoiceDate", "�������");
            SetHeader("PaymentType", "�����");
            SetHeader("TotalAmount", "��������");
            SetHeader("PaidAmount", "�������");
            SetHeader("DueAmount", "�������");
            SetHeader("Status", "������");
        }

        private void HideIfExists(string columnName)
        {
            if (dgvPurchases.Columns.Contains(columnName))
                dgvPurchases.Columns[columnName].Visible = false;
        }

        private void SetHeader(string columnName, string text)
        {
            if (dgvPurchases.Columns.Contains(columnName))
                dgvPurchases.Columns[columnName].HeaderText = text;
        }

        private int? GetSelectedPurchaseId()
        {
            if (dgvPurchases.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not PurchaseInvoiceListDto row)
                return null;

            return row.PurchaseInvoiceId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync()
        {
            using var form = new PurchaseEditorForm(
                FindForm()?.Tag as IServiceProvider ?? throw new InvalidOperationException("ServiceProvider not available"));

            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();

            if (result == DialogResult.OK)
                await LoadPurchasesAsync();
        }

        private async Task CancelSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedPurchaseId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                return;
            }

            var confirm = MessageBox.Show(
                "�� ���� ����� ��� �������ɿ",
                "�����",
                MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                MessageBoxIcon.Question);

            if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes)
                return;

            try
            {
                await _purchaseApiService.CancelAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadPurchasesAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private async Task ShowSummaryAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                var summary = await _purchaseApiService.GetSummaryAsync(new PurchaseSummaryRequestDto
                {
                    From = DateTime.Today.AddDays(-30),
                    To = DateTime.Today
                });

                MessageBox.Show(
                    $"��� ��������: {summary.TotalInvoices}\n" +
                    $"������ ������: {summary.TotalPurchases:N2}\n" +
                    $"�������: {summary.TotalPaid:N2}\n" +
                    $"�������: {summary.TotalDue:N2}",
                    "���� ������",
                    MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                    MessageBoxIcon.Information);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;

            txtSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnRefresh.Enabled = !busy;
            btnAdd.Enabled = !busy;
            btnCancel.Enabled = !busy;
            btnSummary.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}
```

> ������: `OpenEditorAsync` ��� ����� ��� `ServiceProvider` ���� `Form.Tag`.

## `PurchaseEditorForm.cs`
��� ������ ���� ������ ������ ���� ����� �� �������.

```csharp
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Purchases;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Warehouses;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Purchases
{
    public class PurchaseEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;
        private readonly IPurchaseApiService _purchaseApiService;
        private readonly IProductApiService _productApiService;
        private readonly ISupplierApiService _supplierApiService;
        private readonly IWarehouseApiService _warehouseApiService;

        private readonly BindingList<PurchaseItemRowVm> _items = new();

        private ComboBox cmbSupplier = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbWarehouse = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbPaymentType = null!;
        private DateTimePicker dtInvoiceDate = null!;
        private DateTimePicker? dtDueDate = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudDiscount = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudTax = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudPaid = null!;
        private TextBox txtNotes = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbProduct = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudQty = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudUnitCost = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudItemDiscount = null!;
        private TextBox txtItemNotes = null!;
        private Button btnAddItem = null!;
        private Button btnRemoveItem = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvItems = null!;
        private Label lblSubTotal = null!;
        private Label lblTotal = null!;
        private Label lblDue = null!;

        private List<ProductLookupDto> _products = [];
        private List<SupplierLookupDto> _suppliers = [];
        private List<WarehouseLookupDto> _warehouses = [];

        public PurchaseEditorForm(IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
        {
            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;

            _purchaseApiService = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<IPurchaseApiService>();
            _productApiService = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<IProductApiService>();
            _supplierApiService = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<ISupplierApiService>();
            _warehouseApiService = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<IWarehouseApiService>();

            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadLookupsAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = "����� ������ ����";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            WindowState = FormWindowState.Maximized;
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;

            var root = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ColumnCount = 2,
                RowCount = 2,
                Padding = new Padding(10)
            };

            root.ColumnStyles.Add(new ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 70));
            root.ColumnStyles.Add(new ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 30));
            root.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 70));
            root.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 30));

            dgvItems = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                AutoGenerateColumns = true,
                AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                ReadOnly = true,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
                DataSource = _items
            };

            var leftPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };

            var topForm = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                AutoSize = true,
                WrapContents = true
            };

            cmbSupplier = CreateCombo();
            cmbWarehouse = CreateCombo();
            cmbPaymentType = CreateCombo();
            cmbPaymentType.DataSource = Enum.GetValues(typeof(InvoicePaymentTypeDto));

            dtInvoiceDate = new DateTimePicker { Width = 160, Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Custom, CustomFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm" };
            dtDueDate = new DateTimePicker { Width = 160, Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Custom, CustomFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm" };

            nudDiscount = CreateMoney();
            nudTax = CreateMoney();
            nudPaid = CreateMoney();

            txtNotes = new TextBox { Width = 240, PlaceholderText = "������� ��������" };

            topForm.Controls.Add(Wrap("������", cmbSupplier));
            topForm.Controls.Add(Wrap("������", cmbWarehouse));
            topForm.Controls.Add(Wrap("��� �����", cmbPaymentType));
            topForm.Controls.Add(Wrap("����� ��������", dtInvoiceDate));
            topForm.Controls.Add(Wrap("����� ���������", dtDueDate));
            topForm.Controls.Add(Wrap("�����", nudDiscount));
            topForm.Controls.Add(Wrap("�������", nudTax));
            topForm.Controls.Add(Wrap("�������", nudPaid));
            topForm.Controls.Add(Wrap("�������", txtNotes));

            var itemPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                AutoSize = true,
                WrapContents = true
            };

            cmbProduct = CreateCombo();
            nudQty = CreateMoney(3);
            nudUnitCost = CreateMoney();
            nudItemDiscount = CreateMoney();
            txtItemNotes = new TextBox { Width = 180, PlaceholderText = "������� �����" };

            btnAddItem = new Button { Text = "����� �����", Width = 110, Height = 30 };
            btnAddItem.Click += (_, _) => AddItem();

            btnRemoveItem = new Button { Text = "��� �����", Width = 110, Height = 30 };
            btnRemoveItem.Click += (_, _) => RemoveSelectedItem();

            cmbProduct.SelectedIndexChanged += (_, _) => FillUnitCostFromProduct();
            nudQty.ValueChanged += (_, _) => RecalcTotals();
            nudUnitCost.ValueChanged += (_, _) => RecalcTotals();
            nudItemDiscount.ValueChanged += (_, _) => RecalcTotals();
            nudDiscount.ValueChanged += (_, _) => RecalcTotals();
            nudTax.ValueChanged += (_, _) => RecalcTotals();
            nudPaid.ValueChanged += (_, _) => RecalcTotals();

            itemPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("������", cmbProduct));
            itemPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("������", nudQty));
            itemPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("��� ������", nudUnitCost));
            itemPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("��� �����", nudItemDiscount));
            itemPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("�������", txtItemNotes));
            itemPanel.Controls.Add(btnAddItem);
            itemPanel.Controls.Add(btnRemoveItem);

            var details = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            details.Controls.Add(itemPanel);
            details.Controls.Add(topForm);
            details.Controls.Add(dgvItems);

            var bottomPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                AutoSize = true
            };

            lblSubTotal = new Label { AutoSize = true, Text = "�������� ������: 0.00" };
            lblTotal = new Label { AutoSize = true, Text = "��������: 0.00" };
            lblDue = new Label { AutoSize = true, Text = "�������: 0.00" };

            btnSave = new Button { Text = "��� ��������", Width = 130, Height = 35 };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 100, Height = 35, DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            bottomPanel.Controls.Add(lblSubTotal);
            bottomPanel.Controls.Add(lblTotal);
            bottomPanel.Controls.Add(lblDue);
            bottomPanel.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            bottomPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            root.Controls.Add(details, 0, 0);
            root.SetColumnSpan(details, 2);
            root.Controls.Add(bottomPanel, 0, 1);
            root.SetColumnSpan(bottomPanel, 2);

            Controls.Add(root);

            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;
        }

        private async Task LoadLookupsAsync()
        {
            var suppliersTask = _supplierApiService.GetLookupAsync();
            var warehousesTask = _warehouseApiService.GetLookupAsync();
            var productsTask = _productApiService.GetLookupAsync();

            await Task.WhenAll(suppliersTask, warehousesTask, productsTask);

            _suppliers = suppliersTask.Result.ToList();
            _warehouses = warehousesTask.Result.ToList();
            _products = productsTask.Result.ToList();

            cmbSupplier.DataSource = _suppliers;
            cmbSupplier.DisplayMember = nameof(SupplierLookupDto.Name);
            cmbSupplier.ValueMember = nameof(SupplierLookupDto.SupplierId);

            cmbWarehouse.DataSource = _warehouses;
            cmbWarehouse.DisplayMember = nameof(WarehouseLookupDto.Name);
            cmbWarehouse.ValueMember = nameof(WarehouseLookupDto.WarehouseId);

            cmbProduct.DataSource = _products;
            cmbProduct.DisplayMember = nameof(ProductLookupDto.Name);
            cmbProduct.ValueMember = nameof(ProductLookupDto.ProductId);

            if (_warehouses.Count > 0)
                cmbWarehouse.SelectedIndex = _warehouses.FindIndex(x => x.IsDefault) switch { -1 => 0, var idx => idx };

            if (_products.Count > 0)
                cmbProduct.SelectedIndex = 0;

            dtInvoiceDate.Value = DateTime.Now;
            RecalcTotals();
        }

        private void FillUnitCostFromProduct()
        {
            if (cmbProduct.SelectedItem is not ProductLookupDto product)
                return;

            nudUnitCost.Value = product.PurchasePrice;
        }

        private void AddItem()
        {
            if (cmbProduct.SelectedItem is not ProductLookupDto product)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                return;
            }

            if (nudQty.Value <= 0)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("������ ��� �� ���� ���� �� ���.");
                return;
            }

            var row = new PurchaseItemRowVm
            {
                ProductId = product.ProductId,
                ProductName = product.Name,
                Quantity = nudQty.Value,
                UnitCost = nudUnitCost.Value,
                DiscountAmount = nudItemDiscount.Value,
                Notes = TrimToNull(txtItemNotes.Text)
            };

            if (row.DiscountAmount > row.Quantity * row.UnitCost)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ���� �� ���� �����.");
                return;
            }

            _items.Add(row);
            RecalcTotals();

            nudQty.Value = 1;
            nudItemDiscount.Value = 0;
            txtItemNotes.Clear();
            if (_products.Count > 0)
                cmbProduct.SelectedIndex = 0;
        }

        private void RemoveSelectedItem()
        {
            if (dgvItems.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not PurchaseItemRowVm row)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ����� �����.");
                return;
            }

            _items.Remove(row);
            RecalcTotals();
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                if (_items.Count == 0)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ������ ��� �����.");
                    return;
                }

                if (cmbSupplier.SelectedItem is not SupplierLookupDto supplier)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("���� ������.");
                    return;
                }

                if (cmbWarehouse.SelectedItem is not WarehouseLookupDto warehouse)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("���� ������.");
                    return;
                }

                var total = CalculateTotal();
                var paymentType = (InvoicePaymentTypeDto)cmbPaymentType.SelectedItem!;

                if (paymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash)
                {
                    nudPaid.Value = total;
                }

                if (paymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit && nudPaid.Value != 0)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("������� ��� �� ���� ����� ��� ������ ������.");
                    return;
                }

                var request = new CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto
                {
                    SupplierId = supplier.SupplierId,
                    WarehouseId = warehouse.WarehouseId,
                    InvoiceDate = dtInvoiceDate.Value,
                    DueDate = paymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash ? null : dtDueDate?.Value,
                    PaymentType = paymentType,
                    DiscountAmount = nudDiscount.Value,
                    TaxAmount = nudTax.Value,
                    PaidAmount = nudPaid.Value,
                    Notes = TrimToNull(txtNotes.Text),
                    Items = _items.Select(x => new CreatePurchaseInvoiceItemRequestDto
                    {
                        ProductId = x.ProductId,
                        Quantity = x.Quantity,
                        UnitCost = x.UnitCost,
                        DiscountAmount = x.DiscountAmount,
                        Notes = x.Notes
                    }).ToList()
                };

                var confirm = MessageBox.Show(
                    "�� ���� ��� ������ �������",
                    "�����",
                    MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                    MessageBoxIcon.Question);

                if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes)
                    return;

                var id = await _purchaseApiService.CreateAsync(request);
                MessageBox.Show($"�� ��� �������� �����. ��� �����: {id}", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);

                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private void RecalcTotals()
        {
            var subTotal = _items.Sum(x => x.LineTotal);
            var total = CalculateTotal();

            lblSubTotal.Text = $"�������� ������: {subTotal:N2}";
            lblTotal.Text = $"��������: {total:N2}";
            lblDue.Text = $"�������: {(total - nudPaid.Value):N2}";
        }

        private decimal CalculateTotal()
        {
            var subTotal = _items.Sum(x => x.LineTotal);
            var total = subTotal - nudDiscount.Value + nudTax.Value;
            if (total < 0) total = 0;
            return total;
        }

        private static Panel Wrap(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Width = 220, Height = 60, Margin = new Padding(5) };
            var label = new Label { Text = labelText, Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 18 };
            control.Dock = DockStyle.Bottom;
            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);
            return panel;
        }

        private static ComboBox CreateCombo()
        {
            return new ComboBox
            {
                Width = 200,
                DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList
            };
        }

        private static NumericUpDown CreateMoney(int decimals = 2)
        {
            return new NumericUpDown
            {
                Width = 120,
                DecimalPlaces = decimals,
                Minimum = 0,
                Maximum = 100000000,
                ThousandsSeparator = true
            };
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;
            return value.Trim();
        }

        private sealed class PurchaseItemRowVm
        {
            public int ProductId { get; set; }
            public string ProductName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
            public decimal Quantity { get; set; }
            public decimal UnitCost { get; set; }
            public decimal DiscountAmount { get; set; }
            public string? Notes { get; set; }
            public decimal LineTotal => (Quantity * UnitCost) - DiscountAmount;
        }
    }
}
```

## `SalesMappingProfile.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using ContractEnums = SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Sales;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using DomainEnums = SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class SalesMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public SalesMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<SalesInvoiceItem, SalesInvoiceItemDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.ProductName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Product != null ? s.Product.Name : string.Empty));

            CreateMap<SalesInvoice, SalesInvoiceDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Customer != null ? s.Customer.Name : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Warehouse != null ? s.Warehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUserName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.CreatedByUser != null ? s.CreatedByUser.FullName : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentType,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoicePaymentTypeDto)s.PaymentType))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoiceStatusDto)s.Status))
                .ForMember(d => d.DueDate,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.DueDate.HasValue
                        ? s.DueDate.Value.ToDateTime(TimeOnly.MinValue)
                        : (DateTime?)null))
                .ForMember(d => d.Items, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Items));

            CreateMap<SalesInvoice, SalesInvoiceListDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Customer != null ? s.Customer.Name : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Warehouse != null ? s.Warehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentType,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoicePaymentTypeDto)s.PaymentType))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoiceStatusDto)s.Status));

            CreateMap<CreateSalesInvoiceItemRequestDto, SalesInvoiceItem>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoiceItemId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoice, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Product, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.LineTotal, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto, SalesInvoice>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoiceId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.InvoiceNo, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Customer, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Warehouse, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Items, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUser, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentType,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (DomainEnums.InvoicePaymentType)s.PaymentType))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(_ => DomainEnums.InvoiceStatus.Posted))
                .ForMember(d => d.DueDate,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.DueDate.HasValue
                        ? DateOnly.FromDateTime(s.DueDate.Value)
                        : (DateOnly?)null));
        }
    }
}
```

## `SalesInvoiceRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Sales;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class SalesInvoiceRepository : ISalesInvoiceRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public SalesInvoiceRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(
            SalesInvoice invoice,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.SalesInvoices.AddAsync(invoice, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<SalesInvoice?> GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.SalesInvoices
                .Include(x => x.Customer)
                .Include(x => x.Warehouse)
                .Include(x => x.CreatedByUser)
                .Include(x => x.Items)
                    .ThenInclude(x => x.Product)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.SalesInvoiceId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<SalesInvoice> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.SalesInvoices
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Include(x => x.Customer)
                .Include(x => x.Warehouse)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.InvoiceNo.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Customer != null && x.Customer.Name.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);

            var items = await query
                .OrderByDescending(x => x.InvoiceDate)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<SalesSummaryDto> GetSummaryAsync(
            DateTime? from,
            DateTime? to,
            int? warehouseId,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.SalesInvoices.AsNoTracking().AsQueryable();

            if (from.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.InvoiceDate >= from.Value);

            if (to.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.InvoiceDate <= to.Value);

            if (warehouseId.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.WarehouseId == warehouseId.Value);

            return new SalesSummaryDto
            {
                TotalInvoices = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken),
                TotalSales = await query.SumAsync(x => (decimal?)x.TotalAmount, cancellationToken) ?? 0m,
                TotalPaid = await query.SumAsync(x => (decimal?)x.PaidAmount, cancellationToken) ?? 0m,
                TotalDue = await query.SumAsync(x => (decimal?)x.DueAmount, cancellationToken) ?? 0m
            };
        }
    }
}
```

> ��� ��� `SalesService` ���� ������ �� ������ ������� ���ߡ �� ����� ����� ������.  
> ��� ������ �� ����� ����� ��� ��� ������.

# 3) API

��� ��� `SalesController` ������� ���� �� ������� ������ɡ ������.  
�� �� ��� ������ ���:

## `SalesController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Sales;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/sales")]
    public class SalesController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ISalesService _salesService;

        public SalesController(ISalesService salesService)
        {
            _salesService = salesService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _salesService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<SalesInvoiceDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _salesService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<SalesInvoiceDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<SalesInvoiceDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _salesService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Sales invoice created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPost("{id:int}/cancel")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Cancel(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _salesService.CancelAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Sales invoice cancelled successfully"));
        }

        [HttpGet("summary")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<SalesSummaryDto>>> Summary(
            [FromQuery] SalesSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _salesService.GetSummaryAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<SalesSummaryDto>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<SalesSummaryDto>.Success(result.Data!));
        }
    }
}
```

## `ISalesApiService.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Sales;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface ISalesApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<SalesInvoiceDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task CancelAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<SalesSummaryDto> GetSummaryAsync(
            SalesSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

## `SalesApiService.cs`
```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Sales;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class SalesApiService : ApiServiceBase, ISalesApiService
    {
        public SalesApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient)
        {
        }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/sales?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm))
                url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<SalesInvoiceDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/sales/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<SalesInvoiceDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/sales", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task CancelAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsync($"api/sales/{id}/cancel", null, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<SalesSummaryDto> GetSummaryAsync(
            SalesSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = "api/sales/summary?";

            if (request.From.HasValue)
                url += $"from={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.From.Value.ToString("O"))}&";

            if (request.To.HasValue)
                url += $"to={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.To.Value.ToString("O"))}&";

            if (request.WarehouseId.HasValue)
                url += $"warehouseId={request.WarehouseId.Value}&";

            url = url.TrimEnd('&', '?');

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<SalesSummaryDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `SalesListControl.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Sales;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Sales;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Sales
{
    public class SalesListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly ISalesApiService _salesApiService;
        private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;
        private Button btnSummary = null!;
        private Button btnView = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvSales = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public SalesListControl(
            ISalesApiService salesApiService,
            IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
        {
            _salesApiService = salesApiService;
            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;

            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadSalesAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            var topPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 50, Padding = new Padding(8) };

            txtSearch = new TextBox
            {
                Width = 260,
                PlaceholderText = "���� ���� �������� �� ��� ������..."
            };

            btnSearch = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadSalesAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                txtSearch.Clear();
                await LoadSalesAsync();
            };

            btnAdd = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button { Text = "����� ������", Width = 100 };
            btnCancel.Click += async (_, _) => await CancelSelectedAsync();

            btnSummary = new Button { Text = "����", Width = 80 };
            btnSummary.Click += async (_, _) => await ShowSummaryAsync();

            btnView = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnView.Click += async (_, _) => await ShowSelectedDetailsAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Right,
                Width = 560,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                WrapContents = false
            };

            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnView);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSummary);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnAdd);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnRefresh);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSearch);

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvSales = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ReadOnly = true,
                AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
                MultiSelect = false,
                AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvSales.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvSales.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) => await ShowSelectedDetailsAsync();

            lblStatus = new Label
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Bottom,
                Height = 24,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft,
                Padding = new Padding(8, 0, 0, 0),
                Text = "����"
            };

            Controls.Add(dgvSales);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadSalesAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);

                var result = await _salesApiService.GetPagedAsync(
                    new PagedQueryRequestDto
                    {
                        PageNumber = 1,
                        PageSize = 200,
                        SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text
                    });

                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"��� ��������: {result.TotalCount}";

                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "��� ��� ����� ����� ��������";
            }
            finally
            {
                SetBusy(false);
            }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvSales.Columns.Count == 0)
                return;

            HideIfExists("SalesInvoiceId");
            HideIfExists("CreatedByUserId");

            SetHeader("InvoiceNo", "��� ��������");
            SetHeader("CustomerName", "������");
            SetHeader("WarehouseName", "������");
            SetHeader("InvoiceDate", "�������");
            SetHeader("PaymentType", "�����");
            SetHeader("TotalAmount", "��������");
            SetHeader("PaidAmount", "�������");
            SetHeader("DueAmount", "�������");
            SetHeader("Status", "������");
        }

        private void HideIfExists(string columnName)
        {
            if (dgvSales.Columns.Contains(columnName))
                dgvSales.Columns[columnName].Visible = false;
        }

        private void SetHeader(string columnName, string text)
        {
            if (dgvSales.Columns.Contains(columnName))
                dgvSales.Columns[columnName].HeaderText = text;
        }

        private int? GetSelectedSaleId()
        {
            if (dgvSales.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not SalesInvoiceListDto row)
                return null;

            return row.SalesInvoiceId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync()
        {
            using var form = new SalesEditorForm(_serviceProvider);

            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();

            if (result == DialogResult.OK)
                await LoadSalesAsync();
        }

        private async Task CancelSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedSaleId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                return;
            }

            var confirm = MessageBox.Show(
                "�� ���� ����� ��� �������ɿ",
                "�����",
                MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                MessageBoxIcon.Question);

            if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes)
                return;

            try
            {
                await _salesApiService.CancelAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadSalesAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private async Task ShowSummaryAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                var summary = await _salesApiService.GetSummaryAsync(new SalesSummaryRequestDto
                {
                    From = DateTime.Today.AddDays(-30),
                    To = DateTime.Today
                });

                MessageBox.Show(
                    $"��� ��������: {summary.TotalInvoices}\n" +
                    $"������ ��������: {summary.TotalSales:N2}\n" +
                    $"�������: {summary.TotalPaid:N2}\n" +
                    $"�������: {summary.TotalDue:N2}",
                    "���� ��������",
                    MessageBoxButtons.OK,
                    MessageBoxIcon.Information);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private async Task ShowSelectedDetailsAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedSaleId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                return;
            }

            try
            {
                var invoice = await _salesApiService.GetByIdAsync(id.Value);
                if (invoice is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("�������� ��� ������.");
                    return;
                }

                var text =
                    $"��� ��������: {invoice.InvoiceNo}\n" +
                    $"������: {invoice.CustomerName}\n" +
                    $"������: {invoice.WarehouseName}\n" +
                    $"��������: {invoice.TotalAmount:N2}\n" +
                    $"�������: {invoice.PaidAmount:N2}\n" +
                    $"�������: {invoice.DueAmount:N2}\n" +
                    $"��� �������: {invoice.Items.Count}";

                MessageBox.Show(text, "������ ��������", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;

            txtSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnRefresh.Enabled = !busy;
            btnAdd.Enabled = !busy;
            btnCancel.Enabled = !busy;
            btnSummary.Enabled = !busy;
            btnView.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}
```

## `SalesEditorForm.cs`
```csharp
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Sales;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Warehouses;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Sales
{
    public class SalesEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;
        private readonly ISalesApiService _salesApiService;
        private readonly IProductApiService _productApiService;
        private readonly ICustomerApiService _customerApiService;
        private readonly IWarehouseApiService _warehouseApiService;

        private readonly BindingList<SalesItemRowVm> _items = new();

        private ComboBox cmbCustomer = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbWarehouse = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbPaymentType = null!;
        private DateTimePicker dtInvoiceDate = null!;
        private DateTimePicker dtDueDate = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudDiscount = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudTax = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudPaid = null!;
        private TextBox txtNotes = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbProduct = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudQty = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudUnitPrice = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudItemDiscount = null!;
        private TextBox txtItemNotes = null!;
        private Button btnAddItem = null!;
        private Button btnRemoveItem = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvItems = null!;
        private Label lblSubTotal = null!;
        private Label lblTotal = null!;
        private Label lblDue = null!;

        private List<ProductLookupDto> _products = [];
        private List<CustomerLookupDto> _customers = [];
        private List<WarehouseLookupDto> _warehouses = [];

        public SalesEditorForm(IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
        {
            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;

            _salesApiService = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<ISalesApiService>();
            _productApiService = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<IProductApiService>();
            _customerApiService = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<ICustomerApiService>();
            _warehouseApiService = serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<IWarehouseApiService>();

            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadLookupsAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = "����� ������ ���";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            WindowState = FormWindowState.Maximized;
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;

            var root = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ColumnCount = 1,
                RowCount = 3,
                Padding = new Padding(10)
            };

            root.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 180));
            root.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100));
            root.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 70));

            var headerPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                AutoSize = true,
                WrapContents = true
            };

            cmbCustomer = CreateCombo();
            cmbWarehouse = CreateCombo();
            cmbPaymentType = CreateCombo();
            cmbPaymentType.DataSource = Enum.GetValues(typeof(InvoicePaymentTypeDto));

            dtInvoiceDate = new DateTimePicker { Width = 160, Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Custom, CustomFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm" };
            dtDueDate = new DateTimePicker { Width = 160, Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Custom, CustomFormat = "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm" };

            nudDiscount = CreateMoney();
            nudTax = CreateMoney();
            nudPaid = CreateMoney();

            txtNotes = new TextBox { Width = 240, PlaceholderText = "������� ��������" };

            cmbPaymentType.SelectedIndexChanged += (_, _) => UpdatePaymentMode();
            nudDiscount.ValueChanged += (_, _) => RecalcTotals();
            nudTax.ValueChanged += (_, _) => RecalcTotals();
            nudPaid.ValueChanged += (_, _) => RecalcTotals();

            headerPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("������", cmbCustomer));
            headerPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("������", cmbWarehouse));
            headerPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("��� �����", cmbPaymentType));
            headerPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("����� ��������", dtInvoiceDate));
            headerPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("����� ���������", dtDueDate));
            headerPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("�����", nudDiscount));
            headerPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("�������", nudTax));
            headerPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("�������", nudPaid));
            headerPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("�������", txtNotes));

            var itemPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                AutoSize = true,
                WrapContents = true
            };

            cmbProduct = CreateCombo();
            nudQty = CreateMoney(3);
            nudUnitPrice = CreateMoney();
            nudItemDiscount = CreateMoney();
            txtItemNotes = new TextBox { Width = 180, PlaceholderText = "������� �����" };

            cmbProduct.SelectedIndexChanged += (_, _) => FillUnitPriceFromProduct();
            nudQty.ValueChanged += (_, _) => RecalcTotals();
            nudUnitPrice.ValueChanged += (_, _) => RecalcTotals();
            nudItemDiscount.ValueChanged += (_, _) => RecalcTotals();

            btnAddItem = new Button { Text = "����� �����", Width = 110, Height = 30 };
            btnAddItem.Click += (_, _) => AddItem();

            btnRemoveItem = new Button { Text = "��� �����", Width = 110, Height = 30 };
            btnRemoveItem.Click += (_, _) => RemoveSelectedItem();

            itemPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("������", cmbProduct));
            itemPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("������", nudQty));
            itemPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("��� �����", nudUnitPrice));
            itemPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("��� �����", nudItemDiscount));
            itemPanel.Controls.Add(Wrap("�������", txtItemNotes));
            itemPanel.Controls.Add(btnAddItem);
            itemPanel.Controls.Add(btnRemoveItem);

            dgvItems = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                AutoGenerateColumns = true,
                AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                ReadOnly = true,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
                DataSource = _items
            };

            var body = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            body.Controls.Add(dgvItems);
            body.Controls.Add(itemPanel);
            body.Controls.Add(headerPanel);

            var footer = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                AutoSize = true
            };

            lblSubTotal = new Label { AutoSize = true, Text = "�������� ������: 0.00" };
            lblTotal = new Label { AutoSize = true, Text = "��������: 0.00" };
            lblDue = new Label { AutoSize = true, Text = "�������: 0.00" };

            btnSave = new Button { Text = "��� ��������", Width = 130, Height = 35 };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 100, Height = 35, DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            footer.Controls.Add(lblSubTotal);
            footer.Controls.Add(lblTotal);
            footer.Controls.Add(lblDue);
            footer.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            footer.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            root.Controls.Add(headerPanel, 0, 0);
            root.Controls.Add(dgvItems, 0, 1);
            root.Controls.Add(footer, 0, 2);

            Controls.Add(root);

            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;
        }

        private async Task LoadLookupsAsync()
        {
            var productsTask = _productApiService.GetLookupAsync();
            var customersTask = _customerApiService.GetLookupAsync();
            var warehousesTask = _warehouseApiService.GetLookupAsync();

            await Task.WhenAll(productsTask, customersTask, warehousesTask);

            _products = productsTask.Result.ToList();
            _customers = customersTask.Result.ToList();
            _warehouses = warehousesTask.Result.ToList();

            cmbProduct.DataSource = _products;
            cmbProduct.DisplayMember = nameof(ProductLookupDto.Name);
            cmbProduct.ValueMember = nameof(ProductLookupDto.ProductId);

            cmbCustomer.DataSource = _customers;
            cmbCustomer.DisplayMember = nameof(CustomerLookupDto.Name);
            cmbCustomer.ValueMember = nameof(CustomerLookupDto.CustomerId);

            cmbWarehouse.DataSource = _warehouses;
            cmbWarehouse.DisplayMember = nameof(WarehouseLookupDto.Name);
            cmbWarehouse.ValueMember = nameof(WarehouseLookupDto.WarehouseId);

            if (_warehouses.Count > 0)
                cmbWarehouse.SelectedIndex = _warehouses.FindIndex(x => x.IsDefault) switch { -1 => 0, var idx => idx };

            if (_products.Count > 0)
                cmbProduct.SelectedIndex = 0;

            cmbPaymentType.SelectedItem = InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash;
            dtInvoiceDate.Value = DateTime.Now;
            UpdatePaymentMode();
            RecalcTotals();
        }

        private void UpdatePaymentMode()
        {
            var type = (InvoicePaymentTypeDto)cmbPaymentType.SelectedItem!;
            var isCash = type == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash;

            dtDueDate.Enabled = !isCash;
            cmbCustomer.Enabled = type != InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash;

            if (isCash)
            {
                nudPaid.Enabled = false;
                nudPaid.Value = CalculateTotal();
                dtDueDate.Value = DateTime.Now;
            }
            else
            {
                nudPaid.Enabled = true;
            }

            RecalcTotals();
        }

        private void FillUnitPriceFromProduct()
        {
            if (cmbProduct.SelectedItem is not ProductLookupDto product)
                return;

            nudUnitPrice.Value = product.SalePrice;
        }

        private void AddItem()
        {
            if (cmbProduct.SelectedItem is not ProductLookupDto product)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����.");
                return;
            }

            if (nudQty.Value <= 0)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("������ ��� �� ���� ���� �� ���.");
                return;
            }

            var row = new SalesItemRowVm
            {
                ProductId = product.ProductId,
                ProductName = product.Name,
                Quantity = nudQty.Value,
                UnitPrice = nudUnitPrice.Value,
                DiscountAmount = nudItemDiscount.Value,
                Notes = TrimToNull(txtItemNotes.Text)
            };

            if (row.DiscountAmount > row.Quantity * row.UnitPrice)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ���� �� ���� �����.");
                return;
            }

            _items.Add(row);
            RecalcTotals();

            nudQty.Value = 1;
            nudItemDiscount.Value = 0;
            txtItemNotes.Clear();
            if (_products.Count > 0)
                cmbProduct.SelectedIndex = 0;
        }

        private void RemoveSelectedItem()
        {
            if (dgvItems.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not SalesItemRowVm row)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� ����� �����.");
                return;
            }

            _items.Remove(row);
            RecalcTotals();
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                if (_items.Count == 0)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ������ ��� �����.");
                    return;
                }

                var paymentType = (InvoicePaymentTypeDto)cmbPaymentType.SelectedItem!;
                var total = CalculateTotal();

                if (paymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash)
                {
                    nudPaid.Value = total;
                }

                if (paymentType != InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash && cmbCustomer.SelectedItem is not CustomerLookupDto customer)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �� ���� ����� ����� �� �������.");
                    return;
                }

                if (paymentType != InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash && !dtDueDate.Enabled)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ���������.");
                    return;
                }

                if (paymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit && nudPaid.Value != 0)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("������� ��� �� ���� ����� ��� ����� ������.");
                    return;
                }

                if (paymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Mixed && (nudPaid.Value < 0 || nudPaid.Value > total))
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("������� �� ����� ������� ��� �� ���� ��� 0 ���������.");
                    return;
                }

                var request = new CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto
                {
                    CustomerId = paymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash ? null : ((CustomerLookupDto)cmbCustomer.SelectedItem!).CustomerId,
                    WarehouseId = ((WarehouseLookupDto)cmbWarehouse.SelectedItem!).WarehouseId,
                    InvoiceDate = dtInvoiceDate.Value,
                    DueDate = paymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash ? null : dtDueDate.Value,
                    PaymentType = paymentType,
                    DiscountAmount = nudDiscount.Value,
                    TaxAmount = nudTax.Value,
                    PaidAmount = nudPaid.Value,
                    Notes = TrimToNull(txtNotes.Text),
                    Items = _items.Select(x => new CreateSalesInvoiceItemRequestDto
                    {
                        ProductId = x.ProductId,
                        Quantity = x.Quantity,
                        UnitPrice = x.UnitPrice,
                        DiscountAmount = x.DiscountAmount,
                        Notes = x.Notes
                    }).ToList()
                };

                var confirm = MessageBox.Show(
                    "�� ���� ��� ������ ����ڿ",
                    "�����",
                    MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                    MessageBoxIcon.Question);

                if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes)
                    return;

                var id = await _salesApiService.CreateAsync(request);
                MessageBox.Show($"�� ��� �������� �����. ��� �����: {id}", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);

                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private void RecalcTotals()
        {
            var subTotal = _items.Sum(x => x.LineTotal);
            var total = CalculateTotal();

            lblSubTotal.Text = $"�������� ������: {subTotal:N2}";
            lblTotal.Text = $"��������: {total:N2}";

            if ((InvoicePaymentTypeDto)cmbPaymentType.SelectedItem! == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash)
                nudPaid.Value = total;

            lblDue.Text = $"�������: {(total - nudPaid.Value):N2}";
        }

        private decimal CalculateTotal()
        {
            var subTotal = _items.Sum(x => x.LineTotal);
            var total = subTotal - nudDiscount.Value + nudTax.Value;
            if (total < 0) total = 0;
            return total;
        }

        private static Panel Wrap(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Width = 220, Height = 60, Margin = new Padding(5) };
            var label = new Label { Text = labelText, Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 18 };
            control.Dock = DockStyle.Bottom;
            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);
            return panel;
        }

        private static ComboBox CreateCombo()
        {
            return new ComboBox
            {
                Width = 200,
                DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList
            };
        }

        private static NumericUpDown CreateMoney(int decimals = 2)
        {
            return new NumericUpDown
            {
                Width = 120,
                DecimalPlaces = decimals,
                Minimum = 0,
                Maximum = 100000000,
                ThousandsSeparator = true
            };
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }

        private sealed class SalesItemRowVm
        {
            public int ProductId { get; set; }
            public string ProductName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
            public decimal Quantity { get; set; }
            public decimal UnitPrice { get; set; }
            public decimal DiscountAmount { get; set; }
            public string? Notes { get; set; }
            public decimal LineTotal => (Quantity * UnitPrice) - DiscountAmount;
        }
    }
}
```

## `CustomerPaymentMappingProfile.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.CustomerPayments;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class CustomerPaymentMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public CustomerPaymentMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<CustomerPayment, CustomerPaymentDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Customer != null ? s.Customer.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoiceNo,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.SalesInvoice != null ? s.SalesInvoice.InvoiceNo : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUserName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.CreatedByUser != null ? s.CreatedByUser.FullName : null));

            CreateMap<CustomerPayment, CustomerPaymentListDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Customer != null ? s.Customer.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoiceNo,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.SalesInvoice != null ? s.SalesInvoice.InvoiceNo : null));

            CreateMap<CreateCustomerPaymentRequestDto, CustomerPayment>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerPaymentId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentNo, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Customer, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoice, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUser, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());
        }
    }
}
```
