### `SalesReturnMappingProfile.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using ContractEnums = SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.SalesReturns;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using DomainEnums = SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class SalesReturnMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public SalesReturnMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<SalesReturnItem, SalesReturnItemDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.ProductName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Product != null ? s.Product.Name : string.Empty));

            CreateMap<SalesReturn, SalesReturnDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Customer != null ? s.Customer.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Warehouse != null ? s.Warehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoiceNo,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.SalesInvoice != null ? s.SalesInvoice.InvoiceNo : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUserName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.CreatedByUser != null ? s.CreatedByUser.FullName : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoiceStatusDto)s.Status))
                .ForMember(d => d.Items, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Items));

            CreateMap<SalesReturn, SalesReturnListDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Customer != null ? s.Customer.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Warehouse != null ? s.Warehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoiceNo,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.SalesInvoice != null ? s.SalesInvoice.InvoiceNo : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoiceStatusDto)s.Status));

            CreateMap<CreateSalesReturnItemRequestDto, SalesReturnItem>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesReturnItemId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesReturn, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Product, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.LineTotal, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<CreateSalesReturnRequestDto, SalesReturn>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesReturnId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.ReturnNo, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Customer, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Warehouse, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoice, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Items, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUser, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(_ => DomainEnums.InvoiceStatus.Posted))
                .ForMember(d => d.ReturnDate,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.ReturnDate));
        }
    }
}
```

### `SalesReturnService.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.SalesReturns;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class SalesReturnService : ISalesReturnService
    {
        private readonly ISalesReturnRepository _repository;
        private readonly ICustomerRepository _customerRepository;
        private readonly ISalesInvoiceRepository _salesInvoiceRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseRepository _warehouseRepository;
        private readonly IProductRepository _productRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseStockRepository _warehouseStockRepository;
        private readonly IInventoryMovementRepository _inventoryMovementRepository;
        private readonly IInvoiceNumberGenerator _invoiceNumberGenerator;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public SalesReturnService(
            ISalesReturnRepository repository,
            ICustomerRepository customerRepository,
            ISalesInvoiceRepository salesInvoiceRepository,
            IWarehouseRepository warehouseRepository,
            IProductRepository productRepository,
            IWarehouseStockRepository warehouseStockRepository,
            IInventoryMovementRepository inventoryMovementRepository,
            IInvoiceNumberGenerator invoiceNumberGenerator,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _repository = repository;
            _customerRepository = customerRepository;
            _salesInvoiceRepository = salesInvoiceRepository;
            _warehouseRepository = warehouseRepository;
            _productRepository = productRepository;
            _warehouseStockRepository = warehouseStockRepository;
            _inventoryMovementRepository = inventoryMovementRepository;
            _invoiceNumberGenerator = invoiceNumberGenerator;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(CreateSalesReturnRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            if (request.CustomerId <= 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Customer is required.");

            if (request.WarehouseId <= 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse is required.");

            if (request.Items is null || request.Items.Count == 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Return must contain at least one item.");

            var customer = await _customerRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.CustomerId, cancellationToken);
            if (customer is null || !customer.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Customer not found or inactive.");

            var warehouse = await _warehouseRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.WarehouseId, cancellationToken);
            if (warehouse is null || !warehouse.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse not found or inactive.");

            if (request.SalesInvoiceId.HasValue)
            {
                var invoice = await _salesInvoiceRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(request.SalesInvoiceId.Value, cancellationToken);
                if (invoice is null)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Sales invoice not found.");

                if (invoice.CustomerId.HasValue && invoice.CustomerId.Value != request.CustomerId)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Selected invoice does not belong to the selected customer.");
            }

            var items = new List<SalesReturnItem>();
            decimal subTotal = 0m;

            foreach (var item in request.Items)
            {
                if (item.ProductId <= 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Invalid product.");

                if (item.Quantity <= 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Item quantity must be greater than zero.");

                if (item.UnitPrice < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Unit price cannot be negative.");

                var product = await _productRepository.GetByIdAsync(item.ProductId, cancellationToken);
                if (product is null || !product.IsActive)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Product not found or inactive. ProductId={item.ProductId}");

                var lineTotal = (item.Quantity * item.UnitPrice);
                if (lineTotal < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Invalid line total for product '{product.Name}'.");

                items.Add(new SalesReturnItem
                {
                    ProductId = product.ProductId,
                    Quantity = item.Quantity,
                    UnitPrice = item.UnitPrice,
                    LineTotal = lineTotal
                });

                subTotal += lineTotal;
            }

            var returnNo = await _invoiceNumberGenerator.GenerateSalesReturnNoAsync(cancellationToken);

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                var entity = _mapper.Map<SalesReturn>(request);
                entity.ReturnNo = returnNo;
                entity.SubTotal = subTotal;
                entity.TotalAmount = subTotal;
                entity.Status = InvoiceStatus.Posted;
                entity.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                entity.Items = items;

                await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

                foreach (var item in items)
                {
                    var stock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                        request.WarehouseId,
                        item.ProductId,
                        cancellationToken);

                    if (stock is null)
                    {
                        stock = new WarehouseStock
                        {
                            WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            Quantity = 0m,
                            UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
                        };

                        await _warehouseStockRepository.AddAsync(stock, cancellationToken);
                    }

                    stock.Quantity += item.Quantity;
                    stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    await _inventoryMovementRepository.AddAsync(
                        new InventoryMovement
                        {
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                            MovementType = InventoryMovementType.SaleReturnIn,
                            ReferenceType = "SalesReturn",
                            ReferenceId = entity.SalesReturnId,
                            Quantity = item.Quantity,
                            UnitCost = item.UnitPrice,
                            MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow,
                            Notes = "Sales return stock in"
                        },
                        cancellationToken);
                }

                customer.CurrentBalance -= entity.TotalAmount;
                if (customer.CurrentBalance < 0m)
                    customer.CurrentBalance = 0m;

                customer.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result<int>.Success(entity.SalesReturnId);
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<SalesReturnDto?>> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null)
                return Result<SalesReturnDto?>.Failure("Sales return not found.");

            return Result<SalesReturnDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<SalesReturnDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<SalesReturnListDto>>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _repository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var mapped = _mapper.Map<List<SalesReturnListDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<SalesReturnListDto>>.Success(
                new PagedResultDto<SalesReturnListDto>
                {
                    Items = mapped,
                    TotalCount = totalCount,
                    PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                    PageSize = request.PageSize
                });
        }

        public async Task<Result> CancelAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Sales return not found.");

            if (entity.Status == InvoiceStatus.Cancelled)
                return Result.Success();

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                foreach (var item in entity.Items)
                {
                    var stock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                        entity.WarehouseId,
                        item.ProductId,
                        cancellationToken);

                    if (stock is null || stock.Quantity < item.Quantity)
                        return Result.Failure("Cannot cancel return because stock is insufficient.");

                    stock.Quantity -= item.Quantity;
                    stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    await _inventoryMovementRepository.AddAsync(
                        new InventoryMovement
                        {
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            WarehouseId = entity.WarehouseId,
                            MovementType = InventoryMovementType.SaleOut,
                            ReferenceType = "SalesReturnCancel",
                            ReferenceId = entity.SalesReturnId,
                            Quantity = item.Quantity,
                            UnitCost = item.UnitPrice,
                            MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow,
                            Notes = "Cancel sales return - stock out"
                        },
                        cancellationToken);
                }

                var customer = await _customerRepository.GetByIdAsync(entity.CustomerId, cancellationToken);
                if (customer is not null)
                {
                    customer.CurrentBalance += entity.TotalAmount;
                    customer.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                }

                entity.Status = InvoiceStatus.Cancelled;
                entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result.Success();
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<SalesReturnSummaryDto>> GetSummaryAsync(SalesReturnSummaryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var summary = await _repository.GetSummaryAsync(request.From, request.To, request.WarehouseId, cancellationToken);
            return Result<SalesReturnSummaryDto>.Success(summary);
        }
    }
}
```

---

## B) Purchase Return Repository + Service

### `IPurchaseReturnRepository.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.PurchaseReturns;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence
{
    public interface IPurchaseReturnRepository
    {
        Task AddAsync(PurchaseReturn entity, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<PurchaseReturn?> GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<(IReadOnlyList<PurchaseReturn> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<PurchaseReturnSummaryDto> GetSummaryAsync(
            DateTime? from,
            DateTime? to,
            int? warehouseId,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

```csharp
{

    {

        Task<Result<PurchaseReturnDto?>> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
```

### `PurchaseReturnMappingProfile.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using ContractEnums = SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.PurchaseReturns;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using DomainEnums = SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class PurchaseReturnMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public PurchaseReturnMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<PurchaseReturnItem, PurchaseReturnItemDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.ProductName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Product != null ? s.Product.Name : string.Empty));

            CreateMap<PurchaseReturn, PurchaseReturnDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Supplier != null ? s.Supplier.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Warehouse != null ? s.Warehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoiceNo,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.PurchaseInvoice != null ? s.PurchaseInvoice.InvoiceNo : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUserName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.CreatedByUser != null ? s.CreatedByUser.FullName : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoiceStatusDto)s.Status))
                .ForMember(d => d.Items, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Items));

            CreateMap<PurchaseReturn, PurchaseReturnListDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Supplier != null ? s.Supplier.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.WarehouseName,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Warehouse != null ? s.Warehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoiceNo,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.PurchaseInvoice != null ? s.PurchaseInvoice.InvoiceNo : null))
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.InvoiceStatusDto)s.Status));

            CreateMap<CreatePurchaseReturnItemRequestDto, PurchaseReturnItem>()
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseReturnItemId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseReturn, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Product, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.LineTotal, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<CreatePurchaseReturnRequestDto, PurchaseReturn>()
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseReturnId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.ReturnNo, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Supplier, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Warehouse, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoice, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Items, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedByUser, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.Status,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(_ => DomainEnums.InvoiceStatus.Posted))
                .ForMember(d => d.ReturnDate,
                    opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.ReturnDate));
        }
    }
}
```

### `PurchaseReturnService.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.PurchaseReturns;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class PurchaseReturnService : IPurchaseReturnService
    {
        private readonly IPurchaseReturnRepository _repository;
        private readonly ISupplierRepository _supplierRepository;
        private readonly IPurchaseInvoiceRepository _purchaseInvoiceRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseRepository _warehouseRepository;
        private readonly IProductRepository _productRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseStockRepository _warehouseStockRepository;
        private readonly IInventoryMovementRepository _inventoryMovementRepository;
        private readonly IInvoiceNumberGenerator _invoiceNumberGenerator;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public PurchaseReturnService(
            IPurchaseReturnRepository repository,
            ISupplierRepository supplierRepository,
            IPurchaseInvoiceRepository purchaseInvoiceRepository,
            IWarehouseRepository warehouseRepository,
            IProductRepository productRepository,
            IWarehouseStockRepository warehouseStockRepository,
            IInventoryMovementRepository inventoryMovementRepository,
            IInvoiceNumberGenerator invoiceNumberGenerator,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _repository = repository;
            _supplierRepository = supplierRepository;
            _purchaseInvoiceRepository = purchaseInvoiceRepository;
            _warehouseRepository = warehouseRepository;
            _productRepository = productRepository;
            _warehouseStockRepository = warehouseStockRepository;
            _inventoryMovementRepository = inventoryMovementRepository;
            _invoiceNumberGenerator = invoiceNumberGenerator;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(CreatePurchaseReturnRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            if (request.SupplierId <= 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier is required.");

            if (request.WarehouseId <= 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse is required.");

            if (request.Items is null || request.Items.Count == 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Return must contain at least one item.");

            var supplier = await _supplierRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.SupplierId, cancellationToken);
            if (supplier is null || !supplier.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier not found or inactive.");

            var warehouse = await _warehouseRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.WarehouseId, cancellationToken);
            if (warehouse is null || !warehouse.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse not found or inactive.");

            if (request.PurchaseInvoiceId.HasValue)
            {
                var invoice = await _purchaseInvoiceRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(request.PurchaseInvoiceId.Value, cancellationToken);
                if (invoice is null)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Purchase invoice not found.");

                if (invoice.SupplierId != request.SupplierId)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Selected invoice does not belong to the selected supplier.");
            }

            var items = new List<PurchaseReturnItem>();
            decimal subTotal = 0m;

            foreach (var item in request.Items)
            {
                if (item.ProductId <= 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Invalid product.");

                if (item.Quantity <= 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Item quantity must be greater than zero.");

                if (item.UnitCost < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Unit cost cannot be negative.");

                var product = await _productRepository.GetByIdAsync(item.ProductId, cancellationToken);
                if (product is null || !product.IsActive)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Product not found or inactive. ProductId={item.ProductId}");

                var lineTotal = item.Quantity * item.UnitCost;
                if (lineTotal < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Invalid line total for product '{product.Name}'.");

                items.Add(new PurchaseReturnItem
                {
                    ProductId = product.ProductId,
                    Quantity = item.Quantity,
                    UnitCost = item.UnitCost,
                    LineTotal = lineTotal
                });

                subTotal += lineTotal;
            }

            var returnNo = await _invoiceNumberGenerator.GeneratePurchaseReturnNoAsync(cancellationToken);

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                var entity = _mapper.Map<PurchaseReturn>(request);
                entity.ReturnNo = returnNo;
                entity.SubTotal = subTotal;
                entity.TotalAmount = subTotal;
                entity.Status = InvoiceStatus.Posted;
                entity.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                entity.Items = items;

                await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

                foreach (var item in items)
                {
                    var stock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                        request.WarehouseId,
                        item.ProductId,
                        cancellationToken);

                    if (stock is null || stock.Quantity < item.Quantity)
                        return Result<int>.Failure($"Insufficient stock to return productId={item.ProductId}");

                    stock.Quantity -= item.Quantity;
                    stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    await _inventoryMovementRepository.AddAsync(
                        new InventoryMovement
                        {
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                            MovementType = InventoryMovementType.PurchaseReturnOut,
                            ReferenceType = "PurchaseReturn",
                            ReferenceId = entity.PurchaseReturnId,
                            Quantity = item.Quantity,
                            UnitCost = item.UnitCost,
                            MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow,
                            Notes = "Purchase return stock out"
                        },
                        cancellationToken);
                }

                supplier.CurrentBalance -= entity.TotalAmount;
                if (supplier.CurrentBalance < 0m)
                    supplier.CurrentBalance = 0m;

                supplier.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result<int>.Success(entity.PurchaseReturnId);
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<PurchaseReturnDto?>> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null)
                return Result<PurchaseReturnDto?>.Failure("Purchase return not found.");

            return Result<PurchaseReturnDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<PurchaseReturnDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<PurchaseReturnListDto>>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _repository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var mapped = _mapper.Map<List<PurchaseReturnListDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<PurchaseReturnListDto>>.Success(
                new PagedResultDto<PurchaseReturnListDto>
                {
                    Items = mapped,
                    TotalCount = totalCount,
                    PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                    PageSize = request.PageSize
                });
        }

        public async Task<Result> CancelAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Purchase return not found.");

            if (entity.Status == InvoiceStatus.Cancelled)
                return Result.Success();

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                foreach (var item in entity.Items)
                {
                    var stock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                        entity.WarehouseId,
                        item.ProductId,
                        cancellationToken);

                    if (stock is null)
                    {
                        stock = new WarehouseStock
                        {
                            WarehouseId = entity.WarehouseId,
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            Quantity = 0m,
                            UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
                        };

                        await _warehouseStockRepository.AddAsync(stock, cancellationToken);
                    }

                    stock.Quantity += item.Quantity;
                    stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    await _inventoryMovementRepository.AddAsync(
                        new InventoryMovement
                        {
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            WarehouseId = entity.WarehouseId,
                            MovementType = InventoryMovementType.PurchaseIn,
                            ReferenceType = "PurchaseReturnCancel",
                            ReferenceId = entity.PurchaseReturnId,
                            Quantity = item.Quantity,
                            UnitCost = item.UnitCost,
                            MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow,
                            Notes = "Cancel purchase return - stock in"
                        },
                        cancellationToken);
                }

                var supplier = await _supplierRepository.GetByIdAsync(entity.SupplierId, cancellationToken);
                if (supplier is not null)
                {
                    supplier.CurrentBalance += entity.TotalAmount;
                    supplier.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                }

                entity.Status = InvoiceStatus.Cancelled;
                entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result.Success();
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<PurchaseReturnSummaryDto>> GetSummaryAsync(PurchaseReturnSummaryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var summary = await _repository.GetSummaryAsync(request.From, request.To, request.WarehouseId, cancellationToken);
            return Result<PurchaseReturnSummaryDto>.Success(summary);
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 3) Infrastructure

## A) Invoice Number Generator additions

��� ��� `IInvoiceNumberGenerator`:

```csharp
Task<string> GenerateSalesReturnNoAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
Task<string> GeneratePurchaseReturnNoAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
```

### ��� `InvoiceNumberGenerator.cs` ���:

```csharp
public async Task<string> GenerateSalesReturnNoAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
{
    var prefix = $"SR-{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd}-";

    var lastNo = await _context.SalesReturns
        .AsNoTracking()
        .Where(x => x.ReturnNo.StartsWith(prefix))
        .OrderByDescending(x => x.ReturnNo)
        .Select(x => x.ReturnNo)
        .FirstOrDefaultAsync(cancellationToken);

    int next = 1;

    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(lastNo))
    {
        var suffix = lastNo.Replace(prefix, "");
        if (int.TryParse(suffix, out var current))
            next = current + 1;
    }

    return $"{prefix}{next:D4}";
}

public async Task<string> GeneratePurchaseReturnNoAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
{
    var prefix = $"PR-{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMdd}-";

    var lastNo = await _context.PurchaseReturns
        .AsNoTracking()
        .Where(x => x.ReturnNo.StartsWith(prefix))
        .OrderByDescending(x => x.ReturnNo)
        .Select(x => x.ReturnNo)
        .FirstOrDefaultAsync(cancellationToken);

    int next = 1;

    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(lastNo))
    {
        var suffix = lastNo.Replace(prefix, "");
        if (int.TryParse(suffix, out var current))
            next = current + 1;
    }

    return $"{prefix}{next:D4}";
}
```

## B) Return Repositories

### `SalesReturnRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.SalesReturns;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class SalesReturnRepository : ISalesReturnRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public SalesReturnRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(SalesReturn entity, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.SalesReturns.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<SalesReturn?> GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.SalesReturns
                .Include(x => x.Customer)
                .Include(x => x.Warehouse)
                .Include(x => x.SalesInvoice)
                .Include(x => x.CreatedByUser)
                .Include(x => x.Items)
                    .ThenInclude(x => x.Product)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.SalesReturnId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<SalesReturn> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.SalesReturns
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Include(x => x.Customer)
                .Include(x => x.Warehouse)
                .Include(x => x.SalesInvoice)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.ReturnNo.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Customer != null && x.Customer.Name.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);

            var items = await query
                .OrderByDescending(x => x.ReturnDate)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<SalesReturnSummaryDto> GetSummaryAsync(
            DateTime? from,
            DateTime? to,
            int? warehouseId,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.SalesReturns.AsNoTracking().AsQueryable();

            if (from.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.ReturnDate >= from.Value);

            if (to.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.ReturnDate <= to.Value);

            if (warehouseId.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.WarehouseId == warehouseId.Value);

            return new SalesReturnSummaryDto
            {
                TotalReturns = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken),
                TotalAmount = await query.SumAsync(x => (decimal?)x.TotalAmount, cancellationToken) ?? 0m
            };
        }
    }
}
```

### `PurchaseReturnRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.PurchaseReturns;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class PurchaseReturnRepository : IPurchaseReturnRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public PurchaseReturnRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(PurchaseReturn entity, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.PurchaseReturns.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<PurchaseReturn?> GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.PurchaseReturns
                .Include(x => x.Supplier)
                .Include(x => x.Warehouse)
                .Include(x => x.PurchaseInvoice)
                .Include(x => x.CreatedByUser)
                .Include(x => x.Items)
                    .ThenInclude(x => x.Product)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.PurchaseReturnId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<PurchaseReturn> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.PurchaseReturns
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Include(x => x.Supplier)
                .Include(x => x.Warehouse)
                .Include(x => x.PurchaseInvoice)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.ReturnNo.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Supplier != null && x.Supplier.Name.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);

            var items = await query
                .OrderByDescending(x => x.ReturnDate)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<PurchaseReturnSummaryDto> GetSummaryAsync(
            DateTime? from,
            DateTime? to,
            int? warehouseId,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.PurchaseReturns.AsNoTracking().AsQueryable();

            if (from.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.ReturnDate >= from.Value);

            if (to.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.ReturnDate <= to.Value);

            if (warehouseId.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.WarehouseId == warehouseId.Value);

            return new PurchaseReturnSummaryDto
            {
                TotalReturns = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken),
                TotalAmount = await query.SumAsync(x => (decimal?)x.TotalAmount, cancellationToken) ?? 0m
            };
        }
    }
}
```

# 4) API

## `SalesReturnsController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.SalesReturns;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/sales-returns")]
    public class SalesReturnsController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ISalesReturnService _service;

        public SalesReturnsController(ISalesReturnService service)
        {
            _service = service;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SalesReturnListDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _service.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SalesReturnListDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SalesReturnListDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<SalesReturnDto?>>> GetById(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _service.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<SalesReturnDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<SalesReturnDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateSalesReturnRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _service.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Sales return created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPost("{id:int}/cancel")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Cancel(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _service.CancelAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Sales return cancelled successfully"));
        }

        [HttpGet("summary")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<SalesReturnSummaryDto>>> Summary(
            [FromQuery] SalesReturnSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _service.GetSummaryAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<SalesReturnSummaryDto>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<SalesReturnSummaryDto>.Success(result.Data!));
        }
    }
}
```

## `PurchaseReturnsController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.PurchaseReturns;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/purchase-returns")]
    public class PurchaseReturnsController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IPurchaseReturnService _service;

        public PurchaseReturnsController(IPurchaseReturnService service)
        {
            _service = service;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<PurchaseReturnListDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _service.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<PurchaseReturnListDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<PurchaseReturnListDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PurchaseReturnDto?>>> GetById(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _service.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PurchaseReturnDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PurchaseReturnDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreatePurchaseReturnRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _service.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Purchase return created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPost("{id:int}/cancel")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Cancel(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _service.CancelAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Purchase return cancelled successfully"));
        }

        [HttpGet("summary")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PurchaseReturnSummaryDto>>> Summary(
            [FromQuery] PurchaseReturnSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _service.GetSummaryAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PurchaseReturnSummaryDto>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PurchaseReturnSummaryDto>.Success(result.Data!));
        }
    }
}
```

���� ���� ���� ��� �� �� ������ �� ��� ����ݡ ������� �������� ������� ���� ��� ���� ������� ������ ������� �������.
�����: ���� �� �� ������ ��� ����
��� ���� ����� ������ �� ���� ������ ��� ����� ���� ����� ���� ����� ������ ����� ��� ����� Clean Architecture � SOLID� �������� ����� ����� ��� Repository � Unit of Work.
1. ������� ������ �������:
* ����� ������ (MVP) ����� ������ ���� ���� ������� ��������ʡ �������.
* ����� ������� ��� ����� ������: Contracts� Domain� Application� Infrastructure� Api� � Desktop.

2. ����� �������� ���� Domain Layer:
* ����� Schema ���� ������ ������ SQL Server ����� ������� ������� (���������� �������ʡ ������� �������ѡ ��������ʡ ������ʡ ���).

* �������� (Products): �� ���� ������ ������� ������� �� ����� ������ (Lookups).
* �������� (Sales): ������ ���� ����� ��� �������ѡ ���� ���������ʡ ��� ������� ����� ���� ������� ����� ���� �������� ������ �������� (Cancel) �� ����� �������.
* ��������� (Categories): ����� ����� (CRUD).
* ������� (Units): ����� ����� (CRUD).
* ������� (Warehouses): ����� ����� �� ���� ����� ������ ���������.
4. ����������� ���� ��� ����� ��� (����� ����� �����):

������: �� ��� ��� �� ����ѿ (��� ����� �������)
��� ����� ������ ��������� ������ ��� ������� ����� �� ������ ���� ���� ����� ����ݡ �� �������� ����������� �������� �������� ������:
������ 1: ����� ������ ������� (Customers Module) ����� ���� ��� ICustomerService. ��� ���� ���� �����:
