����� ��. ����� ���� ���ɡ ���� ���� �� ��� �� ����� ������ (�����) ���� ������ ������ ������ �� ���� �����ϡ ����� ������ ������ ���� ����� (������ ��� �����).

������� ����� ������ �� ������ ���� ���� ����� ����ݡ ��� ����� **������ ������� (Customers Module)** ������� ����� �� ���� `Application` ������ ��� ������ `Desktop`.

### 1. Application Layer (����� ������ �������)

�� ��� ������� �� `SalesSystem.Application/Mapping` � `SalesSystem.Application/Services`.
	
#### `CustomerMappingProfile.cs`

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class CustomerMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public CustomerMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<Customer, CustomerDto>();
            
            CreateMap<Customer, CustomerLookupDto>();

            CreateMap<CreateCustomerRequestDto, Customer>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CurrentBalance, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.OpeningBalance)) // ������ ������ ���� ������� ���������
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoices, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerPayments, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<UpdateCustomerRequestDto, Customer>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.OpeningBalance, opt => opt.Ignore()) // �� ���� ������ ��������� ��� ������� ����
                .ForMember(d => d.CurrentBalance, opt => opt.Ignore()) 
                .ForMember(d => d.SalesInvoices, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerPayments, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());
        }
    }
}

```

#### `CustomerService.cs`

```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class CustomerService : ICustomerService
    {
        private readonly ICustomerRepository _repository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public CustomerService(
            ICustomerRepository repository,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _repository = repository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _repository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var dtoItems = _mapper.Map<List<CustomerDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>.Success(
                new PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>
                {
                    Items = dtoItems,
                    TotalCount = totalCount,
                    PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                    PageSize = request.PageSize
                });
        }

        public async Task<Result<CustomerDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null)
                return Result<CustomerDto?>.Failure("Customer not found.");

            return Result<CustomerDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<CustomerDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var code = Normalize(request.Code);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Customer name is required.");

            if (code is not null && await _repository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, null, cancellationToken))
            {
                return Result<int>.Failure("Customer code already exists.");
            }

            var entity = _mapper.Map<Customer>(request);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Email = Normalize(request.Email);
            entity.Phone = Normalize(request.Phone);
            entity.Address = Normalize(request.Address);
            entity.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result<int>.Success(entity.CustomerId);
        }

        public async Task<Result> UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Customer not found.");

            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var code = Normalize(request.Code);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
                return Result.Failure("Customer name is required.");

            if (code is not null && await _repository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, id, cancellationToken))
            {
                return Result.Failure("Customer code already exists.");
            }

            _mapper.Map(request, entity);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Email = Normalize(request.Email);
            entity.Phone = Normalize(request.Phone);
            entity.Address = Normalize(request.Address);
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result> DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null)
                return Result.Failure("Customer not found.");

            entity.IsActive = false;
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);
            var dto = _mapper.Map<List<CustomerLookupDto>>(items).AsReadOnly();
            return Result<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>.Success(dto);
        }

        private static string? Normalize(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value)) return null;
            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}

```

---

### 2. Infrastructure Layer

�� ��� ����� �� `SalesSystem.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories`.

#### `CustomerRepository.cs`

```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class CustomerRepository : ICustomerRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public CustomerRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<Customer> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm,
            int pageNumber,
            int pageSize,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Customers
                .AsNoTracking()
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Code != null && x.Code.Contains(searchTerm)) ||
                    (x.Phone != null && x.Phone.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);
            var items = await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Customer>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Customers
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Where(x => x.IsActive)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Phone != null && x.Phone.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            return await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<Customer?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.Customers
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.CustomerId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(
            Customer entity,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.Customers.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        }

        public Task<bool> ExistsByCodeAsync(
            string code,
            int? excludeCustomerId = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Customers
                .AsQueryable()
                .Where(x => x.Code == code);

            if (excludeCustomerId.HasValue)
                query = query.Where(x => x.CustomerId != excludeCustomerId.Value);

            return query.AnyAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}

```

---

### 3. API Layer

�� ��� ����� �� `SalesSystem.Api/Controllers`.

#### `CustomersController.cs`

```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/customers")]
    public class CustomersController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ICustomerService _customerService;

        public CustomersController(ICustomerService customerService)
        {
            _customerService = customerService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _customerService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<CustomerDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _customerService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<CustomerDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<CustomerDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _customerService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _customerService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Customer created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPut("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Update(
            int id,
            [FromBody] UpdateCustomerRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _customerService.UpdateAsync(id, request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Customer updated successfully"));
        }

        [HttpDelete("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Delete(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _customerService.DeleteAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Customer deleted successfully"));
        }
    }
}

```

---

### 4. Desktop Layer (API Service & UI)

�� ��� ������� �� �������� ���� `SalesSystem.Desktop`.

#### `ICustomerApiService.cs` & `CustomerApiService.cs`

```csharp
// SalesSystem.Desktop/Services/Api/ICustomerApiService.cs
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface ICustomerApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<CustomerDto?> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<int> CreateAsync(CreateCustomerRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task UpdateAsync(int id, UpdateCustomerRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task DeleteAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}

// SalesSystem.Desktop/Services/Api/CustomerApiService.cs
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class CustomerApiService : ApiServiceBase, ICustomerApiService
    {
        public CustomerApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient) { }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/customers?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm))
                url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<CustomerDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = "api/customers/lookup";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
                url += $"?searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<CustomerDto?> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/customers/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<CustomerDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(CreateCustomerRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/customers", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task UpdateAsync(int id, UpdateCustomerRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/customers/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task DeleteAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/customers/{id}", cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}

```

#### `CustomersListControl.cs`

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Customers
{
    public class CustomersListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly ICustomerApiService _customerApiService;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnEdit = null!;
        private Button btnDelete = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvCustomers = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public CustomersListControl(ICustomerApiService customerApiService)
        {
            _customerApiService = customerApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadCustomersAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            var topPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 50, Padding = new Padding(8) };

            txtSearch = new TextBox { Width = 260, PlaceholderText = "���� ���� ������ �� ����� �� ������..." };
            btnSearch = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadCustomersAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                txtSearch.Clear();
                await LoadCustomersAsync();
            };

            btnAdd = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync(null);

            btnEdit = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnEdit.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedCustomerId();
                if (id is null) { MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����."); return; }
                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            btnDelete = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnDelete.Click += async (_, _) => await DeleteSelectedAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Right, Width = 400, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft, WrapContents = false
            };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { btnDelete, btnEdit, btnAdd, btnRefresh, btnSearch });

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, WrapContents = false
            };
            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvCustomers = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, ReadOnly = true, AllowUserToAddRows = false, AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect, MultiSelect = false, AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvCustomers.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvCustomers.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedCustomerId();
                if (id is null) return;
                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            lblStatus = new Label { Dock = DockStyle.Bottom, Height = 24, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft, Text = "����" };

            Controls.Add(dgvCustomers);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadCustomersAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);
                var result = await _customerApiService.GetPagedAsync(new PagedQueryRequestDto
                {
                    PageNumber = 1, PageSize = 200, SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text
                });

                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"��� �������: {result.TotalCount}";
                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "��� ��� ����� ����� �������";
            }
            finally { SetBusy(false); }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Count == 0) return;

            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains("CustomerId")) dgvCustomers.Columns["CustomerId"].HeaderText = "ID";
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains("Code")) dgvCustomers.Columns["Code"].HeaderText = "�����";
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains("Name")) dgvCustomers.Columns["Name"].HeaderText = "�����";
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains("Phone")) dgvCustomers.Columns["Phone"].HeaderText = "������";
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains("CurrentBalance")) dgvCustomers.Columns["CurrentBalance"].HeaderText = "������ ������";
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains("IsActive")) dgvCustomers.Columns["IsActive"].HeaderText = "���";
            
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains("Email")) dgvCustomers.Columns["Email"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains("Address")) dgvCustomers.Columns["Address"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains("OpeningBalance")) dgvCustomers.Columns["OpeningBalance"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains("CreatedAt")) dgvCustomers.Columns["CreatedAt"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvCustomers.Columns.Contains("UpdatedAt")) dgvCustomers.Columns["UpdatedAt"].Visible = false;
        }

        private int? GetSelectedCustomerId()
        {
            if (dgvCustomers.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not CustomerDto row) return null;
            return row.CustomerId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync(int? customerId)
        {
            using var form = new CustomerEditorForm(_customerApiService, customerId);
            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();

            if (result == DialogResult.OK) await LoadCustomersAsync();
        }

        private async Task DeleteSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedCustomerId();
            if (id is null) { MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����."); return; }

            if (MessageBox.Show("�� ���� ��� ������", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question) != DialogResult.Yes)
                return;

            try
            {
                await _customerApiService.DeleteAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadCustomersAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;
            txtSearch.Enabled = btnSearch.Enabled = btnRefresh.Enabled = btnAdd.Enabled = btnEdit.Enabled = btnDelete.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}

```

#### `CustomerEditorForm.cs`

```csharp
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Customers
{
    public class CustomerEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly ICustomerApiService _customerApiService;
        private readonly int? _customerId;
        private readonly ErrorProvider _errorProvider = new();

        private TextBox txtCode = null!;
        private TextBox txtName = null!;
        private TextBox txtPhone = null!;
        private TextBox txtEmail = null!;
        private TextBox txtAddress = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudOpeningBalance = null!;
        private CheckBox chkIsActive = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;

        public CustomerEditorForm(ICustomerApiService customerApiService, int? customerId = null)
        {
            _customerApiService = customerApiService;
            _customerId = customerId;
            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadFormAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = _customerId.HasValue ? "����� ����" : "����� ����";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            Size = new Size(600, 480);
            MinimumSize = new Size(550, 450);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;
            MaximizeBox = false; MinimizeBox = false;

            var mainPanel = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, Padding = new Padding(12), ColumnCount = 1, RowCount = 8
            };

            for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 45));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 50)); // Buttons row

            txtCode = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "�����" };
            txtName = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "��� ������" };
            txtPhone = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "��� ������" };
            txtEmail = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "������ ����������" };
            txtAddress = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "�������" };
            
            nudOpeningBalance = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, DecimalPlaces = 2, Minimum = 0, Maximum = 100000000, ThousandsSeparator = true
            };

            chkIsActive = new CheckBox { Text = "���", Checked = true, Dock = DockStyle.Left };

            btnSave = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 120, Height = 35 };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 120, Height = 35, DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, WrapContents = false };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("�����:", txtCode), 0, 0);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("��� ������:", txtName), 0, 1);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������:", txtPhone), 0, 2);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������:", txtEmail), 0, 3);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("�������:", txtAddress), 0, 4);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������ ���������:", nudOpeningBalance), 0, 5);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(chkIsActive, 0, 6);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel, 0, 7);

            Controls.Add(mainPanel);
            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;
        }

        private Panel CreateLabeledPanel(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            var label = new Label { Text = labelText, Dock = DockStyle.Right, Width = 120, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft };
            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);
            return panel;
        }

        private async Task LoadFormAsync()
        {
            if (!_customerId.HasValue) return;
            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                var customer = await _customerApiService.GetByIdAsync(_customerId.Value);
                if (customer is null) { MessageBox.Show("������ ��� �����.", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning); Close(); return; }

                txtCode.Text = customer.Code ?? string.Empty;
                txtName.Text = customer.Name;
                txtPhone.Text = customer.Phone ?? string.Empty;
                txtEmail.Text = customer.Email ?? string.Empty;
                txtAddress.Text = customer.Address ?? string.Empty;
                nudOpeningBalance.Value = customer.OpeningBalance;
                nudOpeningBalance.Enabled = false; // ���� �� ��� ����� ������ ��������� ��� �������
                chkIsActive.Checked = customer.IsActive;
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); Close(); }
            finally { UseWaitCursor = false; }
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (!ValidateForm()) return;
            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                btnSave.Enabled = false;

                if (_customerId.HasValue)
                {
                    await _customerApiService.UpdateAsync(_customerId.Value, new UpdateCustomerRequestDto
                    {
                        Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text), Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                        Phone = TrimToNull(txtPhone.Text), Email = TrimToNull(txtEmail.Text),
                        Address = TrimToNull(txtAddress.Text), IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
                    });
                }
                else
                {
                    await _customerApiService.CreateAsync(new CreateCustomerRequestDto
                    {
                        Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text), Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                        Phone = TrimToNull(txtPhone.Text), Email = TrimToNull(txtEmail.Text),
                        Address = TrimToNull(txtAddress.Text), OpeningBalance = nudOpeningBalance.Value,
                        IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
                    });
                }

                MessageBox.Show("�� ����� �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
            finally { UseWaitCursor = false; btnSave.Enabled = true; }
        }

        private bool ValidateForm()
        {
            _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, string.Empty);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtName.Text))
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, "��� ������ �����.");
                return false;
            }
            return true;
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value) => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? null : value.Trim();
    }
}
```

### 5. ����� ��� Dependency Injection �������

�� `SalesSystem.Application/DependencyInjection.cs`:

```csharp
services.AddScoped<ICustomerService, CustomerService>();

```

�� `SalesSystem.Infrastructure/DependencyInjection.cs`:

```csharp
services.AddScoped<ICustomerRepository, CustomerRepository>();

```

�� `SalesSystem.Desktop/Program.cs`:

```csharp
services.AddHttpClient<ICustomerApiService, CustomerApiService>(client =>
{
    client.BaseAddress = new Uri(baseUrl);
});
services.AddTransient<CustomersListControl>();
services.AddTransient<CustomerEditorForm>();

```

�� ����� ����� ������� ������� ���� ������ �������� ������ ����� ��� ���� ������ �������� (Suppliers Module) ����� ����ɿ

SupplierDto.cs
C#
namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers
{
    public class SupplierDto
    {
        public int SupplierId { get; set; }
        public string? Code { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Phone { get; set; }
        public string? Email { get; set; }
        public string? Address { get; set; }
        public decimal OpeningBalance { get; set; }
        public decimal CurrentBalance { get; set; }
        public bool IsActive { get; set; }
        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }
        public DateTime? UpdatedAt { get; set; }
    }
}

C#
namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers
{
    public class SupplierLookupDto
    {
        public int SupplierId { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Phone { get; set; }
        public decimal CurrentBalance { get; set; }

}
CreateSupplierRequestDto.cs
C#
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers
{
    public class CreateSupplierRequestDto
    {
        [MaxLength(30)]
        public string? Code { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [MaxLength(150)]
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [MaxLength(20)]
        public string? Phone { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(100)]
        public string? Email { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(250)]
        public string? Address { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal OpeningBalance { get; set; }

        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }
}

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers
{
    public class UpdateSupplierRequestDto
    {
        [MaxLength(30)]
        public string? Code { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [MaxLength(150)]
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [MaxLength(20)]
        public string? Phone { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(100)]
        public string? Email { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(250)]
        public string? Address { get; set; }

        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }
}

2. ���� Application (������ ��������)

ISupplierRepository.cs
C#
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence
{
    public interface ISupplierRepository
    {
        Task<(IReadOnlyList<Supplier> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm, int pageNumber, int pageSize, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        
        Task<IReadOnlyList<Supplier>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        
        Task<Supplier?> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        
        Task AddAsync(Supplier entity, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        
        Task<bool> ExistsByCodeAsync(
            string code, int? excludeSupplierId = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
ISupplierService.cs

using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services
{
    public interface ISupplierService
    {
        Task<Result<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<Result<SupplierDto?>> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(CreateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<Result> UpdateAsync(int id, UpdateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<Result> DeleteAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
SupplierMappingProfile.cs
C#
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class SupplierMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public SupplierMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<Supplier, SupplierDto>();
            CreateMap<Supplier, SupplierLookupDto>();

            CreateMap<CreateSupplierRequestDto, Supplier>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CurrentBalance, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.OpeningBalance)) // ���� ������� ���������
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoices, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierPayments, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<UpdateSupplierRequestDto, Supplier>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.OpeningBalance, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CurrentBalance, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoices, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierPayments, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());
        }
    }
}
SupplierService.cs
C#
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class SupplierService : ISupplierService
    {
        private readonly ISupplierRepository _repository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public SupplierService(ISupplierRepository repository, IUnitOfWork unitOfWork, IMapper mapper)
        {
            _repository = repository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _repository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm, request.PageNumber, request.PageSize, cancellationToken);

            var dtoItems = _mapper.Map<List<SupplierDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>.Success(new PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>
            {
                Items = dtoItems, TotalCount = totalCount,
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber, PageSize = request.PageSize
            });
        }

        public async Task<Result<SupplierDto?>> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null) return Result<SupplierDto?>.Failure("Supplier not found.");
            return Result<SupplierDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<SupplierDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(CreateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var code = Normalize(request.Code);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name)) return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier name is required.");
            if (code is not null && await _repository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, null, cancellationToken))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier code already exists.");

            var entity = _mapper.Map<Supplier>(request);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Email = Normalize(request.Email);
            entity.Phone = Normalize(request.Phone);
            entity.Address = Normalize(request.Address);
            entity.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result<int>.Success(entity.SupplierId);
        }

        public async Task<Result> UpdateAsync(int id, UpdateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null) return Result.Failure("Supplier not found.");

            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var code = Normalize(request.Code);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name)) return Result.Failure("Supplier name is required.");
            if (code is not null && await _repository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, id, cancellationToken))
                return Result.Failure("Supplier code already exists.");

            _mapper.Map(request, entity);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Email = Normalize(request.Email);
            entity.Phone = Normalize(request.Phone);
            entity.Address = Normalize(request.Address);
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result> DeleteAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null) return Result.Failure("Supplier not found.");

            entity.IsActive = false;
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);
            return Result<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>.Success(_mapper.Map<List<SupplierLookupDto>>(items).AsReadOnly());
        }

        private static string? Normalize(string? value) => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? null : value.Trim();
    }
}

3. ���� Infrastructure (����� ��������)
�� ��� ����� �� SalesSystem.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories.
SupplierRepository.cs
C#
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class SupplierRepository : ISupplierRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public SupplierRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<Supplier> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm, int pageNumber, int pageSize, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Suppliers.AsNoTracking().AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Code != null && x.Code.Contains(searchTerm)) ||
                    (x.Phone != null && x.Phone.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);
            var items = await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Supplier>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Suppliers.AsNoTracking().Where(x => x.IsActive).AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Phone != null && x.Phone.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            return await query.OrderBy(x => x.Name).ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<Supplier?> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.Suppliers.FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.SupplierId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(Supplier entity, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.Suppliers.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        }

        public Task<bool> ExistsByCodeAsync(string code, int? excludeSupplierId = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Suppliers.AsQueryable().Where(x => x.Code == code);
            if (excludeSupplierId.HasValue) query = query.Where(x => x.SupplierId != excludeSupplierId.Value);
            return query.AnyAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}

4. ���� API (����� ��������)
�� ��� ����� �� SalesSystem.Api/Controllers.
SuppliersController.cs
C#
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/suppliers")]
    public class SuppliersController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ISupplierService _supplierService;

        public SuppliersController(ISupplierService supplierService)
        {
            _supplierService = supplierService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest { PageNumber = request.PageNumber, PageSize = request.PageSize, SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm };
            var result = await _supplierService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<SupplierDto?>>> GetById(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<SupplierDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<SupplierDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create([FromBody] CreateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return CreatedAtAction(nameof(GetById), new { id = result.Data }, ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Supplier created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPut("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Update(int id, [FromBody] UpdateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.UpdateAsync(id, request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Supplier updated successfully"));
        }

        [HttpDelete("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Delete(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.DeleteAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Supplier deleted successfully"));
        }
    }
}

5. ���� Desktop (�������� ��������)
ISupplierApiService.cs & SupplierApiService.cs
C#
// SalesSystem.Desktop/Services/Api/ISupplierApiService.cs
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface ISupplierApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<SupplierDto?> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<int> CreateAsync(CreateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task UpdateAsync(int id, UpdateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task DeleteAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}

// SalesSystem.Desktop/Services/Api/SupplierApiService.cs
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class SupplierApiService : ApiServiceBase, ISupplierApiService
    {
        public SupplierApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient) { }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/suppliers?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm)) url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = "api/suppliers/lookup";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm)) url += $"?searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<SupplierDto?> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/suppliers/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<SupplierDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(CreateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/suppliers", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task UpdateAsync(int id, UpdateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/suppliers/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task DeleteAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/suppliers/{id}", cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
SuppliersListControl.cs
C#
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Suppliers
{
    public class SuppliersListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly ISupplierApiService _supplierApiService;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnEdit = null!;
        private Button btnDelete = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvSuppliers = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public SuppliersListControl(ISupplierApiService supplierApiService)
        {
            _supplierApiService = supplierApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadSuppliersAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            var topPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 50, Padding = new Padding(8) };

            txtSearch = new TextBox { Width = 260, PlaceholderText = "���� ���� ������ �� ����� �� ������..." };
            btnSearch = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadSuppliersAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) => { txtSearch.Clear(); await LoadSuppliersAsync(); };

            btnAdd = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync(null);

            btnEdit = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnEdit.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedSupplierId();
                if (id is null) { MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����."); return; }
                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            btnDelete = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnDelete.Click += async (_, _) => await DeleteSelectedAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Right, Width = 400, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft, WrapContents = false };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { btnDelete, btnEdit, btnAdd, btnRefresh, btnSearch });

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, WrapContents = false };
            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvSuppliers = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, ReadOnly = true, AllowUserToAddRows = false, AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect, MultiSelect = false, AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvSuppliers.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvSuppliers.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedSupplierId();
                if (id is null) return;
                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            lblStatus = new Label { Dock = DockStyle.Bottom, Height = 24, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft, Text = "����" };

            Controls.Add(dgvSuppliers);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadSuppliersAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);
                var result = await _supplierApiService.GetPagedAsync(new PagedQueryRequestDto { PageNumber = 1, PageSize = 200, SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text });
                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"��� ��������: {result.TotalCount}";
                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "��� ��� ����� ����� ��������";
            }
            finally { SetBusy(false); }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Count == 0) return;

            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("SupplierId")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["SupplierId"].HeaderText = "ID";
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("Code")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["Code"].HeaderText = "�����";
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("Name")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["Name"].HeaderText = "�����";
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("Phone")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["Phone"].HeaderText = "������";
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("CurrentBalance")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["CurrentBalance"].HeaderText = "������ ������";
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("IsActive")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["IsActive"].HeaderText = "���";
            
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("Email")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["Email"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("Address")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["Address"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("OpeningBalance")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["OpeningBalance"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("CreatedAt")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["CreatedAt"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("UpdatedAt")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["UpdatedAt"].Visible = false;
        }

        private int? GetSelectedSupplierId()
        {
            if (dgvSuppliers.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not SupplierDto row) return null;
            return row.SupplierId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync(int? supplierId)
        {
            using var form = new SupplierEditorForm(_supplierApiService, supplierId);
            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();
            if (result == DialogResult.OK) await LoadSuppliersAsync();
        }

        private async Task DeleteSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedSupplierId();
            if (id is null) { MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����."); return; }
            if (MessageBox.Show("�� ���� ��� �����Ͽ", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question) != DialogResult.Yes) return;

            try
            {
                await _supplierApiService.DeleteAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadSuppliersAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;
            txtSearch.Enabled = btnSearch.Enabled = btnRefresh.Enabled = btnAdd.Enabled = btnEdit.Enabled = btnDelete.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}
SupplierEditorForm.cs
C#
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Suppliers
{
    public class SupplierEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly ISupplierApiService _supplierApiService;
        private readonly int? _supplierId;
        private readonly ErrorProvider _errorProvider = new();

        private TextBox txtCode = null!;
        private TextBox txtName = null!;
        private TextBox txtPhone = null!;
        private TextBox txtEmail = null!;
        private TextBox txtAddress = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudOpeningBalance = null!;
        private CheckBox chkIsActive = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;

        public SupplierEditorForm(ISupplierApiService supplierApiService, int? supplierId = null)
        {
            _supplierApiService = supplierApiService;
            _supplierId = supplierId;
            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadFormAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = _supplierId.HasValue ? "����� ����" : "����� ����";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            Size = new Size(600, 480);
            MinimumSize = new Size(550, 450);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;
            MaximizeBox = false; MinimizeBox = false;

            var mainPanel = new TableLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, Padding = new Padding(12), ColumnCount = 1, RowCount = 8 };
            for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 45));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 50));

            txtCode = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "�����" };
            txtName = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "��� ������" };
            txtPhone = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "��� ������" };
            txtEmail = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "������ ����������" };
            txtAddress = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "�������" };
            
            nudOpeningBalance = new NumericUpDown { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, DecimalPlaces = 2, Minimum = 0, Maximum = 100000000, ThousandsSeparator = true };
            chkIsActive = new CheckBox { Text = "���", Checked = true, Dock = DockStyle.Left };

            btnSave = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 120, Height = 35 };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 120, Height = 35, DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, WrapContents = false };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("�����:", txtCode), 0, 0);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("��� ������:", txtName), 0, 1);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������:", txtPhone), 0, 2);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������:", txtEmail), 0, 3);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("�������:", txtAddress), 0, 4);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("������ ���������:", nudOpeningBalance), 0, 5);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(chkIsActive, 0, 6);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel, 0, 7);

            Controls.Add(mainPanel);
            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;
        }

        private Panel CreateLabeledPanel(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            var label = new Label { Text = labelText, Dock = DockStyle.Right, Width = 120, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft };
            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);
            return panel;
        }

        private async Task LoadFormAsync()
        {
            if (!_supplierId.HasValue) return;
            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                var supplier = await _supplierApiService.GetByIdAsync(_supplierId.Value);
                if (supplier is null) { MessageBox.Show("������ ��� �����.", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning); Close(); return; }

                txtCode.Text = supplier.Code ?? string.Empty;
                txtName.Text = supplier.Name;
                txtPhone.Text = supplier.Phone ?? string.Empty;
                txtEmail.Text = supplier.Email ?? string.Empty;
                txtAddress.Text = supplier.Address ?? string.Empty;
                nudOpeningBalance.Value = supplier.OpeningBalance;
                nudOpeningBalance.Enabled = false; 
                chkIsActive.Checked = supplier.IsActive;
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); Close(); }
            finally { UseWaitCursor = false; }
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (!ValidateForm()) return;
            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                btnSave.Enabled = false;

                if (_supplierId.HasValue)
                {
                    await _supplierApiService.UpdateAsync(_supplierId.Value, new UpdateSupplierRequestDto
                    {
                        Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text), Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                        Phone = TrimToNull(txtPhone.Text), Email = TrimToNull(txtEmail.Text),
                        Address = TrimToNull(txtAddress.Text), IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
                    });
                }
                else
                {
                    await _supplierApiService.CreateAsync(new CreateSupplierRequestDto
                    {
                        Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text), Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                        Phone = TrimToNull(txtPhone.Text), Email = TrimToNull(txtEmail.Text),
                        Address = TrimToNull(txtAddress.Text), OpeningBalance = nudOpeningBalance.Value,
                        IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
                    });
                }

                MessageBox.Show("�� ����� �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
            finally { UseWaitCursor = false; btnSave.Enabled = true; }
        }

        private bool ValidateForm()
        {
            _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, string.Empty);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtName.Text))
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, "��� ������ �����.");
                return false;
            }
            return true;
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value) => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? null : value.Trim();
    }
}

6. ����� ��� Dependency Injection (������ ������� ��������)
�� SalesSystem.Application/DependencyInjection.cs:
C#
services.AddScoped<ISupplierService, SupplierService>();
�� SalesSystem.Infrastructure/DependencyInjection.cs:
C#
services.AddScoped<ISupplierRepository, SupplierRepository>();
�� SalesSystem.Desktop/Program.cs:
C#
services.AddHttpClient<ISupplierApiService, SupplierApiService>(client =>
{
    client.BaseAddress = new Uri(baseUrl);
});
services.AddTransient<SuppliersListControl>();
services.AddTransient<SupplierEditorForm>();

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers
{
    public class CreateSupplierRequestDto
    {
        [MaxLength(30)]
        public string? Code { get; set; }

        [Required]
        [MaxLength(150)]
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;

        [MaxLength(20)]
        public string? Phone { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(100)]
        public string? Email { get; set; }

        [MaxLength(250)]
        public string? Address { get; set; }

        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal OpeningBalance { get; set; }

        public bool IsActive { get; set; } = true;
    }
}
