{
    client.BaseAddress = new Uri(baseUrl);
});

// ����� ����� ���������
services.AddTransient<PurchasesListControl>();
services.AddTransient<PurchaseEditorForm>();

���� ������ ����
1. ����� ��� API Client ����� ���������� ���� ���� ��� ������ �������.
2. ����� ���� PurchasesListControl ���� ���� �������� ������ �������� �� ����� �������� (����� ����� ������ ������ ������� ������ ��� ������).
3. ����� ���� PurchaseEditorForm (Master-Detail) ����� �����:
o ���� ������� �������� �� ��� API (������ ����� ������).
o ���� ���������� ���� �� ������ (Real-time).
o ����� �� ���� "�������" ����� ��� ����� ����� (Cash, Credit, Mixed).
o ���� �������� �������� ����� ����.
���� ������ ���� ������ ����� ��� �������� (Sales) �� �������� ����� (��� �� ������� ������� �� ������� ��� ��������).
�� ������ �� ����� ������ ����� ��� Desktop �������� (Sales) ������ ������ ��������� �������� (���� -> ���) �������





�����! ���� ��� ��� ������ ������ɡ ��� ����� ������ ��������� ������ (���� �� ���). ����� ���� ����� **������ ��� ������ (Desktop UI)** ������ �� **������ �������� (Sales Module)**.

��� ������ ����� ������ ����� ��������� (Master-Detail)� ����� ������� �� ������� ����� �� �������� ������ ���� ������� ��� �����.

���� ����� ������ ����� ��� Desktop ������ ���������:

---

### 1. ����� ������� ���� API �������� (Desktop API Services)

�� ���� ������� �� ���� `SalesSystem.Desktop/Services/Api`.

#### `ISalesApiService.cs`

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Sales;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface ISalesApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
            
        Task<SalesInvoiceDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
            
        Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
            
        Task CancelAsync(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
            
        Task<SalesSummaryDto> GetSummaryAsync(
            SalesSummaryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}

```

#### `SalesApiService.cs`

```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Sales;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class SalesApiService : ApiServiceBase, ISalesApiService
    {
        public SalesApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient) { }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/sales?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm))
                url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<SalesInvoiceDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/sales/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<SalesInvoiceDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/sales", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task CancelAsync(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsync($"api/sales/{id}/cancel", null, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<SalesSummaryDto> GetSummaryAsync(
            SalesSummaryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = "api/sales/summary?";
            if (request.From.HasValue) url += $"from={request.From.Value:yyyy-MM-dd}&";
            if (request.To.HasValue) url += $"to={request.To.Value:yyyy-MM-dd}&";
            if (request.WarehouseId.HasValue) url += $"warehouseId={request.WarehouseId.Value}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<SalesSummaryDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}

```

---

### 2. ���� ����� �������� (Sales List Control)

�� ��� ����� �� `SalesSystem.Desktop/Controls/Sales`.

#### `SalesListControl.cs`

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Sales;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Sales;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Sales
{
    public class SalesListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly ISalesApiService _salesApiService;
        private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnView = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvInvoices = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public SalesListControl(ISalesApiService salesApiService, IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
        {
            _salesApiService = salesApiService;
            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadInvoicesAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            var topPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 50, Padding = new Padding(8) };

            txtSearch = new TextBox { Width = 260, PlaceholderText = "���� ���� �������� �� ������..." };
            btnSearch = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadInvoicesAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) => { txtSearch.Clear(); await LoadInvoicesAsync(); };

            btnAdd = new Button { Text = "������ �����", Width = 100 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync();

            btnView = new Button { Text = "��� ��������", Width = 100 };
            btnView.Click += (_, _) => { MessageBox.Show("���� ����� ���� ��� ������ �������� ������."); };

            btnCancel = new Button { Text = "����� ��������", Width = 100 };
            btnCancel.Click += async (_, _) => await CancelSelectedAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Right, Width = 500, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft, WrapContents = false };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { btnCancel, btnView, btnAdd, btnRefresh, btnSearch });

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, WrapContents = false };
            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvInvoices = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, ReadOnly = true, AllowUserToAddRows = false, AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect, MultiSelect = false, AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvInvoices.DataSource = _bindingSource;

            lblStatus = new Label { Dock = DockStyle.Bottom, Height = 24, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft, Text = "����" };

            Controls.Add(dgvInvoices);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadInvoicesAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);
                var result = await _salesApiService.GetPagedAsync(new PagedQueryRequestDto { PageNumber = 1, PageSize = 200, SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text });
                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"��� ������ ��������: {result.TotalCount}";
                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
            finally { SetBusy(false); }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Count == 0) return;

            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("SalesInvoiceId")) dgvInvoices.Columns["SalesInvoiceId"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("InvoiceNo")) dgvInvoices.Columns["InvoiceNo"].HeaderText = "��� ��������";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("CustomerName")) dgvInvoices.Columns["CustomerName"].HeaderText = "������";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("WarehouseName")) dgvInvoices.Columns["WarehouseName"].HeaderText = "������";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("InvoiceDate")) dgvInvoices.Columns["InvoiceDate"].HeaderText = "�������";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("PaymentType")) dgvInvoices.Columns["PaymentType"].HeaderText = "��� �����";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("TotalAmount")) dgvInvoices.Columns["TotalAmount"].HeaderText = "��������";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("DueAmount")) dgvInvoices.Columns["DueAmount"].HeaderText = "�������";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("Status")) dgvInvoices.Columns["Status"].HeaderText = "������";
        }

        private int? GetSelectedInvoiceId()
        {
            if (dgvInvoices.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not SalesInvoiceListDto row) return null;
            return row.SalesInvoiceId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync()
        {
            using var form = Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProviderServiceExtensions.GetRequiredService<SaleEditorForm>(_serviceProvider);
            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();
            if (result == DialogResult.OK) await LoadInvoicesAsync();
        }

        private async Task CancelSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedInvoiceId();
            if (id is null) { MessageBox.Show("���� ������ �����."); return; }

            if (MessageBox.Show("����� �������� ����� ������ �������� ������� ������ ������� ������.\n�� ��� ����Ͽ", "����� �������", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Warning) != DialogResult.Yes) return;

            try
            {
                await _salesApiService.CancelAsync(id.Value);
                MessageBox.Show("�� ����� �������� �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                await LoadInvoicesAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;
            txtSearch.Enabled = btnSearch.Enabled = btnRefresh.Enabled = btnAdd.Enabled = btnView.Enabled = btnCancel.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}

```

### 3. ���� ����� ������ ����� (Sale Editor Form)

�� ��� ����� �� `SalesSystem.Desktop/Forms/Sales`.

#### `SaleEditorForm.cs`

```csharp
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Sales;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Warehouses;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Sales
{
    public class SaleEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly ISalesApiService _salesApiService;
        private readonly ICustomerApiService _customerApiService;
        private readonly IWarehouseApiService _warehouseApiService;
        private readonly IProductApiService _productApiService;
        
        private readonly BindingList<CreateSalesInvoiceItemRequestDto> _items = new();

        // Header
        private ComboBox cmbCustomer = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbWarehouse = null!;
        private DateTimePicker dtpInvoiceDate = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbPaymentType = null!;
        
        // Items
        private ComboBox cmbProduct = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudQuantity = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudUnitPrice = null!;
        private Button btnAddItem = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvItems = null!;

        // Footer
        private NumericUpDown nudDiscount = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudTax = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudPaid = null!;
        private TextBox txtNotes = null!;
        private Label lblSubTotal = null!;
        private Label lblTotal = null!;
        private Label lblDue = null!;
        
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;

        public SaleEditorForm(
            ISalesApiService salesApiService,
            ICustomerApiService customerApiService,
            IWarehouseApiService warehouseApiService,
            IProductApiService productApiService)
        {
            _salesApiService = salesApiService;
            _customerApiService = customerApiService;
            _warehouseApiService = warehouseApiService;
            _productApiService = productApiService;
            
            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadLookupsAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = "������ ������ �����";
            Size = new Size(950, 700);
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            MinimumSize = new Size(900, 650);

            // --- Header ---
            var grpHeader = new GroupBox { Text = "������ ��������", Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 80, Padding = new Padding(10) };
            cmbCustomer = new ComboBox { Width = 200, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            cmbWarehouse = new ComboBox { Width = 150, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            dtpInvoiceDate = new DateTimePicker { Width = 150, Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Short };
            cmbPaymentType = new ComboBox { Width = 120, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            
            cmbPaymentType.Items.Add(new { Text = "���� (Cash)", Value = InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash });
            cmbPaymentType.Items.Add(new { Text = "��� (Credit)", Value = InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit });
            cmbPaymentType.Items.Add(new { Text = "����� (Mixed)", Value = InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Mixed });
            cmbPaymentType.DisplayMember = "Text";
            cmbPaymentType.ValueMember = "Value";
            cmbPaymentType.SelectedIndex = 0;
            cmbPaymentType.SelectedIndexChanged += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();

            var flpHeader = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight };
            flpHeader.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] {
                new Label { Text = "������:", Width = 50, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, cmbCustomer,
                new Label { Text = "������:", Width = 50, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, cmbWarehouse,
                new Label { Text = "�������:", Width = 50, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, dtpInvoiceDate,
                new Label { Text = "�����:", Width = 50, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, cmbPaymentType
            });
            grpHeader.Controls.Add(flpHeader);

            // --- Items ---
            var grpItemEntry = new GroupBox { Text = "����� ���", Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 70, Padding = new Padding(10) };
            cmbProduct = new ComboBox { Width = 250, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            nudQuantity = new NumericUpDown { Width = 80, DecimalPlaces = 3, Minimum = 0.001m, Maximum = 100000m, Value = 1m };
            nudUnitPrice = new NumericUpDown { Width = 100, DecimalPlaces = 2, Maximum = 1000000m };
            btnAddItem = new Button { Text = "����� ������", Width = 100 };
            
            cmbProduct.SelectedIndexChanged += (_, _) =>
            {
                if (cmbProduct.SelectedItem is ProductLookupDto prod) nudUnitPrice.Value = prod.SalePrice;
            };

            btnAddItem.Click += BtnAddItem_Click;

            var flpItemEntry = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight };
            flpItemEntry.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] {
                new Label { Text = "�����:", Width = 50, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, cmbProduct,
                new Label { Text = "������:", Width = 50, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, nudQuantity,
                new Label { Text = "��� �����:", Width = 80, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, nudUnitPrice,
                btnAddItem
            });
            grpItemEntry.Controls.Add(flpItemEntry);

            // --- Grid ---
            dgvItems = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, AllowUserToAddRows = false, AutoGenerateColumns = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect, MultiSelect = false
            };
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "ProductId", HeaderText = "��� �����", ReadOnly = true, Width = 80 });
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { HeaderText = "��� �����", ReadOnly = true, Width = 200 }); 
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "Quantity", HeaderText = "������", Width = 80 });
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "UnitPrice", HeaderText = "�����", Width = 100 });
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "DiscountAmount", HeaderText = "��� �����", Width = 80 });
            dgvItems.DataSource = _items;
            
            _items.ListChanged += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();
            dgvItems.CellValueChanged += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();
            dgvItems.RowsRemoved += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();

            // --- Footer ---
            var grpFooter = new GroupBox { Text = "���������� ������", Dock = DockStyle.Bottom, Height = 140 };
            nudDiscount = new NumericUpDown { Width = 100, DecimalPlaces = 2, Maximum = 1000000m };
            nudTax = new NumericUpDown { Width = 100, DecimalPlaces = 2, Maximum = 1000000m };
            nudPaid = new NumericUpDown { Width = 100, DecimalPlaces = 2, Maximum = 10000000m };
            txtNotes = new TextBox { Width = 300, Multiline = true, Height = 50, PlaceholderText = "������� ��������..." };
            
            nudDiscount.ValueChanged += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();
            nudTax.ValueChanged += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();
            nudPaid.ValueChanged += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();

            lblSubTotal = new Label { Width = 150, Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 10, FontStyle.Bold), ForeColor = Color.Blue };
            lblTotal = new Label { Width = 150, Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 11, FontStyle.Bold), ForeColor = Color.Green };
            lblDue = new Label { Width = 150, Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 11, FontStyle.Bold), ForeColor = Color.Red };

            btnSave = new Button { Text = "��� ��������", Width = 150, Height = 40, BackColor = Color.LightGreen };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveInvoiceAsync();
            btnCancel = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 100, Height = 40 };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var flpFooterLeft = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Right, Width = 400, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.TopDown, Padding = new Padding(10) };
            flpFooterLeft.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] {
                new Label { Text = "����� ��������:" }, nudDiscount,
                new Label { Text = "�������:" }, nudTax,
                new Label { Text = "������ �������:" }, nudPaid
            });

            var flpFooterRight = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Left, Width = 300, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.TopDown, Padding = new Padding(10) };
            flpFooterRight.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { lblSubTotal, lblTotal, lblDue, txtNotes });

            var flpButtons = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Bottom, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, Padding = new Padding(10), Height = 60 };
            flpButtons.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { btnSave, btnCancel });

            grpFooter.Controls.Add(flpFooterLeft);
            grpFooter.Controls.Add(flpFooterRight);
            grpFooter.Controls.Add(flpButtons);

            Controls.Add(dgvItems);
            Controls.Add(grpItemEntry);
            Controls.Add(grpHeader);
            Controls.Add(grpFooter);
        }

        private async Task LoadLookupsAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                
                var customersTask = _customerApiService.GetLookupAsync();
                var warehousesTask = _warehouseApiService.GetLookupAsync();
                var productsTask = _productApiService.LookupAsync();

                await Task.WhenAll(customersTask, warehousesTask, productsTask);

                var customers = customersTask.Result.ToList();
                customers.Insert(0, new CustomerLookupDto { CustomerId = 0, Name = "-- ���� ���� (���� �����) --" });
                cmbCustomer.DataSource = customers;
                cmbCustomer.DisplayMember = "Name";
                cmbCustomer.ValueMember = "CustomerId";

                cmbWarehouse.DataSource = warehousesTask.Result.ToList();
                cmbWarehouse.DisplayMember = "Name";
                cmbWarehouse.ValueMember = "WarehouseId";

                cmbProduct.DataSource = productsTask.Result.ToList();
                cmbProduct.DisplayMember = "Name";
                cmbProduct.ValueMember = "ProductId";
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "��� ��������", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
            finally { UseWaitCursor = false; }
        }

        private void BtnAddItem_Click(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (cmbProduct.SelectedItem is not ProductLookupDto product) return;

            var existingItem = _items.FirstOrDefault(x => x.ProductId == product.ProductId);
            if (existingItem != null)
            {
                existingItem.Quantity += nudQuantity.Value;
                _items.ResetBindings();
            }
            else
            {
                _items.Add(new CreateSalesInvoiceItemRequestDto
                {
                    ProductId = product.ProductId,
                    Quantity = nudQuantity.Value,
                    UnitPrice = nudUnitPrice.Value,
                    DiscountAmount = 0
                });
            }

            dgvItems.Rows[_items.Count - 1].Cells[1].Value = product.Name;
            nudQuantity.Value = 1;
        }

        private void CalculateTotals()
        {
            decimal subTotal = _items.Sum(i => (i.Quantity * i.UnitPrice) - i.DiscountAmount);
            decimal total = subTotal - nudDiscount.Value + nudTax.Value;
            
            var paymentType = (InvoicePaymentTypeDto)cmbPaymentType.SelectedValue!;
            if (paymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash) { nudPaid.Value = total; nudPaid.Enabled = false; }
            else if (paymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit) { nudPaid.Value = 0; nudPaid.Enabled = false; }
            else { nudPaid.Enabled = true; } // Mixed

            decimal due = total - nudPaid.Value;

            lblSubTotal.Text = $"������� ������: {subTotal:N2}";
            lblTotal.Text = $"�������� �������: {total:N2}";
            lblDue.Text = $"������� (�����): {due:N2}";
        }

        private async Task SaveInvoiceAsync()
        {
            if (_items.Count == 0) { MessageBox.Show("��� ����� ������ ��� �����."); return; }
            if (cmbWarehouse.SelectedValue == null) { MessageBox.Show("���� ������."); return; }

            int? customerId = (int)cmbCustomer.SelectedValue == 0 ? null : (int)cmbCustomer.SelectedValue;
            var paymentType = (InvoicePaymentTypeDto)cmbPaymentType.SelectedValue!;

            if (paymentType != InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash && customerId == null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("�� ���� ��� ������ ���� ����� ���� ���� �����. ���� ������ ���� ����.", "�����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                return;
            }

            var request = new CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto
            {
                CustomerId = customerId,
                WarehouseId = (int)cmbWarehouse.SelectedValue,
                InvoiceDate = dtpInvoiceDate.Value,
                DueDate = paymentType != InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash ? dtpInvoiceDate.Value.AddDays(30) : null,
                PaymentType = paymentType,
                DiscountAmount = nudDiscount.Value,
                TaxAmount = nudTax.Value,
                PaidAmount = nudPaid.Value,
                Notes = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtNotes.Text) ? null : txtNotes.Text.Trim(),
                Items = _items.ToList()
            };

            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                btnSave.Enabled = false;
                await _salesApiService.CreateAsync(request);
                MessageBox.Show("�� ��� �������� �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "��� ������", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
            finally { UseWaitCursor = false; btnSave.Enabled = true; }
        }
    }
}

```

### ������� �������

��� �� ������ ������ ��������� ������ ���� ����! ??
���� �����:

1. ����� ������ ������ (������ʡ ��������ʡ �������).
2. ����� ������� (��������)� �������� ��������.
3. ����� ������ **������** (����� ������� ������ ������� �������� ��� ���� ����).
4. ����� ������ **�����** (��� ������� �� ������� ������ �������� �������� ���� ����� �� ���� ��� ���� ������).

������ �������� ������� �������� ��������� ��������� �� **������ ��������� (Payments Module)** (����� ��� �� �������� ������ ��� ��������).

�� ���� �� �� ���� ������� ����

����� �� �� ���! ����� ����� ���� ����� ������.
����� ���� ��� ������ ��������� (Payments Module)� ��� ����� ��� ����:
1. ����� ��� �� ������� (Customer Payments): ������ ���������ʡ ������ ���� ������ (CurrentBalance).
2. ����� ��� �������� (Supplier Payments): ������ ���������ǡ ������ ���� ������.
����� ����� �������� ��������ɡ ������� ��� Transactions ������ ������ ������ ���� ������ �� ���� �����.
���� ����� ������ ���������� (������� ���������) �� ����� �������� ���� ����� ��������.

1. ���� Contracts (���� ��� ��������)
��� ��� ������� �� �������� ��������.
CustomerPaymentDto.cs & CreateCustomerPaymentRequestDto.cs
(�� SalesSystem.Contracts/Customers)
C#
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers
{
    public class CustomerPaymentDto
    {
        public int CustomerPaymentId { get; set; }
        public string PaymentNo { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int CustomerId { get; set; }
        public string CustomerName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int? SalesInvoiceId { get; set; }
        public DateTime PaymentDate { get; set; }
        public decimal Amount { get; set; }
        public PaymentMethodDto PaymentMethod { get; set; }
        public string? ReferenceNo { get; set; }
        public string? Notes { get; set; }
        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }
    }

    public class CreateCustomerPaymentRequestDto
    {
        [Required]
        public int CustomerId { get; set; }
        public int? SalesInvoiceId { get; set; }
        public DateTime PaymentDate { get; set; } = DateTime.Now;
        [Range(0.01, double.MaxValue, ErrorMessage = "Amount must be greater than zero.")]
        public decimal Amount { get; set; }
        public PaymentMethodDto PaymentMethod { get; set; } = PaymentMethodDto.Cash;
        [MaxLength(50)]
        public string? ReferenceNo { get; set; }
        [MaxLength(500)]
        public string? Notes { get; set; }
    }
}

PaymentMappingProfile.cs (�� Mapping)
C#
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using ContractEnums = SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class PaymentMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public PaymentMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<CustomerPayment, CustomerPaymentDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.CustomerName, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Customer != null ? s.Customer.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentMethod, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.PaymentMethodDto)s.PaymentMethod));

            CreateMap<SupplierPayment, SupplierPaymentDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierName, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Supplier != null ? s.Supplier.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.PaymentMethod, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => (ContractEnums.PaymentMethodDto)s.PaymentMethod));
        }
    }
}
CustomerPaymentService.cs (�� Services)
��� ���� ������ �������� (����� ����� ������ ������� ������).
C#
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;
using AutoMapper;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class CustomerPaymentService : ICustomerPaymentService
    {
        private readonly ICustomerPaymentRepository _paymentRepository;
        private readonly ICustomerRepository _customerRepository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public CustomerPaymentService(ICustomerPaymentRepository paymentRepository, ICustomerRepository customerRepository, IUnitOfWork unitOfWork, IMapper mapper)
        {
            _paymentRepository = paymentRepository;
            _customerRepository = customerRepository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(CreateCustomerPaymentRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var customer = await _customerRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.CustomerId, cancellationToken);
            if (customer is null || !customer.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Customer not found or inactive.");

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                var payment = new CustomerPayment
                {
                    PaymentNo = $"RCP-{DateTime.Now:yyyyMMddHHmmss}", // ���� ������� InvoiceNumberGenerator ���
                    CustomerId = request.CustomerId,
                    SalesInvoiceId = request.SalesInvoiceId,
                    PaymentDate = request.PaymentDate,
                    Amount = request.Amount,
                    PaymentMethod = (PaymentMethod)request.PaymentMethod,
                    ReferenceNo = request.ReferenceNo,
                    Notes = request.Notes,
                    CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
                };

                await _paymentRepository.AddAsync(payment, cancellationToken);

                // ����� ������� ������
                customer.CurrentBalance -= request.Amount;
                customer.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result<int>.Success(payment.CustomerPaymentId);
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<CustomerPaymentDto>>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _paymentRepository.GetPagedAsync(request.SearchTerm, request.PageNumber, request.PageSize, cancellationToken);
            var dtos = _mapper.Map<List<CustomerPaymentDto>>(items);
            return Result<PagedResultDto<CustomerPaymentDto>>.Success(new PagedResultDto<CustomerPaymentDto>
            {
                Items = dtos, TotalCount = totalCount, PageNumber = request.PageNumber, PageSize = request.PageSize
            });
        }
    }
}
SupplierPaymentService.cs (�� Services)
����� ������ ����� ���� ������� ������.
C#
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;
using AutoMapper;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class SupplierPaymentService : ISupplierPaymentService
    {
        private readonly ISupplierPaymentRepository _paymentRepository;
        private readonly ISupplierRepository _supplierRepository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public SupplierPaymentService(ISupplierPaymentRepository paymentRepository, ISupplierRepository supplierRepository, IUnitOfWork unitOfWork, IMapper mapper)
        {
            _paymentRepository = paymentRepository;
            _supplierRepository = supplierRepository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(CreateSupplierPaymentRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var supplier = await _supplierRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.SupplierId, cancellationToken);
            if (supplier is null || !supplier.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier not found or inactive.");

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                var payment = new SupplierPayment
                {
                    PaymentNo = $"PAY-{DateTime.Now:yyyyMMddHHmmss}",
                    SupplierId = request.SupplierId,
                    PurchaseInvoiceId = request.PurchaseInvoiceId,
                    PaymentDate = request.PaymentDate,
                    Amount = request.Amount,
                    PaymentMethod = (PaymentMethod)request.PaymentMethod,
                    ReferenceNo = request.ReferenceNo,
                    Notes = request.Notes,
                    CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
                };

                await _paymentRepository.AddAsync(payment, cancellationToken);

                // ����� ������� ������ (����� ���� �����)
                supplier.CurrentBalance -= request.Amount;
                supplier.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result<int>.Success(payment.SupplierPaymentId);
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<SupplierPaymentDto>>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _paymentRepository.GetPagedAsync(request.SearchTerm, request.PageNumber, request.PageSize, cancellationToken);
            var dtos = _mapper.Map<List<SupplierPaymentDto>>(items);
            return Result<PagedResultDto<SupplierPaymentDto>>.Success(new PagedResultDto<SupplierPaymentDto>
            {
                Items = dtos, TotalCount = totalCount, PageNumber = request.PageNumber, PageSize = request.PageSize
            });
        }
    }
}

3. ���� Infrastructure (Repositories)
(�� SalesSystem.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories)
PaymentRepositories.cs
C#
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class CustomerPaymentRepository : ICustomerPaymentRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;
        public CustomerPaymentRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context) { _context = context; }

        public async Task AddAsync(CustomerPayment payment, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.CustomerPayments.AddAsync(payment, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<CustomerPayment> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm, int pageNumber, int pageSize, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.CustomerPayments.Include(x => x.Customer).AsNoTracking().AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x => x.PaymentNo.Contains(searchTerm) || (x.Customer != null && x.Customer.Name.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);
            var items = await query.OrderByDescending(x => x.PaymentDate).Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize).Take(pageSize).ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
            return (items, totalCount);
        }
    }

    public class SupplierPaymentRepository : ISupplierPaymentRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;
        public SupplierPaymentRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context) { _context = context; }

        public async Task AddAsync(SupplierPayment payment, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.SupplierPayments.AddAsync(payment, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<SupplierPayment> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm, int pageNumber, int pageSize, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.SupplierPayments.Include(x => x.Supplier).AsNoTracking().AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x => x.PaymentNo.Contains(searchTerm) || (x.Supplier != null && x.Supplier.Name.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);
            var items = await query.OrderByDescending(x => x.PaymentDate).Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize).Take(pageSize).ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
            return (items, totalCount);
        }
    }
}

4. ���� API (������� �����)
(�� SalesSystem.Api/Controllers)
CustomerPaymentsController.cs
C#
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/customer-payments")]
    public class CustomerPaymentsController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ICustomerPaymentService _paymentService;

        public CustomerPaymentsController(ICustomerPaymentService paymentService)
        {
            _paymentService = paymentService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CustomerPaymentDto>>>> GetPaged([FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest { PageNumber = request.PageNumber, PageSize = request.PageSize, SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm };
            var result = await _paymentService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CustomerPaymentDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<CustomerPaymentDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create([FromBody] CreateCustomerPaymentRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _paymentService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Payment created successfully")); // �������� Ok ������� ����� �� CreatedAtAction ���� �� ���� GetById ������
        }
    }
}
SupplierPaymentsController.cs
C#
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/supplier-payments")]
    public class SupplierPaymentsController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ISupplierPaymentService _paymentService;

        public SupplierPaymentsController(ISupplierPaymentService paymentService)
        {
            _paymentService = paymentService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SupplierPaymentDto>>>> GetPaged([FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest { PageNumber = request.PageNumber, PageSize = request.PageSize, SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm };
            var result = await _paymentService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SupplierPaymentDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SupplierPaymentDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create([FromBody] CreateSupplierPaymentRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _paymentService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Payment created successfully"));
        }
    }
}

5. ���� Desktop (�������� ��������)
(�� SalesSystem.Desktop)
IPaymentApiServices.cs & PaymentApiServices.cs (�� Services/Api)
C#
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface ICustomerPaymentApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<CustomerPaymentDto>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<int> CreateAsync(CreateCustomerPaymentRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }

    public interface ISupplierPaymentApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<SupplierPaymentDto>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<int> CreateAsync(CreateSupplierPaymentRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }

    public class CustomerPaymentApiService : ApiServiceBase, ICustomerPaymentApiService
    {
        public CustomerPaymentApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient) { }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<CustomerPaymentDto>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/customer-payments?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm)) url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<CustomerPaymentDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(CreateCustomerPaymentRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/customer-payments", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }

    public class SupplierPaymentApiService : ApiServiceBase, ISupplierPaymentApiService
    {
        public SupplierPaymentApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient) { }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<SupplierPaymentDto>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/supplier-payments?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm)) url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<SupplierPaymentDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(CreateSupplierPaymentRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/supplier-payments", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
CustomerPaymentsListControl.cs (�� Controls/Payments)
C#
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Payments;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Payments
{
    public class CustomerPaymentsListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly ICustomerPaymentApiService _paymentApiService;
        private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();
        private DataGridView dgvPayments = null!;
        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;

        public CustomerPaymentsListControl(ICustomerPaymentApiService paymentApiService, IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
        {
            _paymentApiService = paymentApiService;
            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadPaymentsAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            var topPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 50, Padding = new Padding(8) };
            
            txtSearch = new TextBox { Width = 260, PlaceholderText = "���� ���� ����� �� ������..." };
            var btnSearch = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadPaymentsAsync();

            var btnAdd = new Button { Text = "��� ��� ����", Width = 120 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync();

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight };
            searchPanel.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { txtSearch, btnSearch });
            
            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Right, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft, Width = 200 };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnAdd);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvPayments = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, ReadOnly = true, AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect, AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvPayments.DataSource = _bindingSource;

            Controls.Add(dgvPayments);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadPaymentsAsync()
        {
            Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor;
            try
            {
                var result = await _paymentApiService.GetPagedAsync(new PagedQueryRequestDto { PageNumber = 1, PageSize = 200, SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text });
                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
            }
            finally { Cursor = Cursors.Default; }
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync()
        {
            using var form = Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProviderServiceExtensions.GetRequiredService<CustomerPaymentEditorForm>(_serviceProvider);
            if (form.ShowDialog(FindForm()) == DialogResult.OK) await LoadPaymentsAsync();
        }
    }
}
(������: ���� SupplierPaymentsListControl ������ ������ ��� ���� ������ ISupplierPaymentApiService ������ "��� ��� ����").
CustomerPaymentEditorForm.cs (�� Forms/Payments)
C#
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Payments
{
    public class CustomerPaymentEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly ICustomerPaymentApiService _paymentApiService;
        private readonly ICustomerApiService _customerApiService;
        
        private ComboBox cmbCustomer = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudAmount = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbPaymentMethod = null!;
        private TextBox txtNotes = null!;

        public CustomerPaymentEditorForm(ICustomerPaymentApiService paymentApiService, ICustomerApiService customerApiService)
        {
            _paymentApiService = paymentApiService;
            _customerApiService = customerApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadCustomersAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = "��� ��� (����)";
            Size = new Size(400, 350);
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes; RightToLeftLayout = true;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;

            cmbCustomer = new ComboBox { Width = 200, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            nudAmount = new NumericUpDown { Width = 200, DecimalPlaces = 2, Maximum = 1000000m };
            cmbPaymentMethod = new ComboBox { Width = 200, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            txtNotes = new TextBox { Width = 200, Multiline = true, Height = 60 };

            cmbPaymentMethod.Items.Add(new { Text = "���� (Cash)", Value = PaymentMethodDto.Cash });
            cmbPaymentMethod.Items.Add(new { Text = "����� ����", Value = PaymentMethodDto.BankTransfer });
            cmbPaymentMethod.DisplayMember = "Text"; cmbPaymentMethod.ValueMember = "Value";
            cmbPaymentMethod.SelectedIndex = 0;

            var flp = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.TopDown, Padding = new Padding(20) };
            flp.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] {
                new Label { Text = "������:" }, cmbCustomer,
                new Label { Text = "������:" }, nudAmount,
                new Label { Text = "����� �����:" }, cmbPaymentMethod,
                new Label { Text = "�������:" }, txtNotes
            });

            var btnSave = new Button { Text = "��� �����", Dock = DockStyle.Bottom, Height = 40, BackColor = Color.LightGreen };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            Controls.Add(flp);
            Controls.Add(btnSave);
        }

        private async Task LoadCustomersAsync()
        {
            var customers = await _customerApiService.GetLookupAsync();
            cmbCustomer.DataSource = customers.ToList();
            cmbCustomer.DisplayMember = "Name"; cmbCustomer.ValueMember = "CustomerId";
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (cmbCustomer.SelectedValue == null || nudAmount.Value <= 0)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("���� �� ������ ���� ������ ���� ����."); return;
            }

            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                await _paymentApiService.CreateAsync(new CreateCustomerPaymentRequestDto
                {
                    CustomerId = (int)cmbCustomer.SelectedValue,
                    Amount = nudAmount.Value,
                    PaymentMethod = (PaymentMethodDto)cmbPaymentMethod.SelectedValue!,
                    Notes = txtNotes.Text
                });
                MessageBox.Show("�� ��� ����� �����.");
                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK; Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
            finally { UseWaitCursor = false; }
        }
    }
}
(���� ����ǡ ���� SupplierPaymentEditorForm ������ ��ǡ ������ ISupplierApiService � CreateSupplierPaymentRequestDto).

��� �������� ����� �������� ��� ����� �� ������� �� ���� (������) ��� ���� ��� (�����). ������� ��� ����� ��� ���� ����:

TransferMappingProfile.cs (�� Mapping)
C#
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Transfers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class TransferMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public TransferMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<StockTransferItem, StockTransferItemDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.ProductName, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.Product != null ? s.Product.Name : string.Empty));

            CreateMap<StockTransfer, StockTransferDto>()
                .ForMember(d => d.FromWarehouseName, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.FromWarehouse != null ? s.FromWarehouse.Name : string.Empty))
                .ForMember(d => d.ToWarehouseName, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.ToWarehouse != null ? s.ToWarehouse.Name : string.Empty));
        }
    }
}
StockTransferService.cs (�� Services)
��� ���� ������ ������ ���� ������� ����� ����� ��������.
C#
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Transfers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class StockTransferService : IStockTransferService
    {
        private readonly IStockTransferRepository _transferRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseStockRepository _stockRepository;
        private readonly IInventoryMovementRepository _movementRepository;
        private readonly IProductRepository _productRepository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public StockTransferService(
            IStockTransferRepository transferRepository,
            IWarehouseStockRepository stockRepository,
            IInventoryMovementRepository movementRepository,
            IProductRepository productRepository,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _transferRepository = transferRepository;
            _stockRepository = stockRepository;
            _movementRepository = movementRepository;
            _productRepository = productRepository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(CreateStockTransferRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            if (request.FromWarehouseId == request.ToWarehouseId)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Source and destination warehouses cannot be the same.");

            if (request.Items == null || request.Items.Count == 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Transfer must contain at least one item.");

            var transferItems = new List<StockTransferItem>();

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                var transfer = new StockTransfer
                {
                    TransferNo = $"TRN-{DateTime.Now:yyyyMMddHHmmss}",
                    FromWarehouseId = request.FromWarehouseId,
                    ToWarehouseId = request.ToWarehouseId,
                    TransferDate = request.TransferDate,
                    Notes = request.Notes,
                    Status = 2, // Posted
                    CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
                    Items = transferItems
                };

                await _transferRepository.AddAsync(transfer, cancellationToken);
                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

                foreach (var item in request.Items)
                {
                    var product = await _productRepository.GetByIdAsync(item.ProductId, cancellationToken);
                    if (product == null) return Result<int>.Failure($"Product {item.ProductId} not found.");

                    // 1. ������ �� ������ ������ ���� ������
                    var sourceStock = await _stockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(request.FromWarehouseId, item.ProductId, cancellationToken);
                    if (sourceStock == null || sourceStock.Quantity < item.Quantity)
                        return Result<int>.Failure($"Insufficient stock for '{product.Name}' in the source warehouse.");

                    sourceStock.Quantity -= item.Quantity;
                    sourceStock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    // 2. ����� ������ ������ ����� (������� �� �� ��� �������)
                    var destStock = await _stockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(request.ToWarehouseId, item.ProductId, cancellationToken);
                    if (destStock == null)
                    {
                        destStock = new WarehouseStock { WarehouseId = request.ToWarehouseId, ProductId = item.ProductId, Quantity = 0, UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow };
                        await _stockRepository.AddAsync(destStock, cancellationToken);
                    }
                    destStock.Quantity += item.Quantity;
                    destStock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    // 3. ����� ������� (���� �����)
                    await _movementRepository.AddAsync(new InventoryMovement
                    {
                        ProductId = item.ProductId, WarehouseId = request.FromWarehouseId, MovementType = InventoryMovementType.TransferOut,
                        ReferenceType = "StockTransfer", ReferenceId = transfer.StockTransferId, Quantity = item.Quantity, MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow, Notes = $"Transfer out to WH {request.ToWarehouseId}"
                    }, cancellationToken);

                    await _movementRepository.AddAsync(new InventoryMovement
                    {
                        ProductId = item.ProductId, WarehouseId = request.ToWarehouseId, MovementType = InventoryMovementType.TransferIn,
                        ReferenceType = "StockTransfer", ReferenceId = transfer.StockTransferId, Quantity = item.Quantity, MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow, Notes = $"Transfer in from WH {request.FromWarehouseId}"
                    }, cancellationToken);

                    transferItems.Add(new StockTransferItem { ProductId = item.ProductId, Quantity = item.Quantity, Notes = item.Notes });
                }

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result<int>.Success(transfer.StockTransferId);
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<StockTransferDto>>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _transferRepository.GetPagedAsync(request.SearchTerm, request.PageNumber, request.PageSize, cancellationToken);
            var dtos = _mapper.Map<List<StockTransferDto>>(items);
            return Result<PagedResultDto<StockTransferDto>>.Success(new PagedResultDto<StockTransferDto> { Items = dtos, TotalCount = totalCount, PageNumber = request.PageNumber, PageSize = request.PageSize });
        }

        public async Task<Result<StockTransferDto?>> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _transferRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity == null) return Result<StockTransferDto?>.Failure("Transfer not found.");
            return Result<StockTransferDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<StockTransferDto>(entity));
        }
    }
}

3. ���� Infrastructure (����� ��������)
StockTransferRepository.cs (�� Persistence/Repositories)
C#
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class StockTransferRepository : IStockTransferRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public StockTransferRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(StockTransfer transfer, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.StockTransfers.AddAsync(transfer, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<StockTransfer?> GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.StockTransfers
                .Include(x => x.FromWarehouse)
                .Include(x => x.ToWarehouse)
                .Include(x => x.Items).ThenInclude(i => i.Product)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.StockTransferId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<StockTransfer> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(string? searchTerm, int pageNumber, int pageSize, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.StockTransfers
                .Include(x => x.FromWarehouse)
                .Include(x => x.ToWarehouse)
                .AsNoTracking().AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x => x.TransferNo.Contains(searchTerm));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);
            var items = await query.OrderByDescending(x => x.TransferDate).Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize).Take(pageSize).ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }
    }
}

4. ���� API (�������)
StockTransfersController.cs (�� Controllers)
C#
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Transfers;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/transfers")]
    public class StockTransfersController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IStockTransferService _transferService;

        public StockTransfersController(IStockTransferService transferService)
        {
            _transferService = transferService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<StockTransferDto>>>> GetPaged([FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest { PageNumber = request.PageNumber, PageSize = request.PageSize, SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm };
            var result = await _transferService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<StockTransferDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<StockTransferDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<StockTransferDto?>>> GetById(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _transferService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<StockTransferDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<StockTransferDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create([FromBody] CreateStockTransferRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _transferService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return CreatedAtAction(nameof(GetById), new { id = result.Data }, ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Transfer completed successfully"));
        }
    }
}

C#
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Transfers;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface ITransferApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<StockTransferDto>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<int> CreateAsync(CreateStockTransferRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }

    public class TransferApiService : ApiServiceBase, ITransferApiService
    {
        public TransferApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient) { }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<StockTransferDto>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/transfers?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm)) url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<StockTransferDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(CreateStockTransferRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/transfers", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
TransferEditorForm.cs (�� Forms/Transfers)
���� ��� Master-Detail ������ ��������.
C#
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Transfers;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Warehouses;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Transfers
{
    public class TransferEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly ITransferApiService _transferApiService;
        private readonly IWarehouseApiService _warehouseApiService;
        private readonly IProductApiService _productApiService;
        private readonly BindingList<CreateStockTransferItemRequestDto> _items = new();

        private ComboBox cmbFromWarehouse = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbToWarehouse = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbProduct = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudQuantity = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvItems = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;

        public TransferEditorForm(ITransferApiService transferApiService, IWarehouseApiService warehouseApiService, IProductApiService productApiService)
        {
            _transferApiService = transferApiService;
            _warehouseApiService = warehouseApiService;
            _productApiService = productApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadLookupsAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = "����� ����� ��� �������";
            Size = new Size(800, 600);
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes; RightToLeftLayout = true;

            var grpHeader = new GroupBox { Text = "������ �������", Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 70, Padding = new Padding(10) };
            cmbFromWarehouse = new ComboBox { Width = 200, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            cmbToWarehouse = new ComboBox { Width = 200, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            var flpHeader = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            flpHeader.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { new Label { Text = "�� ����:" }, cmbFromWarehouse, new Label { Text = "��� ����:" }, cmbToWarehouse });
            grpHeader.Controls.Add(flpHeader);

            var grpItem = new GroupBox { Text = "����� ���", Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 70, Padding = new Padding(10) };
            cmbProduct = new ComboBox { Width = 250, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            nudQuantity = new NumericUpDown { Width = 100, DecimalPlaces = 3, Minimum = 0.001m, Maximum = 100000m };
            var btnAdd = new Button { Text = "�����" };
            btnAdd.Click += BtnAdd_Click;
            var flpItem = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            flpItem.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { new Label { Text = "�����:" }, cmbProduct, new Label { Text = "������:" }, nudQuantity, btnAdd });
            grpItem.Controls.Add(flpItem);

            dgvItems = new DataGridView { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, AutoGenerateColumns = false, AllowUserToAddRows = false, SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect };
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "ProductId", HeaderText = "��� �����" });
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { HeaderText = "��� �����", Width = 250 });
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "Quantity", HeaderText = "������" });
            dgvItems.DataSource = _items;

            btnSave = new Button { Text = "����� �������", Dock = DockStyle.Bottom, Height = 45, BackColor = Color.LightBlue };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            Controls.Add(dgvItems);
            Controls.Add(grpItem);
            Controls.Add(grpHeader);
            Controls.Add(btnSave);
        }

        private async Task LoadLookupsAsync()
        {
            var warehouses = await _warehouseApiService.GetLookupAsync();
            var products = await _productApiService.LookupAsync();
            
            cmbFromWarehouse.DataSource = warehouses.ToList(); cmbFromWarehouse.DisplayMember = "Name"; cmbFromWarehouse.ValueMember = "WarehouseId";
            cmbToWarehouse.DataSource = warehouses.ToList(); cmbToWarehouse.DisplayMember = "Name"; cmbToWarehouse.ValueMember = "WarehouseId";
            cmbProduct.DataSource = products.ToList(); cmbProduct.DisplayMember = "Name"; cmbProduct.ValueMember = "ProductId";
        }

        private void BtnAdd_Click(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (cmbProduct.SelectedItem is not ProductLookupDto prod) return;
            _items.Add(new CreateStockTransferItemRequestDto { ProductId = prod.ProductId, Quantity = nudQuantity.Value });
            dgvItems.Rows[_items.Count - 1].Cells[1].Value = prod.Name;
            nudQuantity.Value = 1;
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (_items.Count == 0) { MessageBox.Show("��� ������� �������."); return; }
            if (cmbFromWarehouse.SelectedValue == cmbToWarehouse.SelectedValue) { MessageBox.Show("�� ���� ������� ���� ������."); return; }

            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true; btnSave.Enabled = false;
                await _transferApiService.CreateAsync(new CreateStockTransferRequestDto
                {
                    FromWarehouseId = (int)cmbFromWarehouse.SelectedValue!,
                    ToWarehouseId = (int)cmbToWarehouse.SelectedValue!,
                    Items = _items.ToList()
                });
                MessageBox.Show("�� ������� �����!");
                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK; Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
            finally { UseWaitCursor = false; btnSave.Enabled = true; }
        }
    }
}

1. ���� Contracts (���� ��� ��������)

C#
using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Returns
{
    public class SalesReturnItemDto
    {
        public int ProductId { get; set; }
        public string ProductName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public decimal Quantity { get; set; }
        public decimal UnitPrice { get; set; }
        public decimal LineTotal { get; set; }
    }

    public class SalesReturnDto
    {
        public int SalesReturnId { get; set; }
        public string ReturnNo { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int? SalesInvoiceId { get; set; }
        public string CustomerName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string WarehouseName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public DateTime ReturnDate { get; set; }
        public string? Reason { get; set; }
        public decimal TotalAmount { get; set; }
        public InvoiceStatusDto Status { get; set; }
        public List<SalesReturnItemDto> Items { get; set; } = [];
    }

    public class CreateSalesReturnItemRequestDto
    {
        public int ProductId { get; set; }
        [Range(0.001, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal Quantity { get; set; }
        [Range(0, double.MaxValue)]
        public decimal UnitPrice { get; set; }
    }

    public class CreateSalesReturnRequestDto
    {
        public int? SalesInvoiceId { get; set; }
        [Required]
        public int CustomerId { get; set; }
        [Required]
        public int WarehouseId { get; set; }
        public DateTime ReturnDate { get; set; } = DateTime.Now;
        [MaxLength(250)]
        public string? Reason { get; set; }
        [Required]
        public List<CreateSalesReturnItemRequestDto> Items { get; set; } = [];
    }
}
