�����: ����� ���� ������� (Dashboard) �������
����� ���� ������� ��� ��� ����� ����� �� ������� ������ �� ������ (Cards) �����.
1. ���� Application (������)
�� SalesSystem.Application/Services/DashboardService.cs:
C#
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Dashboard;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence; // ����� ���� ����� ��� DbContext ������ �� ����������

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public interface IDashboardService
    {
        Task<Result<DashboardSummaryDto>> GetSummaryAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }

    public class DashboardService : IDashboardService
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public DashboardService(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<Result<DashboardSummaryDto>> GetSummaryAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var today = DateTime.UtcNow.Date;

            // �������� �����
            var todaySales = await _context.SalesInvoices
                .Where(x => x.Status != InvoiceStatus.Cancelled && x.InvoiceDate >= today)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            // ��������� �����
            var todayPurchases = await _context.PurchaseInvoices
                .Where(x => x.Status != InvoiceStatus.Cancelled && x.InvoiceDate >= today)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            // ������ (��� ������)
            var totalReceivables = await _context.Customers.Where(x => x.IsActive).SumAsync(x => x.CurrentBalance, cancellationToken);
            var totalPayables = await _context.Suppliers.Where(x => x.IsActive).SumAsync(x => x.CurrentBalance, cancellationToken);

            // ������� �������
            var activeCustomers = await _context.Customers.CountAsync(x => x.IsActive, cancellationToken);

            // ������� �� ������� (��� �� ���� ������)
            var lowStockCount = await _context.WarehouseStocks
                .Include(x => x.Product)
                .CountAsync(x => x.Quantity <= x.Product.MinStock, cancellationToken);

            var summary = new DashboardSummaryDto
            {
                TotalSalesToday = todaySales.Sum(x => x.TotalAmount),
                NumberOfSalesToday = todaySales.Count,
                TotalPurchasesToday = todayPurchases.Sum(x => x.TotalAmount),
                TotalReceivables = totalReceivables,
                TotalPayables = totalPayables,
                ActiveCustomersCount = activeCustomers,
                LowStockItemsCount = lowStockCount
            };

            return Result<DashboardSummaryDto>.Success(summary);
        }
    }
}
2. ���� API (�������)
�� SalesSystem.Api/Controllers/DashboardController.cs:
C#
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Dashboard;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/dashboard")]
    public class DashboardController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IDashboardService _dashboardService;

        public DashboardController(IDashboardService dashboardService)
        {
            _dashboardService = dashboardService;
        }

        [HttpGet("summary")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<DashboardSummaryDto>>> GetSummary(CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _dashboardService.GetSummaryAsync(cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<DashboardSummaryDto>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<DashboardSummaryDto>.Success(result.Data!));
        }
    }
}
3. ���� Desktop (���� ��� WinForms)
����� ����� ����� ��� ������ ������� (Panels) ������ ����� ������. �� SalesSystem.Desktop/Controls/DashboardControl.cs:
C#
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Dashboard;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls
{
    public class DashboardControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly HttpClient _httpClient;
        
        private Label lblSalesToday = null!;
        private Label lblPurchasesToday = null!;
        private Label lblReceivables = null!;
        private Label lblPayables = null!;
        private Label lblLowStock = null!;

        public DashboardControl(HttpClient httpClient)
        {
            _httpClient = httpClient;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadDataAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            BackColor = Color.FromArgb(245, 246, 250); // ��� ����� ����
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;

            var title = new Label
            {
                Text = "���� ���� ��� ������",
                Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 18, FontStyle.Bold),
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 60,
                Padding = new Padding(20, 20, 20, 0),
                ForeColor = Color.FromArgb(33, 43, 54)
            };

            var flowPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Padding = new Padding(20),
                AutoScroll = true
            };

            // ����� �������� ������ �������
            lblSalesToday = new Label { Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 16, FontStyle.Bold), ForeColor = Color.DarkGreen, AutoSize = true };
            flowPanel.Controls.Add(CreateCard("������ �����", lblSalesToday));

            lblPurchasesToday = new Label { Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 16, FontStyle.Bold), ForeColor = Color.DarkBlue, AutoSize = true };
            flowPanel.Controls.Add(CreateCard("������� �����", lblPurchasesToday));

            lblReceivables = new Label { Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 16, FontStyle.Bold), ForeColor = Color.DarkOrange, AutoSize = true };
            flowPanel.Controls.Add(CreateCard("���� ������� (���)", lblReceivables));

            lblPayables = new Label { Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 16, FontStyle.Bold), ForeColor = Color.DarkRed, AutoSize = true };
            flowPanel.Controls.Add(CreateCard("���� �������� (�����)", lblPayables));

            lblLowStock = new Label { Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 16, FontStyle.Bold), ForeColor = Color.Goldenrod, AutoSize = true };
            flowPanel.Controls.Add(CreateCard("����� �������", lblLowStock));

            Controls.Add(flowPanel);
            Controls.Add(title);
        }

        private Panel CreateCard(string title, Label valueLabel)
        {
            var card = new Panel
            {
                Width = 250,
                Height = 120,
                BackColor = Color.White,
                Margin = new Padding(10),
                BorderStyle = BorderStyle.FixedSingle
            };

            var lblTitle = new Label
            {
                Text = title,
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 12, FontStyle.Regular),
                ForeColor = Color.Gray,
                Padding = new Padding(10),
                Height = 40
            };

            valueLabel.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            valueLabel.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleCenter;

            card.Controls.Add(valueLabel);
            card.Controls.Add(lblTitle);
            return card;
        }

        private async Task LoadDataAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                var response = await _httpClient.GetFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<DashboardSummaryDto>>("api/dashboard/summary");
                if (response != null && response.IsSuccess && response.Data != null)
                {
                    lblSalesToday.Text = $"{response.Data.TotalSalesToday:N2} SAR";
                    lblPurchasesToday.Text = $"{response.Data.TotalPurchasesToday:N2} SAR";
                    lblReceivables.Text = $"{response.Data.TotalReceivables:N2} SAR";
                    lblPayables.Text = $"{response.Data.TotalPayables:N2} SAR";
                    lblLowStock.Text = $"{response.Data.LowStockItemsCount} ���";
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show($"��� �� ����� ���� �������: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
    }
}

������: ��������� ������ ��������� (Settings & Backup)
����� ��� ������ ��� ����� ������ ���� StoreSettings ������� ������ ������ ��� SQL ��� ���� ���� ��������.
1. ���� Application (������)
�� SalesSystem.Application/Services/SettingsService.cs:
C#
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class StoreSettingsDto
    {
        public string StoreName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Phone { get; set; }
        public string? Address { get; set; }
        public decimal DefaultTaxRate { get; set; }
    }

    public interface ISettingsService
    {
        Task<Result<StoreSettingsDto>> GetSettingsAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<Result> UpdateSettingsAsync(StoreSettingsDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<Result<string>> BackupDatabaseAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }

    public class SettingsService : ISettingsService
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public SettingsService(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<Result<StoreSettingsDto>> GetSettingsAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var settings = await _context.StoreSettings.FirstOrDefaultAsync(cancellationToken);
            if (settings == null) return Result<StoreSettingsDto>.Failure("Settings not found.");

            return Result<StoreSettingsDto>.Success(new StoreSettingsDto
            {
                StoreName = settings.StoreName,
                Phone = settings.Phone,
                Address = settings.Address,
                DefaultTaxRate = settings.DefaultTaxRate
            });
        }

        public async Task<Result> UpdateSettingsAsync(StoreSettingsDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var settings = await _context.StoreSettings.FirstOrDefaultAsync(cancellationToken);
            if (settings == null) return Result.Failure("Settings not found.");

            settings.StoreName = request.StoreName;
            settings.Phone = request.Phone;
            settings.Address = request.Address;
            settings.DefaultTaxRate = request.DefaultTaxRate;
            settings.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result<string>> BackupDatabaseAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            try
            {
                // ���� ����� ��������� �� ���� ����� ��������
                string backupFolder = @"C:\SalesSystemBackups";
                if (!Directory.Exists(backupFolder)) Directory.CreateDirectory(backupFolder);

                string fileName = $"SalesSystemDb_Backup_{DateTime.Now:yyyyMMdd_HHmmss}.bak";
                string fullPath = Path.Combine(backupFolder, fileName);

                // ����� ��� ����� ��������� ����� �� SQL Server
                string sqlCommand = $"BACKUP DATABASE [SalesSystemDb] TO DISK = '{fullPath}'";
                await _context.Database.ExecuteSqlRawAsync(sqlCommand, cancellationToken);

                return Result<string>.Success(fullPath);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                return Result<string>.Failure($"��� ����� ���������: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
    }
}
2. ���� API (�������)
�� SalesSystem.Api/Controllers/SettingsController.cs:
C#
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Services;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/settings")]
    public class SettingsController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ISettingsService _settingsService;

        public SettingsController(ISettingsService settingsService)
        {
            _settingsService = settingsService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<StoreSettingsDto>>> GetSettings(CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _settingsService.GetSettingsAsync(cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<StoreSettingsDto>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<StoreSettingsDto>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpPut]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> UpdateSettings([FromBody] StoreSettingsDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _settingsService.UpdateSettingsAsync(request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "�� ������� �����"));
        }

        [HttpPost("backup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<string>>> BackupDatabase(CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _settingsService.BackupDatabaseAsync(cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<string>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<string>.Success(result.Data!, "�� ����� ��������� �����"));
        }
    }
}
3. ���� Desktop (���� ���������)
�� SalesSystem.Desktop/Controls/SettingsControl.cs:
C#
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Application.Services; // DTO Namespace
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls
{
    public class SettingsControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly HttpClient _httpClient;
        
        private TextBox txtStoreName = null!;
        private TextBox txtPhone = null!;
        private TextBox txtAddress = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudTaxRate = null!;

        public SettingsControl(HttpClient httpClient)
        {
            _httpClient = httpClient;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadSettingsAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            BackColor = Color.White;

            var title = new Label { Text = "��������� ������ ���������", Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 16, FontStyle.Bold), Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 60, Padding = new Padding(20) };
            
            var pnlForm = new TableLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 250, ColumnCount = 2, Padding = new Padding(20) };
            pnlForm.ColumnStyles.Add(new ColumnStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 150));
            pnlForm.ColumnStyles.Add(new ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 100));

            txtStoreName = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            txtPhone = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            txtAddress = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            nudTaxRate = new NumericUpDown { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, DecimalPlaces = 2 };

            pnlForm.Controls.Add(new Label { Text = "��� �����:" }, 0, 0); pnlForm.Controls.Add(txtStoreName, 1, 0);
            pnlForm.Controls.Add(new Label { Text = "��� ������:" }, 0, 1); pnlForm.Controls.Add(txtPhone, 1, 1);
            pnlForm.Controls.Add(new Label { Text = "�������:" }, 0, 2); pnlForm.Controls.Add(txtAddress, 1, 2);
            pnlForm.Controls.Add(new Label { Text = "���� ������� ����������:" }, 0, 3); pnlForm.Controls.Add(nudTaxRate, 1, 3);

            var btnSave = new Button { Text = "��� ���������", Width = 150, Height = 40, BackColor = Color.FromArgb(33, 43, 54), ForeColor = Color.White };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveSettingsAsync();

            var btnBackup = new Button { Text = "��� ������� ������ ��������", Width = 200, Height = 40, BackColor = Color.DarkGreen, ForeColor = Color.White };
            btnBackup.Click += async (_, _) => await RunBackupAsync();

            var flpButtons = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 60, Padding = new Padding(20, 0, 20, 0) };
            flpButtons.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            flpButtons.Controls.Add(btnBackup);

            Controls.Add(flpButtons);
            Controls.Add(pnlForm);
            Controls.Add(title);
        }

        private async Task LoadSettingsAsync()
        {
            var response = await _httpClient.GetFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<StoreSettingsDto>>("api/settings");
            if (response != null && response.IsSuccess && response.Data != null)
            {
                txtStoreName.Text = response.Data.StoreName;
                txtPhone.Text = response.Data.Phone;
                txtAddress.Text = response.Data.Address;
                nudTaxRate.Value = response.Data.DefaultTaxRate;
            }
        }

        private async Task SaveSettingsAsync()
        {
            var request = new StoreSettingsDto
            {
                StoreName = txtStoreName.Text,
                Phone = txtPhone.Text,
                Address = txtAddress.Text,
                DefaultTaxRate = nudTaxRate.Value
            };

            var response = await _httpClient.PutAsJsonAsync("api/settings", request);
            if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
                MessageBox.Show("�� ��� ��������� �����.", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
        }

        private async Task RunBackupAsync()
        {
            Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor;
            try
            {
                var response = await _httpClient.PostAsync("api/settings/backup", null);
                var result = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<string>>();
                
                if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode && result != null && result.IsSuccess)
                    MessageBox.Show($"�� ����� ��������� �����.\n������: {result.Data}", "����", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                else
                    MessageBox.Show($"��� ����� ���������: {result?.Message}", "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
            finally { Cursor = Cursors.Default; }
        }
    }
}

��� ��� ������� �� �� ������ �� ������� ������� ����� ��� ����� ��������� (PRD) ������� �������� (Clean Architecture)� ����� ��� **������� ��������� ��� ��������** ���� ������� ���� ����� ���� ����������� ������.

���� ������� ������ ��� ������ �� �������:

### 1. ������ ������ ������ (Missing Infrastructure Implementations)

�������� ��� �������� (Interfaces) ����� �� ��� `Services`� ����� **�� ���� ����� ������ (Implementation)** ��ǡ ������� �� ���� ��� API ������ ��� ��� ��� Dependency Injection:

* **`SalesSystemDbContext.cs`**: ����� ������� ������� (`Fluent API`) ���� `Seed`� ����� �� ���� ������ ������� ���� ����� ��� ����� `DbSet<T>` ����� �������.

### 2. ����� �� ������ �������� (Business Logic Gaps)

* **����� ���� �������� ��������:** �� ���� ���� ���� ������ ���� �������� �� `Posted` ��� `Closed` �� `Paid` ����� ��� ��� `DueAmount` ��� ���.

### 3. ������� ������ �� ���� (Scope Gaps from PRD)

* **����� ��������� (Purchase Returns):** ���� ������ ����� �������� ������� ������ ����� ��������� �� "���/���" �� ��� �������ʡ ��� ���� ����� ������ ��.

### 4. ����� �� ����� �������� (Desktop UI Gaps)

C#
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence
{
    public class SalesSystemDbContext : DbContext
    {
        public SalesSystemDbContext(DbContextOptions<SalesSystemDbContext> options) : base(options)
        {
        }

        // ����� ���� ����� ������
        public DbSet<User> Users => Set<User>();
        public DbSet<Unit> Units => Set<Unit>();
        public DbSet<Category> Categories => Set<Category>();
        public DbSet<Product> Products => Set<Product>();
        public DbSet<Warehouse> Warehouses => Set<Warehouse>();
        public DbSet<WarehouseStock> WarehouseStocks => Set<WarehouseStock>();
        public DbSet<Supplier> Suppliers => Set<Supplier>();
        public DbSet<Customer> Customers => Set<Customer>();
        public DbSet<PurchaseInvoice> PurchaseInvoices => Set<PurchaseInvoice>();
        public DbSet<PurchaseInvoiceItem> PurchaseInvoiceItems => Set<PurchaseInvoiceItem>();
        public DbSet<SalesInvoice> SalesInvoices => Set<SalesInvoice>();
        public DbSet<SalesInvoiceItem> SalesInvoiceItems => Set<SalesInvoiceItem>();
        public DbSet<PurchaseReturn> PurchaseReturns => Set<PurchaseReturn>();
        public DbSet<PurchaseReturnItem> PurchaseReturnItems => Set<PurchaseReturnItem>();
        public DbSet<SalesReturn> SalesReturns => Set<SalesReturn>();
        public DbSet<SalesReturnItem> SalesReturnItems => Set<SalesReturnItem>();
        public DbSet<StockTransfer> StockTransfers => Set<StockTransfer>();
        public DbSet<StockTransferItem> StockTransferItems => Set<StockTransferItem>();
        public DbSet<CustomerPayment> CustomerPayments => Set<CustomerPayment>();
        public DbSet<SupplierPayment> SupplierPayments => Set<SupplierPayment>();
        public DbSet<InventoryMovement> InventoryMovements => Set<InventoryMovement>();
        public DbSet<StoreSettings> StoreSettings => Set<StoreSettings>();

        protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)
        {
            base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);
            
            // ����� ���� ��� Configurations (Fluent API) �������� �� ��� �������
            modelBuilder.ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly(typeof(SalesSystemDbContext).Assembly);
        }
    }
}

������ ��� ���� Application ����� �� �� ����� ��� Entity Framework� ���� ������ ������ ����� ITransaction. ���� ���� ������ ���� ������.
�� ��� ����� �� ����: SalesSystem.Infrastructure/Persistence/EfTransaction.cs
C#
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Storage;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence
{
    public class EfTransaction : ITransaction
    {
        private readonly IDbContextTransaction _transaction;

        public EfTransaction(IDbContextTransaction transaction)
        {
            _transaction = transaction;
        }

        public async Task CommitAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task RollbackAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
        {
            await _transaction.DisposeAsync();
        }
    }
}
3. ���� ����� (UnitOfWork.cs)
��� ������ ����� �� ��� ��������� �� ����� �������� ���� ����ɡ ���� �������� ������� (Transactions) ��� ���� ���������� �� �������� ���������� ����������.
�� ��� ����� �� ����: SalesSystem.Infrastructure/Persistence/UnitOfWork.cs
C#
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence
{
    public class UnitOfWork : IUnitOfWork
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public UnitOfWork(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<int> SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<ITransaction> BeginTransactionAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var dbContextTransaction = await _context.Database.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            return new EfTransaction(dbContextTransaction);
        }
    }
}
4. ���� ����� �������� (InvoiceNumberGenerator.cs)
��� ������ ����� ������ ��� ������ ���� �������� (�����: INV-202605-0001 ����� ��� ����� ������ ��������).
�� ��� ����� �� ����: SalesSystem.Infrastructure/Services/InvoiceNumberGenerator.cs
C#
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Services
{
    public class InvoiceNumberGenerator : IInvoiceNumberGenerator
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public InvoiceNumberGenerator(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<string> GenerateSalesInvoiceNoAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var today = DateTime.UtcNow;
            var prefix = $"INV-{today:yyyyMM}";

            // ����� �� ��� ������ �� ��� �����
            var lastInvoice = await _context.SalesInvoices
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Where(x => x.InvoiceNo.StartsWith(prefix))
                .OrderByDescending(x => x.InvoiceNo)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(cancellationToken);

            if (lastInvoice == null)
            {
                return $"{prefix}-0001";
            }

            // ������� ����� ������ �������
            var lastSequenceStr = lastInvoice.InvoiceNo.Substring(prefix.Length + 1);
            if (int.TryParse(lastSequenceStr, out int lastSequence))
            {
                return $"{prefix}-{(lastSequence + 1):D4}";
            }

            // �� ��� ���� ��� �� ����� ����� ������
            return $"{prefix}-0001";
        }
    }
}
5. ����� ������� �� Dependency Injection

// ����� ���� �����
services.AddScoped<IUnitOfWork, UnitOfWork>();

// ����� ���� ����� ��������
services.AddScoped<IInvoiceNumberGenerator, InvoiceNumberGenerator>();
���� �����ɡ ���� ���� ������ ������ �������� ������� ������� ��� Application ������� ������� �� �� ����� Dependency Injection ��� �������.






����� ����! ��� ���� ������ ���� ������ ������� (Infrastructure)� ����� ������ ��� �� ������� ��������� (Business Logic Gaps) ����� �������� ������� ����� ��������� (Purchase Returns) ��� ����� ������ ������.
�����: �� ������� ��������� (��� ������ ���������)
�� �����ޡ ���� ����� ������ ���� �� ���� ������/������ ���. ���� ����� ������ ���� ����� ��� ���� ��� �������� ������� (�� ����) ����� ������ ������ ������� (PaidAmount) ������ ������ ������� (DueAmount).
1. ����� CustomerPaymentService.cs
��� ISalesInvoiceRepository ������ �������� ��� ���� ������.
C#
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Customers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class CustomerPaymentService : ICustomerPaymentService
    {
        private readonly ICustomerPaymentRepository _paymentRepository;
        private readonly ICustomerRepository _customerRepository;
        private readonly ISalesInvoiceRepository _salesInvoiceRepository; // ��� �������
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public CustomerPaymentService(
            ICustomerPaymentRepository paymentRepository, 
            ICustomerRepository customerRepository, 
            ISalesInvoiceRepository salesInvoiceRepository,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork, 
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _paymentRepository = paymentRepository;
            _customerRepository = customerRepository;
            _salesInvoiceRepository = salesInvoiceRepository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(CreateCustomerPaymentRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var customer = await _customerRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.CustomerId, cancellationToken);
            if (customer is null || !customer.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Customer not found or inactive.");

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                var payment = new CustomerPayment
                {
                    PaymentNo = $"RCP-{DateTime.Now:yyyyMMddHHmmss}", 
                    CustomerId = request.CustomerId,
                    SalesInvoiceId = request.SalesInvoiceId,
                    PaymentDate = request.PaymentDate,
                    Amount = request.Amount,
                    PaymentMethod = (PaymentMethod)request.PaymentMethod,
                    ReferenceNo = request.ReferenceNo,
                    Notes = request.Notes,
                    CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
                };

                await _paymentRepository.AddAsync(payment, cancellationToken);

                // 1. ����� ������� ������ ������
                customer.CurrentBalance -= request.Amount;
                customer.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                // 2. ����� ���� �������� (��� ������ ���������)
                if (request.SalesInvoiceId.HasValue)
                {
                    var invoice = await _salesInvoiceRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(request.SalesInvoiceId.Value, cancellationToken);
                    if (invoice != null && invoice.Status != InvoiceStatus.Cancelled)
                    {
                        invoice.PaidAmount += request.Amount;
                        invoice.DueAmount -= request.Amount;
                        
                        // ��� ���� ���� ������� �� �������� �� ��� ����� ������
                        if (invoice.DueAmount < 0) invoice.DueAmount = 0; 
                        
                        invoice.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                    }
                }

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result<int>.Success(payment.CustomerPaymentId);
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<CustomerPaymentDto>>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _paymentRepository.GetPagedAsync(request.SearchTerm, request.PageNumber, request.PageSize, cancellationToken);
            var dtos = _mapper.Map<List<CustomerPaymentDto>>(items);
            return Result<PagedResultDto<CustomerPaymentDto>>.Success(new PagedResultDto<CustomerPaymentDto>
            {
                Items = dtos, TotalCount = totalCount, PageNumber = request.PageNumber, PageSize = request.PageSize
            });
        }
    }
}
2. ����� SupplierPaymentService.cs
���� �����ޡ ���� IPurchaseInvoiceRepository ������ ������ ������.
C#
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class SupplierPaymentService : ISupplierPaymentService
    {
        private readonly ISupplierPaymentRepository _paymentRepository;
        private readonly ISupplierRepository _supplierRepository;
        private readonly IPurchaseInvoiceRepository _purchaseInvoiceRepository; // ��� �������
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public SupplierPaymentService(
            ISupplierPaymentRepository paymentRepository, 
            ISupplierRepository supplierRepository, 
            IPurchaseInvoiceRepository purchaseInvoiceRepository,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork, 
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _paymentRepository = paymentRepository;
            _supplierRepository = supplierRepository;
            _purchaseInvoiceRepository = purchaseInvoiceRepository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(CreateSupplierPaymentRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var supplier = await _supplierRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.SupplierId, cancellationToken);
            if (supplier is null || !supplier.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier not found or inactive.");

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                var payment = new SupplierPayment
                {
                    PaymentNo = $"PAY-{DateTime.Now:yyyyMMddHHmmss}",
                    SupplierId = request.SupplierId,
                    PurchaseInvoiceId = request.PurchaseInvoiceId,
                    PaymentDate = request.PaymentDate,
                    Amount = request.Amount,
                    PaymentMethod = (PaymentMethod)request.PaymentMethod,
                    ReferenceNo = request.ReferenceNo,
                    Notes = request.Notes,
                    CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
                };

                await _paymentRepository.AddAsync(payment, cancellationToken);

                // 1. ����� ������� ������
                supplier.CurrentBalance -= request.Amount;
                supplier.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                // 2. ����� ���� ������ ������
                if (request.PurchaseInvoiceId.HasValue)
                {
                    var invoice = await _purchaseInvoiceRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(request.PurchaseInvoiceId.Value, cancellationToken);
                    if (invoice != null && invoice.Status != InvoiceStatus.Cancelled)
                    {
                        invoice.PaidAmount += request.Amount;
                        invoice.DueAmount -= request.Amount;
                        
                        if (invoice.DueAmount < 0) invoice.DueAmount = 0;
                        
                        invoice.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                    }
                }

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result<int>.Success(payment.SupplierPaymentId);
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        // ... ���� GetPagedAsync ���� ��� ��
    }
}

������: ���� ������ ����� ��������� (Purchase Returns) �������
����� ��������� ���� ����� ����� �����ϡ ���� ����� ���� ��� �� ������� ������ ���� ���̡ �������� ��� ����� ����� ������� ������ �����.
1. ���� ����� ��������� (PurchaseReturnService.cs)
�� ��� ����� �� SalesSystem.Application/Services/PurchaseReturnService.cs.
C#
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Returns; // �������� ��� ���� ��������� ��� DTOs
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class PurchaseReturnService : IPurchaseReturnService
    {
        private readonly IPurchaseReturnRepository _returnRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseStockRepository _stockRepository;
        private readonly IInventoryMovementRepository _movementRepository;
        private readonly ISupplierRepository _supplierRepository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;

        public PurchaseReturnService(
            IPurchaseReturnRepository returnRepository,
            IWarehouseStockRepository stockRepository,
            IInventoryMovementRepository movementRepository,
            ISupplierRepository supplierRepository,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork)
        {
            _returnRepository = returnRepository;
            _stockRepository = stockRepository;
            _movementRepository = movementRepository;
            _supplierRepository = supplierRepository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(CreatePurchaseReturnRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            if (request.Items == null || request.Items.Count == 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Return must contain at least one item.");

            var supplier = await _supplierRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.SupplierId, cancellationToken);
            if (supplier == null) return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier not found.");

            decimal totalAmount = 0m;
            var returnItems = new List<PurchaseReturnItem>();

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                var purchaseReturn = new PurchaseReturn
                {
                    ReturnNo = $"P-RET-{DateTime.Now:yyyyMMddHHmmss}",
                    PurchaseInvoiceId = request.PurchaseInvoiceId,
                    SupplierId = request.SupplierId,
                    WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                    ReturnDate = request.ReturnDate,
                    Reason = request.Reason,
                    Status = InvoiceStatus.Posted,
                    CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
                    Items = returnItems
                };

                await _returnRepository.AddAsync(purchaseReturn, cancellationToken);
                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

                foreach (var item in request.Items)
                {
                    var lineTotal = item.Quantity * item.UnitCost;
                    totalAmount += lineTotal;

                    returnItems.Add(new PurchaseReturnItem { ProductId = item.ProductId, Quantity = item.Quantity, UnitCost = item.UnitCost, LineTotal = lineTotal });

                    // 1. ��� �������
                    var stock = await _stockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(request.WarehouseId, item.ProductId, cancellationToken);
                    if (stock == null || stock.Quantity < item.Quantity)
                    {
                        return Result<int>.Failure($"Insufficient stock to return for Product ID {item.ProductId}");
                    }
                    
                    stock.Quantity -= item.Quantity;
                    stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    // 2. ����� ���� ���� �������
                    await _movementRepository.AddAsync(new InventoryMovement
                    {
                        ProductId = item.ProductId, WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId, MovementType = InventoryMovementType.PurchaseReturnOut,
                        ReferenceType = "PurchaseReturn", ReferenceId = purchaseReturn.PurchaseReturnId, Quantity = item.Quantity, UnitCost = item.UnitCost, MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow, Notes = "Purchase Return"
                    }, cancellationToken);
                }

                purchaseReturn.SubTotal = totalAmount;
                purchaseReturn.TotalAmount = totalAmount;

                // 3. ����� ������� ������ (����� �� ����ɡ ���� ����� ���� �����)
                supplier.CurrentBalance -= totalAmount;
                supplier.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result<int>.Success(purchaseReturn.PurchaseReturnId);
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }
        
        // ���� ����� GetPagedAsync � GetByIdAsync ��� ������ ���� ��� ����� ��������
    }
}
2. ����� ��� API ������ ��������� (PurchaseReturnsController.cs)
�� ��� ����� �� SalesSystem.Api/Controllers/PurchaseReturnsController.cs.
C#
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Returns;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/purchase-returns")]
    public class PurchaseReturnsController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IPurchaseReturnService _returnService;

        public PurchaseReturnsController(IPurchaseReturnService returnService)
        {
            _returnService = returnService;
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create([FromBody] CreatePurchaseReturnRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _returnService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Purchase return processed successfully"));
        }
    }
}

using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Auth
{
    public class LoginRequestDto
    {
        [Required]
        public string UserName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        
        [Required]
        public string Password { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }

    public class AuthResponseDto
    {
        public string Token { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string FullName { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public int Role { get; set; }
    }
}

IAuthService.cs � AuthService.cs (�� Services)
(������: �� ������� �������� ������ BCrypt ������ ����� ������. ������� �� ��� ��� MVP ������ ���� ����� ����� �� ����� ������ ��� ��� �� ���� �������� �� ��� Initializer).
C#
using Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration;
using Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Auth;
using System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt;
using System.Security.Claims;
using System.Text;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public interface IAuthService
    {
        Task<Result<AuthResponseDto>> LoginAsync(LoginRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }

    public class AuthService : IAuthService
    {
        private readonly IUserRepository _userRepository;
        private readonly IConfiguration _configuration;

        public AuthService(IUserRepository userRepository, IConfiguration configuration)
        {
            _userRepository = userRepository;
            _configuration = configuration;
        }

        public async Task<Result<AuthResponseDto>> LoginAsync(LoginRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var user = await _userRepository.GetByUserNameAsync(request.UserName, cancellationToken);
            
            if (user == null || !user.IsActive)
                return Result<AuthResponseDto>.Failure("��� �������� �� ���� ������ ��� �����.");

            // ������� �� MVP: ������ ������ (�� ������� ������ BCrypt.Verify)
            // ��� ��� �� ���� "CHANGE_ME_HASH" �� ��� Initializer� ���� �� ��������� ���
            if (user.PasswordHash != request.Password) 
                return Result<AuthResponseDto>.Failure("��� �������� �� ���� ������ ��� �����.");

            var token = GenerateJwtToken(user);

            return Result<AuthResponseDto>.Success(new AuthResponseDto
            {
                Token = token,
                FullName = user.FullName,
                Role = (int)user.Role
            });
        }

        private string GenerateJwtToken(Domain.Entities.User user)
        {
            // ��� ������� ����� �� appsettings.json
            var secretKey = _configuration["Jwt:SecretKey"] ?? "MySuperSecretKeyForSalesSystemMVP2026"; 
            var key = new SymmetricSecurityKey(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(secretKey));
            var creds = new SigningCredentials(key, SecurityAlgorithms.HmacSha256);

            var claims = new[]
            {
                new Claim(JwtRegisteredClaimNames.Sub, user.UserId.ToString()),
                new Claim(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier, user.UserName),
                new Claim(ClaimTypes.Name, user.FullName),
                new Claim(ClaimTypes.Role, user.Role.ToString())
            };

            var token = new JwtSecurityToken(
                issuer: _configuration["Jwt:Issuer"] ?? "SalesSystemApi",
                audience: _configuration["Jwt:Audience"] ?? "SalesSystemDesktop",
                claims: claims,
                expires: DateTime.UtcNow.AddHours(8), // ������ ���� �� 8 �����
                signingCredentials: creds
            );

            return new JwtSecurityTokenHandler().WriteToken(token);
        }
    }
}

3. ���� Infrastructure (����� ��������)
UserRepository.cs (�� Persistence/Repositories)
C#
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class UserRepository : IUserRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public UserRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<User?> GetByUserNameAsync(string userName, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.Users
                .AsNoTracking()
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.UserName == userName, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}

using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization;
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Services;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Auth;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/auth")]
    [AllowAnonymous] // ����� ������ ������� ���� ������
    public class AuthController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IAuthService _authService;

        public AuthController(IAuthService authService)
        {
            _authService = authService;
        }

        [HttpPost("login")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<AuthResponseDto>>> Login([FromBody] LoginRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _authService.LoginAsync(request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<AuthResponseDto>.Fail(result.Error ?? "��� ����� ������"));
            
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<AuthResponseDto>.Success(result.Data!, "�� ����� ������ �����"));
        }
    }
}
����� Program.cs �� ��� API ������ ������:
��� ���� Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer ������ ��� API� �� ��� Program.cs:
C#
// ��� ��� ������ ��� builder.Build();
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer;
using Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens;
using System.Text;

var secretKey = builder.Configuration["Jwt:SecretKey"] ?? "MySuperSecretKeyForSalesSystemMVP2026";

builder.Services.AddAuthentication(JwtBearerDefaults.AuthenticationScheme)
    .AddJwtBearer(options =>
    {
        options.TokenValidationParameters = new TokenValidationParameters
        {
            ValidateIssuer = true,
            ValidateAudience = true,
            ValidateLifetime = true,
            ValidateIssuerSigningKey = true,
            ValidIssuer = builder.Configuration["Jwt:Issuer"] ?? "SalesSystemApi",
            ValidAudience = builder.Configuration["Jwt:Audience"] ?? "SalesSystemDesktop",
            IssuerSigningKey = new SymmetricSecurityKey(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(secretKey))
        };
    });

// ��� app.UseRouting() ���� app.MapControllers();
app.UseAuthentication();
app.UseAuthorization();
(������: ����� ���� ����� [Authorize] ��� �� Controller ��� ���� �� ��� �� ������� ��� API ���� Token).

C#
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Auth;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class AuthApiService
    {
        private readonly HttpClient _httpClient;

        public AuthApiService(HttpClient httpClient)
        {
            _httpClient = httpClient;
        }

        public async Task<AuthResponseDto?> LoginAsync(LoginRequestDto request)
        {
            var response = await _httpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/auth/login", request);
            
            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
            {
                var error = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<object>>();
                throw new InvalidOperationException(error?.Message ?? "��� �������� �� ���� ������ �����");
            }

            var result = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<AuthResponseDto>>();
            return result?.Data;
        }
    }
}
LoginForm.cs (���� ����� ������)
�� SalesSystem.Desktop/Forms:
C#
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Auth;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms
{
    public class LoginForm : Form
    {
        private readonly AuthApiService _authApiService;
        private TextBox txtUsername = null!;
        private TextBox txtPassword = null!;
        private Button btnLogin = null!;

        public LoginForm(AuthApiService authApiService)
        {
            _authApiService = authApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = "����� ������";
            Size = new Size(400, 300);
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterScreen;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;
            MaximizeBox = false; MinimizeBox = false;
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes; RightToLeftLayout = true;
            BackColor = Color.White;

            var lblTitle = new Label { Text = "���� ����� ��������", Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 16, FontStyle.Bold), Dock = DockStyle.Top, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleCenter, Height = 60 };
            
            txtUsername = new TextBox { Width = 250, PlaceholderText = "��� ��������" };
            txtPassword = new TextBox { Width = 250, PlaceholderText = "���� ������", UseSystemPasswordChar = true };
            
            btnLogin = new Button { Text = "����", Width = 250, Height = 40, BackColor = Color.FromArgb(33, 43, 54), ForeColor = Color.White };
            btnLogin.Click += async (_, _) => await PerformLoginAsync();
            AcceptButton = btnLogin;

            var flp = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.TopDown, Padding = new Padding(60, 20, 20, 20) };
            flp.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { new Label { Text = "��� ��������:" }, txtUsername, new Label { Text = "���� ������:" }, txtPassword, new Label { Height = 10 }, btnLogin });

            Controls.Add(flp);
            Controls.Add(lblTitle);
        }

        private async Task PerformLoginAsync()
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtUsername.Text) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtPassword.Text))
            {
                MessageBox.Show("������ ����� ��� �������� ����� ������."); return;
            }

            try
            {
                Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor;
                btnLogin.Enabled = false;

                var result = await _authApiService.LoginAsync(new LoginRequestDto
                {
                    UserName = txtUsername.Text,
                    Password = txtPassword.Text
                });

                if (result != null)
                {
                    TokenStore.Token = result.Token;
                    TokenStore.CurrentUserName = result.FullName;
                    DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                    Close();
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
            finally { Cursor = Cursors.Default; btnLogin.Enabled = true; }
        }
    }
}
����� Program.cs �� ��� Desktop ������ ��� Login ����� ������ ��� Token
�� SalesSystem.Desktop/Program.cs:
C#
// 1. ����� Handler ������ ������ �� �� ���
public class JwtAuthorizationHandler : DelegatingHandler
{
    protected override async Task<HttpResponseMessage> SendAsync(HttpRequestMessage request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(TokenStore.Token))
        {
            request.Headers.Authorization = new System.Net.Http.Headers.AuthenticationHeaderValue("Bearer", TokenStore.Token);
        }
        return await base.SendAsync(request, cancellationToken);
    }
}

// 2. ���� ���� Main �� ConfigureServices:
services.AddTransient<JwtAuthorizationHandler>();

// 3. ����� ����� ��� HttpClients ��� ������ ��� Handler
services.AddHttpClient<AuthApiService>(c => c.BaseAddress = new Uri(baseUrl)); // Auth �� ����� ����
services.AddHttpClient<IProductApiService, ProductApiService>(c => c.BaseAddress = new Uri(baseUrl))
        .AddHttpMessageHandler<JwtAuthorizationHandler>();
// (�� ������ AddHttpMessageHandler ��� ���� ��� Services)

services.AddTransient<LoginForm>();

// 4. �� ���� Main� ��� ��� LoginForm �����:
var loginForm = host.Services.GetRequiredService<LoginForm>();
if (loginForm.ShowDialog() == DialogResult.OK)
{
    var mainForm = host.Services.GetRequiredService<MainForm>();
    Application.Run(mainForm);
}
else
{
    Application.Exit();
}

��� ������ ���� �� ����� ������ (������ �������ʡ ����� ����֡ ������� ��������) ������� ������ �� ���� ������ ��������.
1. ���� Contracts (���� ��������)

namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Reports
{
    public class CustomerLedgerEntryDto
    {
        public DateTime Date { get; set; }
        public string TransactionType { get; set; } = string.Empty; // ��� ������: �����ɡ ��ϡ �����
        public string ReferenceNo { get; set; } = string.Empty; // ��� �������
        public decimal Debit { get; set; } // ���� (����)
        public decimal Credit { get; set; } // ���� (��)
        public decimal Balance { get; set; } // ������ ��������
    }
}
2. ���� Infrastructure (������� ��������)
���� ReportRepository.cs ���� ��� ������ (�� ������� �� IReportRepository):
C#
public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLedgerEntryDto>> GetCustomerLedgerAsync(int customerId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
{
    // 1. ��� ������ �������� (���� - ���� ������)
    var invoices = await _context.SalesInvoices
        .Where(x => x.CustomerId == customerId && x.Status != SalesSystem.Domain.Enums.InvoiceStatus.Cancelled)
        .Select(x => new { Date = x.InvoiceDate, No = x.InvoiceNo, Type = "������ ������", Debit = x.TotalAmount, Credit = 0m })
        .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

    // 2. ��� ����� ����� (���� - ���� ������)
    var payments = await _context.CustomerPayments
        .Where(x => x.CustomerId == customerId)
        .Select(x => new { Date = x.PaymentDate, No = x.PaymentNo, Type = "��� ���", Debit = 0m, Credit = x.Amount })
        .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

    // 3. ��� ��������� (���� - ���� ������)
    var returns = await _context.SalesReturns
        .Where(x => x.CustomerId == customerId && x.Status != SalesSystem.Domain.Enums.InvoiceStatus.Cancelled)
        .Select(x => new { Date = x.ReturnDate, No = x.ReturnNo, Type = "����� ������", Debit = 0m, Credit = x.TotalAmount })
        .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

    // ��� ������� �������� ������
    var combined = invoices
        .Concat(payments)
        .Concat(returns)
        .OrderBy(x => x.Date)
        .Select(x => new CustomerLedgerEntryDto
        {
            Date = x.Date,
            ReferenceNo = x.No,
            TransactionType = x.Type,
            Debit = x.Debit,
            Credit = x.Credit
        }).ToList();

    // ���� ������ ��������
    decimal runningBalance = 0;
    foreach (var entry in combined)
    {
        runningBalance += (entry.Debit - entry.Credit);
        entry.Balance = runningBalance;
    }

    return combined;
}
3. ���� Application � API
* �� IReportService � ReportService� ��� ���� GetCustomerLedgerAsync ���� ������ ?� Repository.
* �� ReportsController� ��� Endpoint ����:
C#
[HttpGet("customer-ledger/{customerId:int}")]
public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLedgerEntryDto>>>> GetCustomerLedger(int customerId, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
{
    var result = await _reportService.GetCustomerLedgerAsync(customerId, cancellationToken);
    return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CustomerLedgerEntryDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
}

C#
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Reports;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Reports
{
    public class CustomerLedgerForm : Form
    {
        private readonly IReportApiService _reportApi;
        private readonly int _customerId;
        private readonly string _customerName;
        private DataGridView dgvLedger = null!;

        public CustomerLedgerForm(IReportApiService reportApi, int customerId, string customerName)
        {
            _reportApi = reportApi;
            _customerId = customerId;
            _customerName = customerName;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadLedgerAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = $"��� ���� ������: {_customerName}";
            Size = new Size(800, 600);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;

            var lblTitle = new Label { Text = Text, Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 50, Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 14, FontStyle.Bold), TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleCenter };

            dgvLedger = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, ReadOnly = true, AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect, AutoGenerateColumns = false
            };

            dgvLedger.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "Date", HeaderText = "�������", Width = 150 });
            dgvLedger.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "TransactionType", HeaderText = "��� ������", Width = 150 });
            dgvLedger.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "ReferenceNo", HeaderText = "��� �������", Width = 150 });
            dgvLedger.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "Debit", HeaderText = "���� (����)", DefaultCellStyle = new DataGridViewCellStyle { ForeColor = Color.Red } });
            dgvLedger.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "Credit", HeaderText = "���� (��)", DefaultCellStyle = new DataGridViewCellStyle { ForeColor = Color.Green } });
            dgvLedger.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "Balance", HeaderText = "������", Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 9, FontStyle.Bold) });

            Controls.Add(dgvLedger);
            Controls.Add(lblTitle);
        }

        private async Task LoadLedgerAsync()
        {
            Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor;
            try
            {
                var data = await _reportApi.GetCustomerLedgerAsync(_customerId);
                dgvLedger.DataSource = data;
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���"); }
            finally { Cursor = Cursors.Default; }
        }
    }
}

C#
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Sales;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Sales
{
    public class SalesInvoiceViewForm : Form
    {
        private readonly ISalesApiService _salesApi;
        private readonly int _invoiceId;
        
        private Label lblInvoiceNo = null!;
        private Label lblDate = null!;
        private Label lblCustomer = null!;
        private Label lblWarehouse = null!;
        private Label lblTotal = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvItems = null!;

        public SalesInvoiceViewForm(ISalesApiService salesApi, int invoiceId)
        {
            _salesApi = salesApi;
            _invoiceId = invoiceId;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadInvoiceAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = "������ ��������";
            Size = new Size(800, 600);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;

            var pnlHeader = new GroupBox { Text = "������ ��������", Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 100 };
            lblInvoiceNo = new Label { Width = 150 }; lblDate = new Label { Width = 150 };
            lblCustomer = new Label { Width = 200 }; lblWarehouse = new Label { Width = 150 };
            
            var flp = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, Padding = new Padding(10) };
            flp.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { new Label { Text="��� ��������:" }, lblInvoiceNo, new Label { Text="�������:" }, lblDate, new Label { Text="������:" }, lblCustomer, new Label { Text="������:" }, lblWarehouse });
            pnlHeader.Controls.Add(flp);

            dgvItems = new DataGridView { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, ReadOnly = true, AllowUserToAddRows = false, AutoGenerateColumns = false };
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "ProductName", HeaderText = "�����", Width = 250 });
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "Quantity", HeaderText = "������" });
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "UnitPrice", HeaderText = "�����" });
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "LineTotal", HeaderText = "��������" });

            var pnlFooter = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Bottom, Height = 50, Padding = new Padding(10) };
            lblTotal = new Label { Dock = DockStyle.Left, Width = 300, Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 12, FontStyle.Bold), ForeColor = Color.Green };
            var btnClose = new Button { Text = "�����", Dock = DockStyle.Right, Width = 100 };
            btnClose.Click += (_, _) => Close();
            
            pnlFooter.Controls.Add(lblTotal);
            pnlFooter.Controls.Add(btnClose);

            Controls.Add(dgvItems);
            Controls.Add(pnlHeader);
            Controls.Add(pnlFooter);
        }

        private async Task LoadInvoiceAsync()
        {
            Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor;
            try
            {
                var invoice = await _salesApi.GetByIdAsync(_invoiceId);
                if (invoice == null) { MessageBox.Show("�������� ��� ������"); Close(); return; }

                lblInvoiceNo.Text = invoice.InvoiceNo;
                lblDate.Text = invoice.InvoiceDate.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd");
                lblCustomer.Text = invoice.CustomerName ?? "���� ����";
                lblWarehouse.Text = invoice.WarehouseName;
                lblTotal.Text = $"�������� �������: {invoice.TotalAmount:N2}";

                dgvItems.DataSource = invoice.Items;
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���"); }
            finally { Cursor = Cursors.Default; }
        }
    }
}

1. ��� ���� ������ (Supplier Ledger)
������ ���� (������ ����). ������ ������ ���� ����� (��)� ������ ����� �������� ������ ���� ����� (����).
�) ����� ����� ��� (API + Repository)
���� ReportRepository.cs ���� ��� ������ (�� ������� �� IReportRepository � IReportService):
C#
public async Task<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLedgerEntryDto>> GetSupplierLedgerAsync(int supplierId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
{
    // 1. ��� ������ ��������� (���� - �� - ���� ����� ���� �����)
    var invoices = await _context.PurchaseInvoices
        .Where(x => x.SupplierId == supplierId && x.Status != SalesSystem.Domain.Enums.InvoiceStatus.Cancelled)
        .Select(x => new { Date = x.InvoiceDate, No = x.InvoiceNo, Type = "������ �������", Debit = 0m, Credit = x.TotalAmount })
        .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

    // 2. ��� ����� ����� (���� - ���� - ���� ����� ���� �����)
    var payments = await _context.SupplierPayments
        .Where(x => x.SupplierId == supplierId)
        .Select(x => new { Date = x.PaymentDate, No = x.PaymentNo, Type = "��� ���", Debit = x.Amount, Credit = 0m })
        .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

    // 3. ��� ������� ��������� (���� - ���� - ���� ����� ���� �����)
    var returns = await _context.PurchaseReturns
        .Where(x => x.SupplierId == supplierId && x.Status != SalesSystem.Domain.Enums.InvoiceStatus.Cancelled)
        .Select(x => new { Date = x.ReturnDate, No = x.ReturnNo, Type = "����� �������", Debit = x.TotalAmount, Credit = 0m })
        .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

    // ��� ������� �������� ������
    var combined = invoices.Concat(payments).Concat(returns)
        .OrderBy(x => x.Date)
        .Select(x => new SupplierLedgerEntryDto
        {
            Date = x.Date, ReferenceNo = x.No, TransactionType = x.Type, Debit = x.Debit, Credit = x.Credit
        }).ToList();

    // ���� ������ �������� (������ ���� ������)
    decimal runningBalance = 0;
    foreach (var entry in combined)
    {
        runningBalance += (entry.Credit - entry.Debit);
        entry.Balance = runningBalance;
    }

    return combined;
}

using SalesSystem.Contracts.Reports;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Reports
{
    public class SupplierLedgerForm : Form
    {
        private readonly IReportApiService _reportApi;
        private readonly int _supplierId;
        private readonly string _supplierName;
        private DataGridView dgvLedger = null!;

        public SupplierLedgerForm(IReportApiService reportApi, int supplierId, string supplierName)
        {
            _reportApi = reportApi;
            _supplierId = supplierId;
            _supplierName = supplierName;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadLedgerAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = $"��� ���� ������: {_supplierName}";
            Size = new Size(800, 600);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes; RightToLeftLayout = true;
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;

            var lblTitle = new Label { Text = Text, Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 50, Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 14, FontStyle.Bold), TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleCenter };

            dgvLedger = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, ReadOnly = true, AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect, AutoGenerateColumns = false,
                BackgroundColor = Color.White
            };

            dgvLedger.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "Date", HeaderText = "�������", Width = 150 });
            dgvLedger.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "TransactionType", HeaderText = "��� ������", Width = 150 });
            dgvLedger.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "ReferenceNo", HeaderText = "��� �������", Width = 150 });
            dgvLedger.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "Credit", HeaderText = "���� (��)", DefaultCellStyle = new DataGridViewCellStyle { ForeColor = Color.Red } }); // ���� ���� ��� �����
            dgvLedger.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "Debit", HeaderText = "���� (����)", DefaultCellStyle = new DataGridViewCellStyle { ForeColor = Color.Green } });
            dgvLedger.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "Balance", HeaderText = "������", Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 9, FontStyle.Bold) });

            Controls.Add(dgvLedger);
            Controls.Add(lblTitle);
        }

        private async Task LoadLedgerAsync()
        {
            Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor;
            try
            {
                // ������� ��� ���� GetSupplierLedgerAsync ��� IReportApiService
                var data = await _reportApi.GetSupplierLedgerAsync(_supplierId);
                dgvLedger.DataSource = data;
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���"); }
            finally { Cursor = Cursors.Default; }
        }
    }
}

C#
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Returns; // ����� ���� PurchaseReturnEditorForm ���
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Returns
{
    public class PurchaseReturnsListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly IPurchaseReturnApiService _returnApiService; // ��� ������� ���� ��� Sales
        private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvReturns = null!;

        public PurchaseReturnsListControl(IPurchaseReturnApiService returnApiService, IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
        {
            _returnApiService = returnApiService;
            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadReturnsAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill; RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            
            var topPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 50, Padding = new Padding(8) };
            txtSearch = new TextBox { Width = 260, PlaceholderText = "���� ���� �������..." };
            
            var btnSearch = new Button { Text = "���", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadReturnsAsync();

            var btnAdd = new Button { Text = "����� ������� ����", Width = 150 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync();

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft };
            searchPanel.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { btnAdd, btnSearch, txtSearch });
            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);

            dgvReturns = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, ReadOnly = true, AllowUserToAddRows = false, BackgroundColor = Color.White,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect, MultiSelect = false, AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvReturns.DataSource = _bindingSource;

            Controls.Add(dgvReturns);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadReturnsAsync()
        {
            Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor;
            try
            {
                var result = await _returnApiService.GetPagedAsync(new PagedQueryRequestDto { PageNumber = 1, PageSize = 100, SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text });
                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���"); }
            finally { Cursor = Cursors.Default; }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvReturns.Columns.Count == 0) return;
            if (dgvReturns.Columns.Contains("ReturnNo")) dgvReturns.Columns["ReturnNo"].HeaderText = "��� �������";
            if (dgvReturns.Columns.Contains("SupplierName")) dgvReturns.Columns["SupplierName"].HeaderText = "������";
            if (dgvReturns.Columns.Contains("TotalAmount")) dgvReturns.Columns["TotalAmount"].HeaderText = "��������";
            if (dgvReturns.Columns.Contains("ReturnDate")) dgvReturns.Columns["ReturnDate"].HeaderText = "�������";
            // ����� ������� ��� �������� ���� IDs
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync()
        {
            using var form = Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProviderServiceExtensions.GetRequiredService<PurchaseReturnEditorForm>(_serviceProvider);
            if (form.ShowDialog(FindForm()) == DialogResult.OK) await LoadReturnsAsync();
        }
    }
}

using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Warehouses
{
    public class TransfersListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly IStockTransferApiService _transferApiService;
        private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private DataGridView dgvTransfers = null!;

        public TransfersListControl(IStockTransferApiService transferApiService, IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
        {
            _transferApiService = transferApiService;
            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadTransfersAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill; RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;

            var topPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 50, Padding = new Padding(8) };
            
            var btnAdd = new Button { Text = "����� ����� �����", Width = 150 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync();
            
            var btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "�����", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadTransfersAsync();

            var flowPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft };
            flowPanel.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { btnAdd, btnRefresh });
            topPanel.Controls.Add(flowPanel);

            dgvTransfers = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, ReadOnly = true, AllowUserToAddRows = false, BackgroundColor = Color.White,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect, AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvTransfers.DataSource = _bindingSource;

            Controls.Add(dgvTransfers);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadTransfersAsync()
        {
            Cursor = Cursors.WaitCursor;
            try
            {
                var result = await _transferApiService.GetPagedAsync(new PagedQueryRequestDto { PageNumber = 1, PageSize = 100 });
                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "���"); }
            finally { Cursor = Cursors.Default; }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvTransfers.Columns.Count == 0) return;
            if (dgvTransfers.Columns.Contains("TransferNo")) dgvTransfers.Columns["TransferNo"].HeaderText = "��� �������";
            if (dgvTransfers.Columns.Contains("FromWarehouseName")) dgvTransfers.Columns["FromWarehouseName"].HeaderText = "�� ����";
            if (dgvTransfers.Columns.Contains("ToWarehouseName")) dgvTransfers.Columns["ToWarehouseName"].HeaderText = "��� ����";
            if (dgvTransfers.Columns.Contains("TransferDate")) dgvTransfers.Columns["TransferDate"].HeaderText = "�������";
            if (dgvTransfers.Columns.Contains("Status")) dgvTransfers.Columns["Status"].HeaderText = "������";
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync()
        {
            // TransferEditorForm �� ������ ���� �������� ������ ������ �������
            using var form = Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProviderServiceExtensions.GetRequiredService<TransferEditorForm>(_serviceProvider);
            if (form.ShowDialog(FindForm()) == DialogResult.OK) await LoadTransfersAsync();
        }
    }
}

�� ����� ����� ��� ������� ������� (����� ����� �����ѡ ����� �����ȡ ������ ������) ����� ���� ������ ��� ������

����� ������ ��� ������� ������ ����� �������:
1. ����� ����� ������ (BCrypt)
����� ������ ��� ����� ���� ������� ��������. �� ����� SalesSystem.Application ������ SalesSystem.Infrastructure (��� ��� ����� ��� ��� ��� �������� Seed)� �� ������ ���� NuGet �������:
